programme.title: Shattered Glass
programme.desc: The story of a journalist who fell from grace when it was discovered he fabricated over half of his articles.

programme.title: The Open Road
programme.desc: A minor leaguer tries to track down his estranged father, a famous baseball player, when his mom becomes sick.

programme.title: Racing Stripes
programme.desc: Raised on a farm in America, Stripes the zebra believes he is destined to be a racehorse.

programme.title: Swimming Upstream
programme.desc: The true story of Tony Fingleton, a young Australian man from a troubled family who became a champion swimmer.

programme.title: Warrior
programme.desc: Two brothers prepare to go head to head in a mixed martial arts battle in order to win the prize money.

programme.title: iMurders
programme.desc: A love triangle leads to a shooting. Months later, eight members of a chat room are being gruesomely murdered.

programme.title: Laid to Rest
programme.desc: A young woman wakes up inside a locked casket with no memory of who she is or how she got there.

programme.title: 3 From Hell
programme.desc: After barely surviving prison, the demented Firefly clan go on the run, unleashing a whole new wave of mayhem.

programme.title: Dead Zone
programme.desc: A man awakens from a coma to discover he has a psychic ability to foresee future events.

programme.title: Dinocroc vs. Supergator
programme.desc: Created in the laboratories of a biotech corporation, two ravenous mega-reptiles level everything in their way

programme.title: Dinoshark
programme.desc: A baby dinoshark evolves into a ferocious adult, terrorising tourists and locals offshore from Puerto Vallarta

programme.title: The Pursuit of D.B. Cooper
programme.desc: See what might have happened after DB Cooper's stunt of the century.

programme.title: War of the Buttons
programme.desc: A pre-teen rebel in WWII-occupied France unites a group of kids to protect a young Jewish girl from Nazis.

programme.title: Skyline
programme.desc: Strange lights over Los Angeles herald the arrival of malevolent aliens who threaten to swallow up humanity.

programme.title: Godsend
programme.desc: A couple agree to have their deceased son cloned, but bizarre things happen several years after his rebirth.

programme.title: Sands of Oblivion
programme.desc: An archaeologist couple and an Iraq War combat veteran uncover a replica of ancient Egypt made for a movie.

programme.title: Gods of Egypt
programme.desc: A mortal teams with the god Horus in an alliance against Set, the god of darkness, who usurped Egypt's throne.

programme.title: Survive the Night
programme.desc: A doctor and his family are held hostage by a wounded gunman and his unhinged brother.

programme.title: Trauma Center
programme.desc: A detective teams up with an injured female witness to avenge the murders of his partner and an informant.

programme.title: Catch 44
programme.desc: Three friends get caught in a standoff with a psychopath, a truck driver, a line cook, and head crime boss.

programme.title: Stand Up Guys
programme.desc: A pair of aging stickup men try to get the old gang back together for one last hurrah.

programme.title: Rob-B-Hood
programme.desc: Thongs and Octopus grow attached to the baby they kidnapped for their landlord, which leads to complications.

programme.title: The Tournament
programme.desc: A 24 hour "kill or die" tournament is held in an English town. The winner will claim a $10,000,000 cash prize.

programme.title: Arthur and the Invisibles
programme.desc: A young boy, who must find his grandfather, turns to the help of tiny but magical creatures called Minimoys.

programme.title: Against the Wild
programme.desc: Two kids and their dog fight for survival after their plane crashes in the wilderness.

programme.title: Against the Wild 2: Survive the Serengeti
programme.desc: After a plane crash, siblings Ryan and Emma find themselves stranded in the Serengeti.

programme.title: Crossworlds
programme.desc: When a resistance fighter turns up in, Joe is drawn into a battle to rescue Earth from intergalactic raiders.

programme.title: A Kid in King Arthur's Court
programme.desc: A Little League player is sent back into medieval times where he is given the task of saving Camelot.

programme.title: Witchville
programme.desc: Upon hearing of his father's death, Prince Malachy returns to Draeganoth in order to defeat a coven of witches

programme.title: Merlin and the Book of Beasts
programme.desc: King Arthur is gone. The Round Table is in ruins. And a rogue sorcerer has unleashed a monstrous terror.

programme.title: Parker
programme.desc: A thief with a unique code of professional ethics is double-crossed by his crew and left for dead.

programme.title: A Walk in the Woods
programme.desc: Travel writer Bill Bryson and a long-lost old friend embark on a hike along the Appalachian Trail.

programme.title: The Stranger
programme.desc: A man with no name and no memory is forced to fight back as he is hunted by both the FBI and the Russian mob.

programme.title: The Second Arrival
programme.desc: A young man receives a strange letter detailing an alien invasion after the sudden death of his brother.

programme.title: Young Guns
programme.desc: A group of young gunmen become deputies to avenge the murder of the rancher who became their benefactor.

programme.title: Sublet
programme.desc: A reporter sublets an apartment for a too good price, but finds himself drawn into a deadly conspiracy.

programme.title: Happy Together
programme.desc: When a computer error pairs a studious teen with a party-loving girl as his roommate, he demands a transfer.

programme.title: The Cookout
programme.desc: In an attempt at normality, the No. 1 NBA draft pick throws an old-fashioned neighborhood barbecue.

programme.title: Wagons East
programme.desc: In the 1860's Wild West, a bunch of misfit settlers hire a grizzled cowboy to take them on a journey back east

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA
programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep, if they choose, until its unsealing at the end of the game. (11 out of 39)

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After a weekend retreat, a Boy Scout's organs start shutting down, leaving doctors puzzled.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When two boys are brutally attacked, investigators rely on evidence fished out of a nearby pond.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in a ravine, but crucial crime scene evidence had been washed away by storms.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police use forensic evidence to re-examine the motives of a man who shot an intruder.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Forensics contradicts a husband's confession to his wife's murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Car with three agents collides with deputy's car; investigations find two different conclusions.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman is killed weeks before testifying against the man who sexually assaulted her.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A three-year-old develops a respiratory condition. His father has Alzheimers.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A mother of two vanishes after a shopping trip. Her body is discovered a month later.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Residents were stunned to learn that their bank had been robbed and the bank president was missing.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Investigators use the recollections of a child to determine what happened to a missing woman.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1995, police in San Diego, California are baffled by a pair of hands found in a dumpster.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A go-go dancer told her family she needed to get away for a while and then she simply disappeared.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Garbage bag leads to a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A union official is executed in his home not long after a strike by the union membership.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Bloomberg: The China Show

programme.title: Insight With Haslinda Amin
programme.desc: In a volatile and unpredictable world, the show will be the definitive guide for the global news audience to get the complete picture on the biggest story of the day. With news making executives, officials and thought-leaders from the world of business, politics and academia we will explore a story through probing interviews and nuanced conversations. The hour of programming will also highlight the most relevant stories from India which is currently one of the hottest investment destinations, but also has compelling stories that play into the Bloomberg's priority issues such as Climate change, Diversity and Technological innovation.

programme.title: Bloomberg Horizons Middle East & Africa
programme.desc: A spotlight on the fast paced growth and major deals happening across the Middle East and Africa; linking the market drivers from overnight in the US and across Asia into the region's trading day, with deep dive analysis of the top business, energy and geopolitical stories shaping the decisions of traders across the Middle East, Africa and beyond.

programme.title: Bloomberg Daybreak: Europe
programme.desc: From London, essential morning viewing to stay ahead of the day's market trends with news stories from the U.S. and Asia in the lead-up to the opening of European markets.

programme.title: Bloomberg The Opening Trade
programme.desc: "The Opening Trade" explores things to know as markets open across Europe; analysis that isn't available anywhere else, a break-down of the biggest stories of the day and top guests who have skin in the game.

programme.title: The Pulse with Francine Lacqua
programme.desc: "The Pulse With Francine Lacqua" is all about conversations with high profile guests in the beating heart of global business, economics, finance and politics; based in London, we go wherever the story is, bringing you exclusive interviews and market-moving scoops.

programme.title: Bloomberg Brief
programme.desc: "Bloomberg Brief" delivers the market news, data and analysis viewers need to set their agendas.

programme.title: Bloomberg Surveillance
programme.desc: Jonathan Ferro, Lisa Abramowicz and Annmarie Hordern have the economy and global markets "under surveillance"; their daily conversations with leaders and decision makers from Wall Street to Washington and beyond cover the latest in business, investment, and geopolitics; no other program better positions investors and executives for the trading day.

programme.title: Bloomberg Open Interest
programme.desc: Delivering the market-moving news anyone needs to know to get a jump start on the U.S. trading day.

programme.title: Bloomberg Tech

programme.desc: On this week's Leaders with Francine Lacqua, she speaks with Rolls-Royce Chief Executive Officer Tufan Erginbilgiç about confronting the company's weaknesses with data-driven honesty and setting a clear, granular strategy to transform performance.

programme.title: Leaders with Francine Lacqua: The Podcast
programme.desc: Jon Gray emphasizes the importance of resilience, clear decision-making and maintaining humanity in leadership, especially during tough times.

programme.title: Bloomberg The Asia Trade
programme.desc: Bringing global investors everything you need to know as the trading day begins in Asia; Bloomberg TV is live from Tokyo and Sydney with Shery Ahn and Haidi Stroud-Watts, getting insight and analysis from newsmakers and industry leaders on the biggest stories shaping markets, from tech, to geopolitics, and the world's energy transition.

programme.title: Bloomberg: The China Show
programme.desc: Your definitive source for news and analysis on the world's second-biggest economy; from politics and policy to tech and trends, Yvonne Man and David Ingles give global investors unique insight, delivering in-depth discussions with the newsmakers who matter.

programme.title: Insight With Haslinda Amin
programme.desc: In a volatile and unpredictable world, the show will be the definitive guide for the global news audience to get the complete picture on the biggest story of the day. With news making executives, officials and thought-leaders from the world of business, politics and academia we will explore a story through probing interviews and nuanced conversations. The hour of programming will also highlight the most relevant stories from India which is currently one of the hottest investment destinations, but also has compelling stories that play into the Bloomberg's priority issues such as Climate change, Diversity and Technological innovation.

programme.title: Bloomberg Horizons Middle East & Africa
programme.desc: A spotlight on the fast paced growth and major deals happening across the Middle East and Africa; linking the market drivers from overnight in the US and across Asia into the region's trading day, with deep dive analysis of the top business, energy and geopolitical stories shaping the decisions of traders across the Middle East, Africa and beyond.

programme.title: Bloomberg Daybreak: Europe
programme.desc: From London, essential morning viewing to stay ahead of the day's market trends with news stories from the U.S. and Asia in the lead-up to the opening of European markets.

programme.title: Bloomberg The Opening Trade
programme.desc: "The Opening Trade" explores things to know as markets open across Europe; analysis that isn't available anywhere else, a break-down of the biggest stories of the day and top guests who have skin in the game.

programme.title: The Pulse with Francine Lacqua
programme.desc: "The Pulse With Francine Lacqua" is all about conversations with high profile guests in the beating heart of global business, economics, finance and politics; based in London, we go wherever the story is, bringing you exclusive interviews and market-moving scoops.

programme.title: Bloomberg Brief
programme.desc: "Bloomberg Brief" delivers the market news, data and analysis viewers need to set their agendas.

programme.title: Bloomberg Surveillance
programme.desc: Jonathan Ferro, Lisa Abramowicz and Annmarie Hordern have the economy and global markets "under surveillance"; their daily conversations with leaders and decision makers from Wall Street to Washington and beyond cover the latest in business, investment, and geopolitics; no other program better positions investors and executives for the trading day.

programme.title: Bloomberg Open Interest
programme.desc: Delivering the market-moving news anyone needs to know to get a jump start on the U.S. trading day.

programme.title: Bloomberg Tech

programme.title: Bloomberg Crypto

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A high-speed pursuit quickly comes to a head after the driver loses control. A Florida man driving a stolen vehicle claims it belongs to his parents. Arrests are made in a Florida prostitute sting.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A desperate suspect risks his life in an attempt to escape arrest. A father refuses to lie for his violent son. A malnourished woman makes a call to report some trespassing ghosts.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A high-speed chase ends when the suspect plays chicken with a concrete pole. An emotional man just wants the cops to give him a little kiss. A melee breaks out when a woman seizes her beau's cell phone.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: An armed suspect’s bloody state takes officers by surprise. The driver of a stolen car bails when he is pulled over. Officers apprehend several suspects after they spot a pair of carjacked vehicles.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A young lawbreaker does everything she can to escape jail. Grandpa saves the day when Mom fails to do the right thing. A traffic stop leads one deputy to suspect an elderly duo of criminal activity.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Deputies tase a man who almost ran over a deputy with his truck. A man gives police false information after saving a boy who fell into a pool. A woman tries to buy drugs from an undercover officer.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers learn the hard way that even a taser can’t take some suspects down. Patrol cars roll up on a couple in a darkened pickup truck. Cops arrest one of the most polite suspects in America.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A stealthy robbery suspect leads officers on a chase through backyards. After dropping a bag of meth, a man swears he’s only seen the drug on TV. A doped-up domestic violence suspect tries to claim self-defense.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Police arrest a suspect for armed robbery. A six foot alligator is found on a homeowner's back porch. An Officer assists in an undercover sting.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: An escaped felon looks to Grandma for safe haven. It’s a blast from the past when deputies pull out a security device from the ‘80s. Later, worried neighbors refuse to give a dog back to its owners.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Police pursue a driver who ran a stop sign. A suspect wearing a D.A.R.E. T-shirt is found to be in possession of drugs. A woman claims the drugs found in the vehicle she’s sleeping in are not hers.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A suspect is arrested after officers find a loaded gun during a routine search. Two men are detained after suspected of battery. Officers arrest a man pick-pocketing during Mardi Gras.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A man runs from Police over a parole violation. Officers respond when a trouble maker is expelled from a bar for bad behavior. Police pursue a man after he bails from his car during a traffic stop.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Several squad cars join together in pursuit of a pickup truck. Officers conduct a drug raid utilizing percussion grenades. A suspect wanted for numerous robberies flees from Police in a sports car.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers engage in a vehicular pursuit involving a narcotics suspect. Officers respond to a domestic violence call involving a mother, daughter and the mother’s new husband to be. An officer makes an arrest in a stolen SUV case.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: The suspect of a carjacking tells an Officer that he would rather go to jail than face the wrath of his mother. An Officer investigates a domestic call involving a husband, wife and a lamp. A slow speed pursuit ensues and the suspects are booked for felony, eluding, and drugs.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Deputies chase a man who flees a routine traffic stop. Deputies find drugs on a man who gives them an expired license. Officers respond to a man attacking several patrons in a bar.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Witnesses of a car burglary assist an officer in locating the suspect. An officer investigates a fight involving a young man and a homeless gentleman. A suspect’s testimony is debunked after an eyewitness confirms that his knife wounds were self-inflicted.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A knife wielding man hangs around the lot of a convenience store. An intoxicated man in speedos flees from the police after urinating in a parking lot. An Officer responds to a domestic dispute after a man locks his girlfriend in the bathroom.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A crafty man pulls out all the stops to elude the police. Good Samaritans put their lives on hold when they spot a violent crime. A woman gets caught in the act but tries to bargain with officers.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Deputies are shocked when they recognize a repeat offender. When confronted by the cops, a desperate man shows no love for his girlfriend. Officers bring in a canine unit to complete a vehicle search.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers pursue a male suspect in a speeding truck and ultimately force the vehicle off the road, the suspect is taken into custody without injury. Officers respond to a domestic abuse call. Officers are called to a home where a dead body is found.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A patrolman plays linebacker when a fleeing thief runs right into him. Armed-robbery victims give a colorful play-by-play on surveillance footage of the crime. Officers have to get tearful children back to their estranged mother.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Two men engage in a fist fight on the street over an alleged robbery. A couple claims that they didn’t know the car they are driving is stolen. Occupants of a vehicle claim that all of the contraband found in their car is medical equipment.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: An angry customer threatens a store employee with a rock. Officers suspect the ‘medicine’ found in a suspect’s car is actually his business product. A stepfather gets into a fist fight.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A dispute inside a nightclub turns into a street fight. A man patrols his neighborhood ‘Old West’ style. A K-9 unit is called in to track a burglar on the run.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Three men try to convince cops they had no idea their vehicle was stolen. Officers respond after a partygoer mistakes another guest’s finger for dessert. A domestic abuse suspect makes police run through the streets.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A suspect races through the neighborhood after his scooter can’t outrun police. Cops discover a drugged, incoherent wild man lying in the bushes. Officers try to make peace between neighbors with pit bull problems.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A parolee leads deputies down a dead end street. A jealous boyfriend tells the cops his version of events, but can’t stick to his story. An officer helps some frustrated citizens kiss and make up.

programme.desc: A driver leads police on a slow speed chase towards Las Vegas. Three people are suspected of using contraband. A multi-neighbor dispute devolves into a fight involving guns and bats.

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers conduct a traffic stop and the vehicle’s occupants are taken into custody. An officer investigates a suspicious vehicle occupied by two women who turn on each other during questioning. An informant tips authorities off about drug activity at a shady motel.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A lawbreaker’s polite and respectful demeanor surprises deputies. Suspicious activity at a gas station leads one officer to trust her gut. An argument over dinner results in a call to the cops.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Hiding in an attic doesn’t work out so well for a man who comes crashing through a ceiling. Cops stop a man with a broken car and a broken heart. Neighbors call the police when non-stop cussin’ interrupts their night.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A suspect bites an Officer while trying to avoid arrest. An Officer responds to a stabbing. An Officer is flagged down by a concerned group looking for a missing 4-year-old.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A man urinating in public flees from police on foot. A handgun is found in the vehicle of a driver who claims to be a student leaving class. Deputies find drugs in a man’s car when he runs a stop sign.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A man stages a sit-in in his car in an attempt to stop it from being towed. A homeowner denies that he’s selling drugs despite the large amount of evidence found in his home. A safe full of evidence is found during a traffic stop.

programme.desc: A man with a knife tries to evade police by hiding in bushes. Vice Unit Officers conduct a prostitution sting. When Officers are shot at during a pursuit, the woman claims it was flashes from a camera.

programme.desc: The boat unit contends with an unruly suspect and his equally unpredictable dogs. Two burglary suspects try to claim car trouble when they're found at the scene of the crime. A repentant meth addict is caught by officers on the brink of his latest relapse.

programme.desc: A man takes off from officers when they roll up on a notorious hotspot for dealers. Cops surprise a jaywalker when they find some suspicious items in his supposedly borrowed jacket. A woman takes the heat for her beau when meth is found in their car.

programme.desc: A man fights with his wife over a haircut then leads police on a car chase. A woman gets violent with her boyfriend and then calls the police on him. An intoxicated woman tells deputies she only had two drinks.

programme.title: Andromeda

programme.title: The Warrant: Breaker's Law
programme.desc: U.S. Marshal John Breaker and his deputy ride to a town held hostage by a ruthless gang as they transport a prisoner through the West. With the fate of a community at stake, they must decide if they will abandon the town or make a stand for justice.

programme.title: Kansas Pacific
programme.desc: With talks of a Civil War brewing, Southern saboteurs know they must keep Northern forces from using the U.S. train system. They devise a daring and dangerous plan to stop and capture a railroad engine, preventing the completion of a railroad line.

programme.title: The Tall Tales of Jim Bridger
programme.desc: When a young girl is bitten by a rattlesnake, mountain man Jim Bridger finds himself in a race against time to save her arm and keep her alive as he desperately searches the wilderness for a medicinal plant that once saved the life of his friend.

programme.title: Gunslinger
programme.desc: When a town marshal is gunned down, his wife bravely returns fire at the gunmen and kills one. The widow is named the town's temporary marshal. At her husband's funeral, she spies the second killer and plans to finish avenging her husband.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: In his first week on the job as the new constable of Jerome, Arizona, Jim Roberts gets to work arresting the town's troublemakers and teaching his timid deputy how to be a courageous lawman as they track down a stone-cold killer and his gang.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Three deserters escape from an Army stockade and hide at the Ponderosa. When a captain comes looking for them, Ben soon realizes how the prisoners are being treated and resolves to confront his good friend in charge.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Hoss and Joe desperately look for a way to prevent brothers Adam and Ben from being hanged for a crime. A stranger, Lassiter, comes to town in an attempt to find the truth and prove Adam and Ben's innocence.

programme.title: War of the Wildcats
programme.desc: During the early days of the Oklahoma oil boom, a greedy, self-assured oilman and a quiet, yet determined cowboy fight for the rights to oil on Indian land. All the while a pretty schoolteacher steals both men's hearts.

programme.title: The Tall Tales of Jim Bridger
programme.desc: After discovering a river filled with gold, Jim Bridger and his fellow trappers believe they are near El Dorado, the mythical Spanish city of gold. But their insatiable greed turns friends into enemies and puts Bridger at risk of a gruesome fate.

programme.title: The Tall Tales of Jim Bridger
programme.desc: While guiding a hunting expedition, Jim Bridger must deal with an arrogant foreign prince who is abusing his servant boy. But the tables soon turn, when it's the prince who needs rescuing, and his only hope is the long-suffering servant boy.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: A posse pursues Jud Steele, a wanted gunslinger, and his partner. They join the wagon train to rest their horses. Steele dies trying to steal fresh horses. Hawks returns his belongings to the sheriff, who says Steele died five years ago.

programme.title: The Warrant: Breaker's Law
programme.desc: U.S. Marshal John Breaker and his deputy ride to a town held hostage by a ruthless gang as they transport a prisoner through the West. With the fate of a community at stake, they must decide if they will abandon the town or make a stand for justice.

programme.title: Kansas Pacific
programme.desc: With talks of a Civil War brewing, Southern saboteurs know they must keep Northern forces from using the U.S. train system. They devise a daring and dangerous plan to stop and capture a railroad engine, preventing the completion of a railroad line.

programme.title: The Tall Tales of Jim Bridger
programme.desc: When a young girl is bitten by a rattlesnake, mountain man Jim Bridger finds himself in a race against time to save her arm and keep her alive as he desperately searches the wilderness for a medicinal plant that once saved the life of his friend.

programme.title: Borderline
programme.desc: In the 1950s, a female police officer goes undercover and travels into Mexico to gain a drug smuggler's confidence. She is in constant danger as she attempts to figure out the details of the smuggling operation, and who she can trust with her life.

programme.title: Into The Wild Frontier
programme.desc: As a member of Lewis and Clark's Corps of Discovery, John Colter travels from the Missouri River all the way to the Pacific Ocean, but he decides not to return to the civilized East when the expedition ends. Entranced by the beauty and adventure of the wild frontier, he becomes one of America's first mountain men. As a hunter, trapper and explorer in his own right, he's the first American to see the Grand Tetons and the epic Yellowstone Valley. While his epic explorations make him famous, it's a harrowing ordeal with Blackfeet warriors that makes him a legend. After boldly venturing into territory controlled by the Blackfeet tribe, Colter is captured, stripped naked, and forced to run for his life as warriors give chase in what will come to be known as Colter's Run.

programme.title: County Line: All In
programme.desc: The murder of a crooked lawyer on the county line forces two neighboring sheriffs to put aside their differences to take down the killer.

programme.title: Turquoise Fever
programme.desc: After the death of their patriarch, the Otteson family struggles to cope, and their turquoise production grinds to a halt. In response, Donna takes charge by reopening her jewelry business and pushing the miners to step up their output to ensure a reliable supply of high-grade turquoise. Trenton and Tony decide to prospect at the last claim where Dean mined in hopes of surprising Donna with a treasure trove of precious stone. Tommy and Danny try their luck at the long-forgotten Montezuma claim and stumble across a hidden tunnel that may still hold riches.

programme.title: The Sundowners
programme.desc: When a dispute over grazing rights to a fertile canyon leads to cattle rustling, the rustling ignites a range war, turning two brothers against one another. Will both brothers survive the deadly conflict between them?

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: When a U.S. Marshal arrests one of the Ponderosa's workers for murder and takes him to Los Angeles for trial, Hoss and Adam go to make sure the marshal doesn't kill the accused before they get there.

programme.title: Legends of the Pony Express
programme.desc: Heroic Pony Express riders and station keepers face deadly terrain, hostile Native Americans, and dangerous outlaws to deliver vital mail across the untamed frontier. Their life-and-death adventures unite the country and become the stuff of legends.

programme.title: Cavalry Charge
programme.desc: When two brothers each decide to fight on opposite sides in the Civil War, they never dreamed they would need to reunite and fight together. It is the only chance they have, if they hope to survive a brutal Indian attack.

programme.title: Borderline
programme.desc: In the 1950s, a female police officer goes undercover and travels into Mexico to gain a drug smuggler's confidence. She is in constant danger as she attempts to figure out the details of the smuggling operation, and who she can trust with her life.

programme.title: County Line: All In
programme.desc: The murder of a crooked lawyer on the county line forces two neighboring sheriffs to put aside their differences to take down the killer.

programme.desc: After the death of their patriarch, the Otteson family struggles to cope, and their turquoise production grinds to a halt. Tommy and Danny try their luck at the long-forgotten Montezuma claim and stumble across a hidden tunnel that may still hold riches.

programme.title: The Sundowners
programme.desc: When a dispute over grazing rights to a fertile canyon leads to cattle rustling, the rustling ignites a range war, turning two brothers against one another. Will both brothers survive the deadly conflict between them?

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: When a U.S. Marshal arrests one of the Ponderosa's workers for murder and takes him to Los Angeles for trial, Hoss and Adam go to make sure the marshal doesn't kill the accused before they get there.

programme.title: Legends of the Pony Express
programme.desc: Heroic Pony Express riders and station keepers face deadly terrain, hostile Native Americans, and dangerous outlaws to deliver vital mail across the untamed frontier. Their life-and-death adventures unite the country and become the stuff of legends.

programme.title: Cavalry Charge
programme.desc: When two brothers each decide to fight on opposite sides in the Civil War, they never dreamed they would need to reunite and fight together. It is the only chance they have, if they hope to survive a brutal Indian attack.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: While volunteering with kids in the community, Cody makes a connection with a possible buyer for his specialty cattle sale. With Booger still away at the Road to the Horse competition, Cody and Bubba recruit a friend to help with the work on the ranch. Cody rushes to finish up for the day, determined to make it home in time for his son's first haircut, but in his haste, he ends up hurting himself. Bubba visits an organic ranch in Texas to learn more about the organic business. To test the product, he cooks up store brand and grass-fed steaks to compare the taste and make sure it is something he can get behind. Booger finally gets home after the competition and immediately receives an opportunity to train horses in Austin. After spending some time apart, the cowboys come together to talk about the future of their partnership. Things take a turn for the worse when the meeting between friends gets heated, leaving the fate of their business up in the air.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: When their conversation about their partnership hits a wall, each cowboy decides to branch out and focus on their individual pursuits. Booger completes a job for an acquaintance who asks him to find a horse for his teenage granddaughter. The search for the right horse proves to be challenging, but he finally finds one gentle enough for an amateur rider. The experience reminds Booger of how passionate he is about working with horses, and he decides to accept the offer to train them in Austin. Struggling to find buyers for his specialty cattle sale, Cody meets with the Cattle Association Board to pitch the specialty sale to them and secure buyers. Bubba heads north to show the investors a location for the organic ranch, but when they don't show up, he starts to wonder if this deal was a big mistake. Booger, Cody, and Bubba meet up and decide to sell off their entire herd, officially putting their partnership on hold. Jaclyn comes up with a plan to mend Booger and Cody's friendship.

programme.title: Handcrafted America
programme.desc: Host Jill Wagner travels the country on a quest to find talented craftsmen who still make incredible items by hand. In Englewood, Colorado, Jill meets an acclaimed team of belt buckle makers. These artisans use any material they can, including sand and minerals, to adorn their custom Western themed products. Up north, in Montpelier, Vermont, Jill meets Jonathan Herz who has single-handedly revived the lost sound and style of 19th century music boxes. Finally, in Shelburn, Indiana, Jill is on hand to see legendary knife maker Tony Bose craft one of his highly sought after pocketknives.

programme.title: State Plate
programme.desc: Host Taylor Hicks heads to Virginia for a State Plate stunner that brings to light not one, but three entrees, along with an appetizer and dessert. Virginia has a plentiful peanut crop, so Taylor follows their journey from field to table with an appetizer of peanut soup. Then, 10,000 miles of shoreline leads him to the first entree: a surprisingly entertaining fish known as the sugar toad. There's no way Taylor can pass up the second entree: a helping of Virginia country ham. Virginia is also known as the flounder capital of the world, so Taylor heads to its eastern shore for the third entree of bronzed flounder. When it's time for dessert, Colonial Williamsburg serves Taylor a hefty dose of history in a sweet mug of colonial chocolate.

programme.title: They Call Me Trinity
programme.desc: When a land-hungry rancher sends his bullies to harass peace-loving Mormons into giving up their fertile valley, a lazy gunfighter with a very quick draw and amazing accuracy, along with his horse-thieving brother, come to the settlers' rescue.

programme.title: The Young Land
programme.desc: When an American gunslinger kills a Mexican man in California immediately in the aftermath of the Mexican-American War, he is arrested and put on trial for murder. The local population is anxious to see if justice will prevail.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: It's time for the cowboys to ride into new pastures as they explore growing their cattle business in unexpected ways. Bubba has been making good money working for his father-in-law's company in Mississippi, but he realizes he'd rather be out of his office chair and back on his horse in Alabama. Cody is excited to be managing a big rodeo, but a steer mishap puts the future of his contract on the ropes. And, even though Booger has happily saddled up with Jaclyn, it's unfamiliar terrain for him when she starts adding a woman's touch to his bachelor pad. As the three cowboys get together to sort yearlings for a friend, they devise a plan for making BBQ sauce to expand their cooking skills and company.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: Booger and Cody team up to pen a herd of cattle, but a stubborn cow takes refuge in a fishing hole, requiring some creative wrangling. The stress of maintaining a long-distance relationship leads Bubba and Kaley to move back to Alabama for good. Booger embraces his new role as a family man and enlists young Matthew to help surprise Jaclyn with a much needed home-improvement project. Cody helps Misty throw a beef-tasting party for potential buyers. As the guys ponder using their cowboy skills to open a steak house, they decide to get some on-the-job training by working a shift during the hectic dinner rush at a local eatery.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: An inspector comes from New Orleans to Virginia City intending to arrest Ben Cartwright for a murder committed 20 years ago. Ben now must travel to New Orleans to stand trial and considers withdrawing from the governor's race.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: As U.S. Marshal Bass Reeves attempts to arrest Belle Starr and her outlaw husband, Belle asks for 24 hours to find someone to care for her young daughter, Pearl. When the Starr family decides to flee instead, the Marshal must track them down.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: Teenaged fugitive William Bonney is given a second chance when a kindhearted ranch owner offers him a job. But when his new employer is killed in cold blood, Bonney reverts to his criminal ways, seeking vengeance and transforming into Billy the Kid.

programme.title: Into The Wild Frontier
programme.desc: Legendary frontiersman Daniel Boone faces the biggest challenge of his life when the Shawnee take him prisoner. He must find a way to escape and travel 160 miles through hostile territory to warn Boonesborough, and his family, of a looming attack.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: An inspector comes from New Orleans to Virginia City intending to arrest Ben Cartwright for a murder committed 20 years ago. Ben now must travel to New Orleans to stand trial and considers withdrawing from the governor's race.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: As U.S. Marshal Bass Reeves attempts to arrest Belle Starr and her outlaw husband, Belle asks for 24 hours to find someone to care for her young daughter, Pearl. When the Starr family decides to flee instead, the Marshal must track them down.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: Teenaged fugitive William Bonney is given a second chance when a kindhearted ranch owner offers him a job. But when his new employer is killed in cold blood, Bonney reverts to his criminal ways, seeking vengeance and transforming into Billy the Kid.

programme.title: Into The Wild Frontier
programme.desc: Legendary frontiersman Daniel Boone faces the biggest challenge of his life when the Shawnee take him prisoner. He must find a way to escape and travel 160 miles through hostile territory to warn Boonesborough, and his family, of a looming attack.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: While visiting family in Mississippi, Cody secures prize cattle for his specialty sale, but one small mistake puts the deal in jeopardy. In anticipation of their move north, Bubba and Kaley visit their favorite places around town and take a trip down memory lane. Bubba breaks the news to his mother about the organic farm. After he catches her up on his current situation with the other cowboys, she encourages him to make things right. Booger heads to Austin, where he learns how to work with English-style horses and receives an offer to train horses for the entire summer. Booger returns home and gets a big surprise when Jaclyn introduces him to their newest family member. Cody reaches out to Booger and Bubba to get them all together so they can make amends and work out their differences. The cowboys consider taking a big job in Texas and working together again.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: After all the time and effort Cody and Misty spent on preparing and organizing, the day of their specialty cattle sale finally arrives and proves to be a huge success. Jaclyn is hesitant about Booger spending the summer training horses in Austin. Following Misty's advice, he decides to take Jaclyn and Matthew on a trip to the Lone Star State so he can show them what a great experience it could be for the entire family. Bubba's deal to start an organic ranch up north falls through, but with the investors still interested in working with him, a new opportunity presents itself. Cody, Booger, and Bubba get back in the swing of things and head to Texas for a grueling cattle drive. With the help of Booger, Kaley surprises Bubba with an exciting announcement that could change their lives.

programme.title: Handcrafted America
programme.desc: Host Jill Wagner travels the country on a quest to find talented craftsmen who still make incredible items by hand. Jill starts in Hilo, Hawaii where she meets Leilehua Yuen, a metal torch maker. Leilehua shows Jill the techniques she learned from her father that she continues to use today. In Denver, Colorado, Jill meets Phil Watkins, a traditional stained glass creator that is carrying on a centuries old family artistry. Finally, in Austin, Texas, she visits Davis and Franz Blanchard, a father and son team who create a special wind chime for Jill with a decidedly Texas melody.

programme.title: State Plate
programme.desc: Taylor heads to Indiana, known for its farmland, Americana and sports. First stop, county-fair comfort food: corn dogs. Taylor tries being a dog dipper with local cornmeal batter before digging in. He then heads from fair food to fine fare with an entree of one of the Hoosier State's top products: duck. Taylor helps cook a succulent duck breast served atop duck confit, cooked with liquid gold (duck fat) and topped with duck sauce, a gourmet treat. Then it's off to the farm for world class fresh corn on the cob, a picnic favorite. Plus, he'll make time for Indiana's other iconic crop, tomatoes, turned into a tasty side freshly stewed. And for dessert, Taylor helps make a depression era staple, sugar cream pie with a little sweet, a little dairy and a lot of love.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Tom Edwards is in a wheelchair and holds Ben Cartwright responsible for his condition. When Tom turns to drinking to ease his pain, the Cartwrights work together to help him find purpose in his life again.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: After escaping the bonds of slavery, Bass Reeves takes refuge among the indigenous people of The Indian Territory, where he is welcomed into their culture. When the Civil War ends, his new-found tracking skills and fluency in native languages lead to his appointment as the first Black Deputy U.S. Marshal west of the Mississippi River. Though he faces discrimination from his peers, Reeves earns their respect when he accepts Judge Isaac Parker's daunting order to hunt down one of the most ruthless killers in The Indian Territory and bring him back dead or alive. Some years later, Bat Masterson, legendary gunfighter-turned-newspaperman, interviews Judge Parker to learn more about the amazing career of Bass Reeves, who goes on to arrest 3,000 felons, kill 14 men in self-defense, and complete 32 years of service without being wounded.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: Wild Bill Hickok and his buddy, Davis Tutt, see their friendship fall apart over gambling debts and the affections of a beautiful woman. After Tutt swipes Wild Bill's prized timepiece as payback for a disputed debt, things begin to heat up. Then, when Tutt parades through town with the watch in one hand and Hickok's former girlfriend in the other, Wild Bill's blood begins to boil. Tutt refuses to return the watch, and he continues to flaunt the beautiful woman on his arm. The two men meet in the middle of town to settle their differences once and for all in what will become the very first quick-draw duel of the Old West. Both men reach for their pistols at the same time and fire! In an attempt to separate the truth from the fiction, Bat Masterson, legendary gunfighter-turned-newspaperman, interviews George Ward Nichols, the journalist who immortalized the duel and created the legend of Wild Bill Hickok.

programme.title: Into The Wild Frontier
programme.desc: Coming of age on the frontier, young Bill Hamilton joins Old Bill Williams on an epic adventure during the final days of the fur trade. The last true mountain man, Hamilton's courage is tested when he faces an epic showdown with Bannock warriors.

programme.title: Ultimate Cowboy Showdown
programme.desc: After demonstrating their calf-roping skills, the 8 remaining cowboys are challenged to drive a herd of cattle and an old-fashioned chuck wagon across the rugged Arizona terrain. Host Trace Adkins and his expert judges send another cowboy packing.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: Bubba's back in the saddle with the guys when his horse bucks and throws him on a bone-breaking fall, fractures his cowboy spirit and immobilizes his work with the cattle company. Booger enlists a bullfighter to help him wrangle his ornery Brahman cattle, and considers whether or not he has enough land to maintain the growing herd. Misty gives Cody a gift from the heart that captures both their past as a couple and honors their growing family legacy as ranchers. The guys pitch each other competing ideas for their future steakhouse, and Cody's brainstorm stands out as the one with true cowboy vision - including a name for their venture.

programme.title: Keeping up with the Joneses
programme.desc: Little Milton goes to school. For a boy growing up as the only kid within Coo-ee, a day at school is a special event. Cristina’s not sure how her independent little cowboy will go.

programme.title: Keeping up with the Joneses
programme.desc: Cristina Jones is pregnant! The Outback is a long, long way from medical help, so Cristina takes Milton and Little Milton 3,000 kilometers to Brisbane for scan to be safe.

programme.title: Guide to the Good Life
programme.desc: In this episode of Guide to the Goodlife, Nicky is at Emma Gorge in the Kimberley. Andrew tests his driving skills, and Snowy dazzles us with his zucchini flowers and lemon risotto.

programme.title: Guide to the Good Life
programme.desc: In Episode 1 Nicky explores the spectacular Blue Mountains, Andrew gets down to the nitty gritty of car collecting, Snowy shows us his amazing Snowy burger. And introducing Dr. Mel and the wild and wacky world of fly ball.

programme.title: Guide to the Good Life
programme.desc: Nicky visits Bruny Island off the coast of Tasmania, Snowy shows us his authentic home style fish curry, we discover the perfect backyard garden, when you don’t actually have a back yard, and gold fever as Andrew gets the prospecting bug.

programme.title: Guide to the Good Life
programme.desc: In episode 3, the story behind some stunning quilts, the rock star spreading a heart felt message, Snowy shows us how to make cheese at home, and meet a group of women in whose case countless stitches are saving many very special lives.

programme.title: Guide to the Good Life
programme.desc: Nicky is in Wilpena Pound for an aerial flight over Lake Eyre, Andrew meets the clown doctors who dish out the best medicine of all, Snowy's recipe for a delectable mousse, and Shawy scales new heights as he explores high-rise gardens.

programme.title: Guide to the Good Life
programme.desc: We visit The Valley of The Kings where many of the Egyptian Pharaohs and their magnificent treasures were buried, Andrew has a heart-stopping adventure, and Dr Mel tackles some common myths and misconceptions about pets.

programme.title: Guide to the Good Life
programme.desc: In episode 6 Nicky is cruisin’ down the River Nile, Snowy shows us an exotic Vietnamese steamboat, and Dr Caroline tackles her fear of heights.

programme.title: Guide to the Good Life
programme.desc: in episode 7 Nicky is down at Hobart’s famous weekly Salamanca Market, Coxy joins us as special guest presenter, Snowy shares his nutty recipe for the perfect pasta and Tony shows us a gorilla-proof garden.

programme.title: Guide to the Good Life
programme.desc: In episode 8 Nicky visits the famed domes of the Bungle Bungle Range, Andrew brews up a storm with a few mates, Snowy shows us a fragrant red beef curry and we talk to Doctor Caroline on why being happy can keep us healthy.

programme.title: Guide to the Good Life
programme.desc: Sun, sand and sea … this is one spot you’ll definitely want to visit. Also this episode, Nicky finds out how to bring our wardrobes to life, and it’s back to school for Doctor Mel as she meets some dedicated two and four-legged volunteers.

programme.title: Guide to the Good Life
programme.desc: In episode 10, Coxy puts his hand up to go to Canada and can’t wait to show you around. Also this week Snowy’s super easy and hearty Brazilian bean soup and the benefits of weight training at any age.

programme.title: Guide to the Good Life
programme.desc: Andrew explores a beautiful seaside town with a feast of things to see and do, Snowy transforms humble rhubarb into an amazing desert, we look at uncovering the secrets of your family tree, and how to turn your garden into an edible oasis.

programme.title: Mercurio's Menu
programme.desc: With the surf and sun as a backdrop, Paul’s going “bananas” in pursuit of fabulous food on Queensland’s Sunshine Coast. Known for its organic produce, there’s a stunning array of local fresh ingredients on offer.

programme.title: Mercurio's Menu
programme.desc: Paul visits the home of Australia’s high country cattlemen and The Man From Snowy River, seeking out free-range chickens, hand-picked olives, apples and hazelnuts plus some of the best beef around.

programme.title: Mercurio's Menu
programme.desc: Paul goes topless in the tropical paradise of Townsville to fish for barramundi and prawns, enjoy some uniquely flavoured ice-cream and find out why sugar means big business in these parts.

programme.title: Mercurio's Menu
programme.desc: Welcome to outback Queensland and a true Australian food experience not to be missed. Paul visits outback cattle stations Wambiana and Mungalla and helps out a a Kup Murri cook-off between groups of Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islanders.

programme.title: Mercurio's Menu
programme.desc: Paul returns to the Hunter to uncover a whole lot more in this famous wine region. It’s avocado harvest season and Paul lends a hand, learns the art of pasta making and meets some very happy feathered friends on a free range poultry farm.

programme.title: Mercurio's Menu
programme.desc: Paul travels across this beautiful and diverse Gipplsland region of Victoria, to check out the booming fishing industry and find out about organic lamb farming. Plus it’s asparagus harvest time and there’s an eel encounter to be had.

programme.title: Mercurio's Menu
programme.desc: Paul meets up with expert cook Carol Selva Rajah for a visit to Sydney’s Cabramatta which is known as “Little Asia” and where the amazing flavours and tastes from six Asian countries come together.

programme.title: Mercurio's Menu
programme.desc: Just an hour from Melbourne, the Mornington Peninsula is a world away from the hustle of city life. Paul’s discovering some unique and colourful vegetables, organic pork, Wagyu beef steak and best of all, the art of fine chocolate making.

programme.title: Mercurio's Menu
programme.desc: Episode 6 KANGAROO ISLAND, SOUTH AUSTRALIA On this rugged, isolated island, Paul discovers a legacy of family food producers showing real imagination. From goose farming to rare bees, Paul is here to discover it all.

programme.title: Mercurio's Menu
programme.desc: Paul visits New Zealand’s capital, Wellington where he takes a half-day tour to discover the best places to eat and drink in this compact city. Then out of the city he meets local fisherman, lamb growers and enjoys a wine and food fair.

programme.title: Mercurio's Menu
programme.desc: The beautiful Tweed Valley region stretches from the Northern NSW border down to Byron Bay, and Paul is visiting to discover the Finger Lime citrus fruit and a tea plantation plus there’s plenty of local fish just waiting to be caught.

programme.title: Mercurio's Menu
programme.desc: Paul’s on the coast an hour from Melbourne in search of mussels, snails of the sea (abalone), fine fresh fish, boutique goats cheese, and some beautiful blueberries.

programme.title: Dr Lisa to the Rescue
programme.desc: There will be no shortage of dog sitters if Lisa can find the first dog for a family of seven, but it's going to be a challenge to get everyone to agree.

programme.title: Dr Lisa to the Rescue
programme.desc: Cassandra and Andrea are ready for a pet, but neither of them has owned a dog before so they definitely need Dr Lisa's help.

programme.title: Dr Lisa to the Rescue
programme.desc: A couple of outdoor adventurers ready for another rescue dog ask for Dr Lisa's help to find them one that will suit their lifestyle.

programme.title: Dr Lisa to the Rescue
programme.desc: Lisa extends some extra help to pet lovers who are looking to adopt a dog.

programme.title: Dr Lisa to the Rescue
programme.desc: Noelle and Luke have been living in an apartment, but with three children it was time for a house with a backyard and …a dog to play in that backyard! Can Dr. Lisa Chimes find them the perfect dog?

programme.title: Dr Lisa to the Rescue
programme.desc: Single mum Jenny and her three kids live in a rented house with a big backyard and son Harrison wants a dog. The backyard is in need of repair and the family can’t decide on what sort of dog to get. Can they all agree on the one dog?

programme.title: Dr Lisa to the Rescue
programme.desc: Jo is a single mum with two little girls, she’d like a dog as part of their family. Jo loves running and would love a dog that can join her, but having two small girls a smaller dog might be better. Can Dr. Lisa find the right dog?

programme.title: Dr Lisa to the Rescue
programme.desc: Lisa and Stuart are hoping to find a playmate for their daughter, Roxy. Roxy has a list of things that she requires in her new ‘bestie’, but are they achievable? Dr. Lisa will search high and low to find Roxy her little friend.

programme.title: Dr Lisa to the Rescue
programme.desc: This family of four have four completely different ideas on what sort of dog they want. Dr. Lisa has her hands full! Can she find the dog for them?

programme.title: Dr Lisa to the Rescue
programme.desc: Dr. Lisa is given the job of finding a new family member for Cade & Matthew, still grieving the loss of their beautiful dog Callie. They want to find a new dog to join their family and help them heal the hurt.

programme.title: Dr Lisa to the Rescue
programme.desc: Cheyne and Danielle live with a small menagerie, and want to add a dog to their blossoming family. With a sheep, and with four chickens running around in the backyard Dr. Lisa will need to keep her wits about her to find the right fit.

programme.title: Dr Lisa to the Rescue
programme.desc: Career woman Kylie lives in an inner city apartment but wants some four legged company. Kylie has places to walk a new friend, but will Dr. Lisa give her the OK to have a dog in a small apartment? How do dogs cope in such an environment?

programme.title: Wild Life of Tim Faulkner
programme.desc: Tim and longtime friend and fellow Reptile Park worker Obi put their lives on the line all in the name of love as they enter the cassowary enclosure. A call out to a local factory ends in another Peregrine Falcon rescue for Tim.

programme.title: Wild Life of Tim Faulkner
programme.desc: In the NT Tim visits Kakadu and then a wildlife park dedicated to crocodiles. Back at the reptile park Cameron the cormorant’s life is on the line after swallowing discarded litter and Tim introduces an array of amphibians.

programme.title: Wild Life of Tim Faulkner
programme.desc: Tim ventures out for a bit of night hunting for crocs. At the park he discovers a Tiger Snake has added to the brood. A Galapagos Tortoise is put on the scales before rookie keeper Kyle is put through his paces with his first croc feed.

programme.title: Wild Life of Tim Faulkner
programme.desc: Tim revisits Devil Ark to see how the breeding program is coming along. Reptile Royalty settles in at the park in the form of Komodo Dragons Kracken and Daenerys and twins dedicated to nursing injured birds get a visit from Tim.

programme.title: Wild Life of Tim Faulkner
programme.desc: Fun and frolics as the reptile park's yellow footed wallaby clan is caught and tagged. Tim explores the Tasmanian coast and Southern Ocean to see birdlife, dolphins and seals

programme.title: Wild Life of Tim Faulkner
programme.desc: A koala escapes from his enclosure to go on the hunt for love. A king cobra has an issue with its eye that needs dealing with and Tim tours Tasmania's Serengeti and encounters kangaroos, wombats, echidna and some rare feathered friends.

programme.title: Wild Life of Tim Faulkner
programme.desc: Tim spends 24 hours at Devil Ark, the Tasmanian Devil insurance breeding program to ensure the survival and sustainability of the species in the wild.

programme.title: Wild Life of Tim Faulkner
programme.desc: Tim has to administer a dose of antibiotics to the reptile park’s cranky croc Elvis. He heads to central Australia in search of a bird with a head for interior design then goes in search of the iconic Cassowary in Queensland.

programme.title: Wild Life of Tim Faulkner
programme.desc: A family of microbats needs relocating, a call out from a concerned mother sees Tim rescue a wayward venomous snake and Tim introduces his son Bill to a day at the office.

programme.title: Wild Life of Tim Faulkner
programme.desc: Part two of Tim’s son Bill’s first day on the job at the reptile park. The annual removal of gator eggs comes early and Tim heads down under to a cave in Tasmania.

programme.title: Wild Life of Tim Faulkner
programme.desc: Tim heads to tropical north Queensland in search of a tree living marsupial he wants to tick off his bucket list. Back at the park he divulges all you need to know about an Aussie icon and it’s part 3 of his son Bill's day at the park.

programme.title: Wild Life of Tim Faulkner
programme.desc: Two Bower birds in Queensland have Tim in awe then south to Tasmania to discover its three venomous snakes then to the park for the final part of Tim’s son Bill’s first day on the job.

programme.title: Mercurio's Menu
programme.desc: You find some of the best product in Tasmania, from Lobster to beef to fantastic vegetables, milk, cream, cheese. Paul travels through North West Tasmania to discover the cray fishing industry, and how to make an intriguing cray stack.

programme.title: Mercurio's Menu
programme.desc: The Yarra Valley is one of the most picturesque places in the world. It's chock full of family producers and they're doing great stuff like free range pork, garlic, strawberries fantastic wine and some good beer and it's all on the menu.

programme.title: Mercurio's Menu
programme.desc: Alice Springs - Australia’s most famous outback town, is surrounded by some pretty harsh desert. With some local help Paul is going on the ultimate food experience: from beef to bush tucker, camel to kangaroo and a little bit in between.

programme.title: Mercurio's Menu
programme.desc: The High Country may make you think of the goldrush, or Ned Kelly riding around these very hills with his brothers. But nowadays it is also known for the great food regions like Beechworth, Milawa, Bright King Valley and others.

programme.title: Mercurio's Menu
programme.desc: with the Strzelecki Ranges in the north and the wild waters of Bass Strait in the south, South Gipplsland has some of the nation's most diverse countryside - and in between you’ve got wonderful fertile land producing great aussie produce.

programme.title: Mercurio's Menu
programme.desc: From the business power lunch to the romantic harbourside dinner, or the buzzing atmosphere of the city’s nightlife, there is no shortage of great places to eat out in Sydney.

programme.title: Mercurio's Menu
programme.desc: Melbourne is known for its amazing food, art, sport, music and beautiful gardens. Paul shows you the sites around his home city.

programme.title: Mercurio's Menu
programme.desc: If you’re looking for pristine coastline, brilliant cuisine, fun, adventure and excitement then Queensland Sunshine Coast is the place to be.

programme.title: Mercurio's Menu
programme.desc: Bordered by the Spencer Gulf to the east and the Great Australian Bight to the west, the Eyre Peninsula’s major towns of Port Lincoln, Whyalla and Ceduna form a triangle of tourism.

programme.title: Mercurio's Menu
programme.desc: Canberra is the political centre of Australia. On top of this it boasts some wonderfully diverse produce such as Galloway beef, heritage apples, a plethora of home grown fruit and vegetables, hazelnuts and some beautiful smoked meats.

programme.title: Mercurio's Menu
programme.desc: Here’s a question for you, which Australian town doesn’t actually grow the fruit it’s named after? The answer, Orange. It does however grow over 170 varieties of apples, berries, figs and stone fruit.

programme.title: Mercurio's Menu
programme.desc: The Victorian town of Daylesford is best known for its day spas, mineral springs and romantic holiday destinations. It is now quickly being recognised as a real foodies paradise where you can go for a true paddock plate experience as well.

programme.title: Tattoo Tales
programme.desc: Step inside a busy Bondi tattoo studio where tourists, backpackers and local hipsters flock to get inked. A brother and sister remember Mum and a Russian burlesque dancer shocks the staff.

programme.title: Tattoo Tales
programme.desc: Grand Final day in Bondi sees Brit boys mixing it up with quirky tatts and belly bling, a young Mother’s first time braving the needle and a visit from the studios eldest client – an 83 year old grandmother.

programme.title: Tattoo Tales
programme.desc: A new father commemorates birth, whilst a heartbroken son laments his loss. A client inspires with her brave attitude, and a recent divorcee gets inked for his new girl - but will their relationship survive the sitting?

programme.title: Tattoo Tales
programme.desc: John and Wendy put a potential new artist through the ringer, as Josh struggles to maintain order. Navy brothers on a mission and a breast cancer survivor marking her courage are followed by a night of hilarious antics.

programme.title: Tattoo Tales
programme.desc: Loud, proud footy fans ink their loyalty, while Aaron celebrates a different kind of faith. Dan helps a client through crippling pain, and as one extreme ink addict sends a message to society, so does ‘glamazon’ Mink.

programme.title: Tattoo Tales
programme.desc: From the guilty to the most innocent – and everything in between. Tensions peak as a staff meeting kicks off a busy day. A baby, a criminal, a heart wrenching loss, a pole dancer, a pin-up, and the biggest tattoo yet.

programme.title: Tattoo Tales
programme.desc: It’s a battle of the sexes for the highest pain threshold. Country girl Cas celebrates her new found confidence, while Rachel mourns her past. A risky tatt for Nan and patience wears thin as the studio is invaded by ‘blokes.’

programme.title: Tattoo Tales
programme.desc: Excitement is in the air with a VIP client. Julie curates her life on her skin, while Shaun helps Sandy through a crippling struggle. It’s a celebration of life, with clients and staff all weighing in.

programme.title: Dr Lisa to the Rescue
programme.desc: Noelle and Luke have been living in an apartment, but with three children it was time for a house with a backyard and …a dog to play in that backyard! Can Dr. Lisa Chimes find them the perfect dog?

programme.title: Dr Lisa to the Rescue
programme.desc: Single mum Jenny and her three kids live in a rented house with a big backyard and son Harrison wants a dog. The backyard is in need of repair and the family can’t decide on what sort of dog to get. Can they all agree on the one dog?

programme.title: Dr Lisa to the Rescue
programme.desc: Jo is a single mum with two little girls, she’d like a dog as part of their family. Jo loves running and would love a dog that can join her, but having two small girls a smaller dog might be better. Can Dr. Lisa find the right dog?

programme.title: Dr Lisa to the Rescue
programme.desc: Lisa and Stuart are hoping to find a playmate for their daughter, Roxy. Roxy has a list of things that she requires in her new ‘bestie’, but are they achievable? Dr. Lisa will search high and low to find Roxy her little friend.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Dr Chris Brown and Dr Lisa Chimes head out to the burnt regions of the Blue Mountains on the Sydney outskirts the day after some of the most intense bushfires on record. The mass evacuations of farms and properties have left animals injured, stranded or in distress. The Bondi Vet team take to the road to help where they can. The last thing Chris expected was to be treating a baby alpaca named Jersey. Jersey’s mother went into premature labour, brought on by the stressful evacuation of the herd from their fire threatened property. Now the new-born Cria (baby alpaca) is listless and deteriorating alarming.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: In this episode of Bondi Vet, Georgie, a small rescue dog, is brought in to see Dr Chris Brown. Georgie has a massive growth on her leg and Chris discovers another lump that is possibly more sinister. she will need an immediate, marathon operation that Chris hopes the dog can survive.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Dr Chris is heading to the Halls Gap Zoo in Western Victoria where Stephanie the Lemur awaits. Recently the keepers have noticed her left canine tooth has darkened and are concerned it is an infection that could become a major problem for the small Lemur, especially as they suspect she may be pregnant.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Dr Chris has received a call from Tim Faulkner at the Australian Reptile Park. One of the parks kangaroo’s has a nasty lump under its chin and Chris needs to make an emergency dash to the park to perform an urgent operation, that is made more difficult as the roo is a mother with young joey.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: “It doesn’t get much better than this” is one of the first things that Dr Chris says when a 4 week old baby lion cub Zambi is brought into the Bondi Clinic. For safety reasons Zambi has had to be removed from her mother by carers Donna and Mandy from the animal welfare organization LOTL (Life On The Line) Rescue. Not only does the young lion require a medical checkup but she also needs a surrogate mother and Dr Chris has the perfect – while very strange solution. No one is sure if it will work.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Chris is in Cairns, a place he loves because no case is ever straightforward in the tropics and he is not disappointed. His first case is to try to solve the mystery medical condition of Snoopy, a Jack Russell terrier, who at odd times suffers strange and potentially deadly attacks.

programme.title: Wild Life of Tim Faulkner
programme.desc: Tim travels far out west to Broome to help an old mate move a 5 metre saltwater croc to its new home. Back on the east coast Tim witnesses one of nature’s greatest sights: turtle hatchlings making their way into the sea for the first time.

programme.title: Wild Life of Tim Faulkner
programme.desc: Tim provides a countdown of the most dangerous jobs at the Australian Reptile Park before introducing us to Reggie and Russell, two orphaned kangaroo joeys he’s helping to raise.

programme.title: Wild Life of Tim Faulkner
programme.desc: Tim travels to one of the last remnants of original vegetation in Western Australia in search of the numbat - one of the world’s rarest animals.

programme.title: Wild Life of Tim Faulkner
programme.desc: Tim delves into a particular Aussie specialty – venom. Discussing why Australia has the most potent animals on the planet before a visit to Fraser Island in search of its most famous resident – the dingo.

programme.title: Wild Life of Tim Faulkner
programme.desc: Tiger snakes are different on Kangaroo Island and Tim just has to pop over to see just how different they are. Later he visits a friend who has been camping out for months researching the love life of the red backed toadlet.

programme.title: Wild Life of Tim Faulkner
programme.desc: Tim visits Kangaroo Island to check out what’s being done to halt the destruction of the island’s manna gum trees by local koalas. At the Australian Reptile Park it’s time to find out who the trouble maker is down at the gator lagoon.

programme.title: Wild Life of Tim Faulkner
programme.desc: There is a surprise in store at reception for Tim and a call out to a python that needs rescuing from up a drainpipe. Tim then puts to bed a number of myths surrounding Aussie wildlife.

programme.title: Wild Life of Tim Faulkner
programme.desc: Tim tours Kangaroo Island to see how the wildlife there shapes up to life in the Southern Ocean. Along the way he encounters seals, goannas an echidna and of course kangaroos before a visit to a bird sanctuary.

programme.title: Wild Life of Tim Faulkner
programme.desc: It’s back to the Australian Reptile Park for Tim’s eldest son Bill. There’s a tiger snake to milk, kangaroo yards to clean and parrots to feed. A call from a friend then sees Tim head north to help an African exotic have its hooves trimmed.

programme.title: Wild Life of Tim Faulkner
programme.desc: Tim journeys up the Dampier Peninsula in Western Australia and finds an amazing array of reptiles on his way. Back at the Australian Reptile Park it’s time for some rogue emus to be relocated.

programme.title: Wild Life of Tim Faulkner
programme.desc: Tim is taken on a journey round Kooljaman, the ancestral home of his old mate Brian Lee. On the way they discover how life was once lived amongst the traditional owners of the land.

programme.title: Wild Life of Tim Faulkner
programme.desc: On a visit to Broome Tim catches up with the local snake catcher who has had a call out to a suburban shed with an unwanted visitor. He then heads south to help the Wombat Wranglers survey …wombats.

programme.title: Keeping up with the Joneses
programme.desc: Meet the Joneses: an ordinary family living extraordinary lives at a vast cattle property called Coolabah in the heart of the Top End.

programme.title: Keeping up with the Joneses
programme.desc: Trevor the Cook wants to make a comeback as a jockey and he’s hoping Milton will lend him a horse. The Wet is over and the land around Coolibah is a tinderbox, one spark and the whole country could go up in flames.

programme.title: Keeping up with the Joneses
programme.desc: It’s the first big muster for the season. Milton’s running three choppers in the air and an army of workers on the ground. Young Jeff wants to fly with the big boys. But he’s got to earn respect on the ground first.

programme.title: Keeping up with the Joneses
programme.desc: The first big muster is over, but someone didn’t make it back home. Milton sends out a search party to track down one of his most trusted workers. Raine takes Jeff on a shopping trip and on the way back…. she picks up a live crocodile.

programme.title: Keeping up with the Joneses
programme.desc: Milton has put a bounty on the biggest barramundi someone can catch at Coolibah. It’s an annual fishing competition.

programme.title: Keeping up with the Joneses
programme.desc: It’s race day: the showdown between Trevor the Cranky Cook and Milton’s sister Terry. The last time Trevor raced was in 1984, when his horse threw him in the final straight. Milton finds a massive python…that has swallowed a wallaby.

programme.title: Keeping up with the Joneses
programme.desc: Bushfires break out at Coolibah. It’s Milton’s worst fear. With the fire burning up paddocks of cattle feed, he’ll have to fight through the night to contain it.

programme.title: Keeping up with the Joneses
programme.desc: The Joneses leave the comfort of Coolibah to spend a few days at the 100th Anniversary Brunette Races & Camp Draft. Cristina’s been training on her prized horse for months. But how will she fare against the toughest cowboys in Australia?

programme.title: Keeping up with the Joneses
programme.desc: Milton faces his worst nightmare. News is radioed through that a chopper has crashed 50km from Coolibah. He heads up a search party to find the wreckage and, hopefully, survivors.

programme.title: Keeping up with the Joneses
programme.desc: Milton encounters a fiery act of nature. Raine gives Little Milton a lesson about the Indigenous people of the Territory. And Milton carries out the dying wish of his mate Buckley. It’s a wake, Northern Territory style.

programme.title: Lee Chan's World Food Tour
programme.desc: Lee is celebrating the Vietnamese New Year as thousands of people line the streets to enjoy song, dance and street style food. Lee soon finds herself cooking up a feast for some hungry locals.

programme.title: Lee Chan's World Food Tour
programme.desc: Travelling back in time, Lee begins her tour like most tourists do – at the Pyramids of Giza. With so much history dating back thousands of years, it’s not long before Lee cooks some of the oldest dishes in the world.

programme.title: Lee Chan's World Food Tour
programme.desc: In France Lyon, is Lee’s first stop. This stunning town offers cooking classes - from Escargot, to trout wrapped in pastry, where Lee soon finds out that cooking French food is much easier than learning the language.

programme.title: Lee Chan's World Food Tour
programme.desc: South Korea is a beautiful country, but in this episode, Lee settles in the capital city, Seoul. South Korean food has its own identity with particular focus on fermenting vegetables.

programme.title: Lee Chan's World Food Tour
programme.desc: Lee discovers Germany, a nation known for its breathtaking countryside and hearty cuisine.

programme.title: Lee Chan's World Food Tour
programme.desc: From the Great Wall to the Forbidden City, Lee tours China like never before. The streets of Beijing serve up a mix of modern architecture and ancient traditions, but nothing is more popular in Chinese cuisine than dumplings!

programme.title: Lee Chan's World Food Tour
programme.desc: Lee is rail hopping, road tripping and tasting her way through Canada’s famous Rocky Mountains. This fun-filled episode has everything from national dishes, iconic drinks and famous sporting games.

programme.title: Lee Chan's World Food Tour
programme.desc: India, the land of spices, welcomes Lee with open arms. With so much colour and spice at the centre of Indian culture, Lee decides to adopt some Indian fashion tips and dress up for the occasion.

programme.title: Lee Chan's World Food Tour
programme.desc: Lee is in Malaysia and heads straight to the capital city Kuala Lumpur. First stop is the famous Pertonas Towers before heading down to street level to sample the weird and wonderful food on offer.

programme.title: Lee Chan's World Food Tour
programme.desc: Lee’s journey in the USA begins in San Francisco, but with all roads leading to iconic sights and destinations, Lee is eventually drawn down to America’s South – for some soul food inspiration!

programme.title: Dr Lisa to the Rescue
programme.desc: This family of four have four completely different ideas on what sort of dog they want. Dr. Lisa has her hands full! Can she find the dog for them?

programme.title: Dr Lisa to the Rescue
programme.desc: Dr. Lisa is given the job of finding a new family member for Cade & Matthew, still grieving the loss of their beautiful dog Callie. They want to find a new dog to join their family and help them heal the hurt.

programme.title: Guide to the Good Life
programme.desc: Andrew risks life and limb on a hair raising ride, Nicky enjoys the sunshine coast on horseback, Snowy shows us his chilli barbecued fish, Paul learns about car safety and Dr Caroline shows us practical weight loss tips that really work.

programme.desc: In episode two we visit the Sunshine coast’s most alternative sporting venue, Coxy and a special guest take us on a tour through Vietnam, Snowy shows us his recipes for romance, and Doctor Caroline shows us how pedal power keeps us healthy.

programme.title: Guide to the Good Life

programme.title: Guide to the Good Life
programme.desc: Georgie travels to Fremantle and finds a rich mix of contemporary culture and history, Colette learns to tow a caravan, Snowy creates a vegetarian treat, and Max meets an enterprising lady working a modern day miracle.

programme.title: Guide to the Good Life
