programme.title: Guide to the Good Life
programme.desc: In Episode Eight Andrew tests out his green thumb, Snowy demystifies vegetarian food with a fabulous soufflé, Nicky meets a lady who makes a living from luscious puddings and Coxy shows us around bustling Bangkok.

programme.title: Guide to the Good Life
programme.desc: Andrew’s leaving no artistic stone, Nicky takes charge on a WA farm, Snowy shares his tips for a mouth watering family roast, and Max digs out the pointy shoes to meets some rock ‘n’ roll baby boomers and check out their “crusin’ B&B”.

programme.title: Guide to the Good Life
programme.desc: Coxy’s on a trip of a lifetime in the Arctic! Also this episode, Andrew meets a lady bringing the taste of Africa to Australia, Snowy shows us how to make tender, juicy octopus and Dr. Caroline helps east the pain of arthritis.

programme.title: Guide to the Good Life
programme.desc: Coxy continues his adventure in the Arctic, Nicky meets a family weaving a bright future, Snowy spices things up with his easy prawn recipe, and Caroline shows us how what is in your shopping basket can make a big difference to your mood.

programme.title: Guide to the Good Life
programme.desc: Nicky travels to the Pyramids, and has them all to herself! Dr. Caroline shows us how three hours of stress busting can have us breathing easy, and Eric shares his finance tips on how we can all live the good life.

programme.title: Just Go
programme.desc: In the very first Just Go episode Rhys uncovers some hidden gems in the Victorian town of Bendigo. Lee learns the secret behind some delicious but healthy food, and Geoff Cox visits tropical Port Douglas.

programme.title: Just Go
programme.desc: On Queensland’s famous Gold Coast Lee explores iconic attractions and dines at a very entertaining restaurant. Rhys tries out a fun, unusual way to get fit in Melbourne, while Geoff Cox takes Lee to see Australia’s magnificent red centre.

programme.title: Just Go
programme.desc: Rhys tours the world-class wine country of the Yarra Valley in style. Lee taste tests a breakfast with a twist and experiences the tantalizing delights of African cuisine. Geoff Cox explores Sydney.

programme.title: Just Go
programme.desc: Lee visit the New South Wales north coast and gets up close to majestic wildlife in Byron Bay, then heads south to Melbourne for a foodie fix that takes her back to her Chinese roots. Rhys and Geoff Cox head to Albury on the Murray River.

programme.title: Just Go
programme.desc: Lee explores the Mornington Peninsula, a destination that offers plenty to see and do, then cooks up a storm Vietnamese style and shares some of her favourite recipes. Rhys and Geoff Cox discover the beautiful New South Wales south coast.

programme.title: Just Go
programme.desc: Rhys explores the Victorian coastal town of Inverloch, finding some high-octane fun. Lee discovers a hidden gem amongst Melbourne’s skyline, while Geoff Cox experiences the beautiful Tasmanian wilderness near Strahan.

programme.title: Just Go

programme.title: Just Go
programme.desc: Rhys shares the secrets of Phillip Island - his hometown on Victoria’s rugged coastline. Lee travels to Alice Springs on the hunt for bush tucker, and Coxy enjoys the Queensland sunshine and plenty of activities in tropical Mackay.

programme.title: Just Go
programme.desc: In this China special, Rhys soars above the clouds on his way up one of China’s most spectacular mountains, Geoff Cox takes in the sights in Tianjin, and Rhys visits Fenghuang, a picturesque city that hasn’t changed in three hundred years.

programme.title: Tony Robinson's Time Walks
programme.desc: FREMANTLE The major port of Australia’s remote west coast, Fremantle began life as a place of punishment. But the ethnically diverse port city has since been the sight of some of Australia’s greatest triumphs… and disappointments.

programme.title: Tony Robinson's Time Walks
programme.desc: MELBOURNE The real story of Melbourne isn’t found in the grand tree-lined boulevards or boomtown architecture. It’s hidden down the lanes and alleyways.

programme.desc: Devonport is just a hop, skip and a jump south from Victoria and offers some of the world’s best produce. From salmon to ginseng, wasabi, carrots, cabbage, potatoes, apples and chicken, you’ll never run out of new ingredients to try.

programme.title: Mercurio's Menu

programme.desc: Paul’s first stop in the Hunter Valley is at Binnorie Dairy where he meets cheese maker Simon Gough. Simon happily shows off his array of cheese making equipment and of course homemade cheeses.

programme.title: Mercurio's Menu

programme.desc: Grand Final day in Bondi sees Brit boys mixing it up with quirky tatts and belly bling, a young Mother’s first time braving the needle and a visit from the studios eldest client – an 83 year old grandmother.

programme.title: Tattoo Tales
programme.desc: A new father commemorates birth, whilst a heartbroken son laments his loss. A client inspires with her brave attitude, and a recent divorcee gets inked for his new girl - but will their relationship survive the sitting?

programme.title: Tattoo Tales

programme.desc: Loud, proud footy fans ink their loyalty, while Aaron celebrates a different kind of faith. Dan helps a client through crippling pain, and as one extreme ink addict sends a message to society, so does ‘glamazon’ Mink.

programme.title: Tattoo Tales

programme.desc: It’s a battle of the sexes for the highest pain threshold. Country girl Cas celebrates her new found confidence, while Rachel mourns her past. A risky tatt for Nan and patience wears thin as the studio is invaded by ‘blokes.’

programme.desc: When Muffy sees a kinetic sculptor’s machines, she brags that she can make even better ones. Then, Vicita is upset at having to trade in her cherished crib for a big-girl bed, so D.W. shares her story of that same rite of passage.

programme.desc: Fern can't wait to climb Moose Mountain so that she can have adventures like Zutzut, the famous comic-book hero! Then, Binky decides to become "No More Mr. Nice Guy" after not getting thanked for saving Rattles from a dangerous stunt.

programme.desc: With the community pool closed for repairs and the temperature on the rise, Arthur and D.W. need a place to keep cool. Then, Grandma Thora takes in a stray: an adorable little dog named...Killer?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: A new girl has arrived in town and no one knows anything about her. And judging by the strange things happening at her house no one wants to know. Then, it's great having a friend spend the weekend.

programme.desc: Muffy's devastated when she learns her great, great grandmother Mary Alice wasn't royalty, but a common maid. Pressure from his classmates has Arthur doubting his decision to call Buster out during a baseball game.

programme.desc: Buster is convinced that Pizza Paula's all-you-can-eat contest is his destiny. But how can he possibly win such an important contest without any sleep? Binky volunteers to look after Francine's cat, Nemo, for the weekend.

programme.desc: Arthur's parents have been married for 10 years and it's time to celebrate! But the festivities are cut short when the van breaks down, stranding the whole family. Will the Reads miss their fancy dinner reservation?

programme.desc: It's a hot day in Elwood City, and a total blackout leaves its residents without electricity! Will Arthur and DW survive without AC and TV? Binky's baby sister Mei-Lin isn't keen on learning to walk and would rather stick to crawling.

programme.desc: When Emily gets the starring role in the preschool play, D.W. is beside herself with jealousy. She should be Little Red Riding Hood, not Tree #2! Then, D.W. and Emily are upset when they get stuck with the blocks at playtime.

programme.desc: D.W.'s on her way to Washington and she's bored by it all until she gets lost during a tour of the White House. Then, when Mr. Haney gives Arthur a sealed envelope to bring home to Mom, Arthur fears the worst.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Buster finds out that his collection of old food makes excellent compost--which makes for even better tomatoes! Then, neither of the Tibble twins has ever won the coveted "Good Behavior of the Week" cupcake award.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: When the Athlete of the Year Award doesn't go to Francine, she makes no effort to hide her hurt feelings from the recipient. Arthur can't believe his parents are hiring a babysitter--he's 8 years old, and babysitters are b-o-r-i-n-g!

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: The circus is in town and the whole family's excited—until Arthur gets CHICKEN POX! Will he recover in time? Then, Arthur's worst fears come true when poor, sick Pal has to sleep overnight at the vet's office. Could it be something he did?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Lakewood Elementary has just instituted IRP; a program where kids can earn points (and prizes!) for reading. Then, Buster and Brain never agree on movies. Buster rates every film a 10+, while Brain doesn't seem to like anything.

programme.title: Arthur

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Arthur and Francine are fighting. But when they get locked inside the library they either have to make up or prepare for a long evening. And when Buster opens his detective agency, he has no idea his first job will involve Arthur.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Arthur's new puppy is exactly what he wanted. He's cute and wriggly, and he follows Arthur everywhere. But training a puppy is harder than Arthur thought. Then, a mere $10 stands between Arthur and the shoes he's been dreaming about.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Lakewood Elementary is sure to win the big bowling tournament on Saturday, but Francine's cousin is having his Bar Mitzvah at the same time! Muffy happily accepts an invitation to spend the weekend in the bustling Crown City.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Does Binky have a favorite pastime? Not until citywide Bug Week, when suddenly all he can think about is butterflies. Then, there's a horrible racket in Elwood City, and it's Francine practicing her singing and drumming for the Talent Show!

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: When shy George wonders if any of his friends notice him, he decides he won’t speak to anyone until they do! Fern volunteers to help an elderly neighbor with his household chores, and then discovers his past life as a Kung Fu celebrity.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Mysterious calls. Superhuman strength. Is Mr. Ratburn secretly a superhero? When Buster and Ladonna bond over a memorable trip to the movies, Arthur feels left out. Has Ladonna taken his place as Buster's best bud?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: It's the duel of the century as cellist Yo-Yo Ma faces jazz saxophonist Joshua Redman in the toughest gig of their careers at the Elwood City Library! Then, will Arthur be exposed as a baby show lover?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: What happens when you combine Greek Mythology with D.W.'s imagination? Then, getting two Polly Locket dolls almost ruins Prunella's birthday party. That, and Francine's bad mood--why, she wouldn't even sing the Happy Birthday song!

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: A blizzard comes to town, taking out the electricity and sending residents scrambling for supplies. Can neighbors find ways to help each other survive through the storm? Then, the unthinkable is happening...Arthur's teacher is moving in!

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: When the comic book store changes owners, the new darker comics are right up Fern's alley, but Arthur can't seem to stomach them. Arthur and Francine enter their pets to compete against each other in the "Perfect Pet" video contest.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Alberto discovers he has a natural talent for golf and begins to compete, but will his dad's embarrassing cheers make him give it up? Buster has lost his flair for funny, and the harder he tries to make people laugh, the worse it gets.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Mister Rogers is staying at Arthur's house! Mister Rogers is a nice guy, but... his show is for babies! Can Arthur hide the visit from his friends? Next, the trouble starts when Fern draws a not-too-flattering cartoon of Francine.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Why is Buster walking backwards and Muffy not talking? They're trying to set world records of course! Then, Arthur thinks his class trip to the Clark Caves will be really cool--but won't it be dark in there?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: During a drought, Francine bets Arthur that her family can use less water than his. The TV show, Treasure Caravan, is coming to Elwood City! Arthur and D.W. are convinced they'll find treasures that will make them rich and famous.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: After meeting his hero, Hollywood director Tufton Sinclair, George is inspired to make a movie of his own. When George accidentally breaks the class's prize woodworking project, Binky gets unfairly blamed.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: The Reads are having a wonderful time at the beach, except for D.W. who simply refuses to have fun. Next, Buster and Arthur make a long-awaited field trip to a dinosaur excavation.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: When Muffy tries to bribe the judges at the school science fair, Francine and The Brain plot revenge. And D.W., a newly-deputized Junior Safety Officer, has a reputation for being a strict enforcer of the rules--well, OK, a tattle-tale.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: When Arthur doesn't fit into his costume for the play, he's shocked to learn that he's gotten "husky-sized." He gets serious about getting in shape. Muffy found the perfect place to take pictures with her new digital camera: the jungle gym.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: When Bud falls in love with a snazzy new pair of boots, he might face his toughest adventure yet - learning to tie his shoes. D.W. gets jealous when Grandma Thora becomes the most popular babysitter in town.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Binky spends the day with Bitzi Baxter and learns what it's like to be a news reporter. Then, D.W., Bud, and Rapty set out to solve the mystery of what really happened to D.W.'s snowball.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: School is almost out and Arthur can hardly wait for those lazy summer days by Muffy's pool. Nothing could ruin such a happy time of year, except maybe D.W.'s Spring Pageant! And then D.W. can't wait to test out her new play set!

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: George is inspired to write and perform his own blues song when he's introduced to the music of Koko Taylor. And, D.W. overhears a mysterious word she doesn’t know the meaning of. Can D.W. risk the consequences of blurting out <"BLEEP!">?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Muffy bets Francine she can't be nice to everyone for a whole week--and soon wishes she hadn't. Next, Arthur didn't mean to tell a lie, he just got stuck in a sort of fib, because he thought it was cool to be a Gleeper.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Francine is excited about a school project, but she's so obsessed with making it perfect that she can't seem to get anything done at all. When D.W. finds a stray kitten, it soon turns out to be a lot more than D.W. can handle.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Business is slow for Mr. and Mrs. Read, and Arthur is concerned. Can he find ways to keep his family in the green? When D.W. saves Tommy and Timmy from a nasty fall, they decide to repay the favor…whether D.W. likes it or not.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: When the gang discovers a list of their class rankings in Principal Haney's office, they are all taken for a surprise. Brain gets hooked on the latest tween reality show and then starts to ignore his friends and his schoolwork.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Pal, Baby Kate, Amigo, and Mei Lin enthusiastically accept Nemo's dare to travel around the world and make it back in 11 minutes. Then, Muffy discovers that web blogging is a great way to keep her readers up to date with her every move.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Ladonna finds out the Army is transferring her dad to Oregon, and the whole Compson family is moving again. Fern and the others can tell Ladonna is upset, but don’t know how to help. What can they do to make the transition easier?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: The family car is broken, and so is Arthur's heart. How can Mom and Dad even think of replacing it? It’s Muffy's annual slumber party, and Jenna is finally invited! But what if the other girls discover that she's an occasional bed-wetter?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Have you ever been afraid of the dark? Despite D.W.'s threat of aliens, Arthur sets his tent for his first sleepover. Then, what exactly happens at midnight, December 31st? There are plenty of rumors, but no one seems to know for sure.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Arthur and his friends go to summer camp where it's strictly boys vs. girls. Next, Buster Baxter is everyone's favorite jokester. Unfortunately, though, Buster's grades aren't as good as his jokes, and Buster may have to repeat third grade.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Muffy is thrilled when mega producer J3 chooses her family for his latest reality TV project. After all, she was born to be star! Buster has just won the best young artist award at the Elwood City Arts Festival.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: All the kids know that George is smart--so why does he sometimes have trouble reading and writing? Then, D.W. is thrilled to be getting an allowance. At last, she'll be rich and powerful!

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Arthur, D.W. and Buster are spending a few days at the beach. Can they save their sandcastle from the ocean tides? Buster's friends have had enough of his sloppy habits, so they band together to educate him on the realities of bacteria.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: A brand-new candy bar is in town! And what exactly is this ingredient called Tri-Enzomated Zorn Jelly, anyway? Then, it's time for the kids at Lakewood Elementary to take the "S.W.E.A.T” test and anxiety is running high.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: When Mr. Ratburn moves Brain and Arthur away from their usual desks, it sets off a chain reaction resulting in the most explosive desk war in third grade history! And, Arthur is 8-years old now—does he still need his teddy bear?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: It's a time of change at Lakewood Elementary as Arthur and Buster move up to 4th grade. D.W. and Bud prepare to enter kindergarten and Muffy and Francine contemplate how spending the summer away from each other will affect their friendship.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: D.W.'s beloved bird gets very sick, and despite D.W.'s eager ministrations, Spanky dies. Can she risk giving her heart to another pet? Then, Buster doesn't have time for Arthur. And all he wants to talk about is a new friend named Mike.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Francine is sure she will be a star at circus camp. How hard could it be? Then, George is always more than happy to lend his pals whatever they need. But Buster's borrowing gets out of control.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: At the Elwood City Picnic, Prunella pretends she can see the future at her fortune telling booth. The Lakewood Elementary soccer team has had enough of Francine's bossy behavior.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: When Mr. Ratburn challenges the class to find the perfect food for surviving on a desert island, everyone picks potato chips or ice cream! D.W. is told a secret and quickly learns that keeping one is a lot harder than she thought.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Struggling with a school assignment, Arthur decides that his regular life is just too boring to write about. And, Arthur is the only one who believes in the superior intelligence of his dog. But even Arthur gets confused when Pal runs away.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Muffy wants a Bouncy Castle at her party, but when her favorite cherry tree is cut down to make room for it, she starts to have regrets. Francine and Muffy scheme to set up their older siblings Chip and Catherine, but plans go awry.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: When Arthur discovers that Grandma Thora is a marbles champion, he trains with her so he can beat all his friends. Then, Brain doesn't believe in superstitions, so when he has a string of bad luck, he's stunned.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: With the help of a little time travel, Buster turns back the clock to see what his life would be like if he were a genius. Arthur isn't happy when he discovers that Buster has been telling him some white lies, just to spare his feelings.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: After visiting The Elwood City Times, Francine decides to start her own paper--The Frensky Star! The tabloid is a success--until all her friends stop speaking to her. Somebody stole D.W.'s backpack!! Who is this fluffy unicorn thief?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Will Fern give up her dreams of being a writer just because of one silly rejection? Buster tells the story of a missing cereal box on his all-new podcast. Will he be able to find the thief--and in the process--the truth?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Pal is itching like crazy and the culprit is Pepe, an Italian circus flea. Then, Emily returns from her summer in Paris with the amazing news that she's been kissed .... by a boy! Now can D.W. find her own Prince Charming?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: The Tough Customers realize it's time to quit bullying and set out to find a new hobby--but can Molly ever truly change her ways? And Brain starts a chess club at school to improve his game and beat Los Dedos, the local chess master.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: It’s time to celebrate summer! Join Arthur as he takes a family vacation and visits Grandpa Dave’s farm. Then, Arthur, D.W. and Buster spend a few days at the beach where they discover the simple joys of building sandcastles!

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Everyone at school is speaking their own made-up language, and George can't make sense of what anyone is saying. And it's the grand opening of World Girl World, which sells dolls from every country, and every girl in town is thrilled!

programme.desc: In D.W.’s heart lurks one big, gnawing desire--TO GET RID OF THOSE TRAINING WHEELS! Then, can Coach Frensky work with a baseball team where everyone is fighting about who gets to be pitcher and no one wants to practice?

programme.desc: A special episode of Bionic Bunny is interrupted, and Arthur and friends try to remember what comes next. D.W. is excited to be taking care of the class bunny, Larry. But Larry is feeling adventurous and and wanders off.

programme.desc: When Rattles's mom starts dating Archie Vanderloo, Rattles finds himself spending time with his twins, but they don’t have anything in common. Arthur offers to babysit so that his parents can enjoy some peace and quiet in the backyard.

programme.title: Arthur

programme.desc: What a mysterious, beautiful thing a green potato chip is--and D.W. just ate a gigantic one! But then she hears a rumor that they're poisonous...Sure, kids do some pretty embarrassing things, but do Moms have to tell everyone?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Muffy buys all of the books and dolls in the Pretty Pioneers series and invites her friends to join a pretty book club. Mom has new clients coming over and they have a daughter who is D.W.'s age. They're going to be the best of friends!

programme.desc: When Arthur catches Buster sucking his thumb, Buster worries that Arthur will tell the entire school. Tired of doing chores, Arthur and friends decide to invent their own country. Will this kid-ruled utopia flourish or descend into anarchy?

programme.desc: D.W. tells her friends that she's a fantastic skater, but she can barely stand on ice! With a skating party coming up, how will she face everyone and tell them the truth? Accused of being spoiled, Muffy sets out to prove her friends wrong.

programme.desc: Arthur and friends are all faced with seemingly impossible tasks, from fixing a model biplane to babysitting D.W. And, Buster knows he's fun, but he's beginning to feel like he's not particularly good at anything.

programme.desc: In 1870, a gang robs a train and steals a ceremonial Japanese sword meant as a gift for the U.S. President, prompting a manhunt to retrieve it.

programme.title: Twin Dragons
programme.desc: Jackie Chan plays a dual role as twins separated at birth who grow up and cross paths. Two brothers, one becomes a famous conductor and pianist in New York, another becomes a racecar driver and bodyguard in Hong Kong. When the conductor travels to Hong Kong to give a concert, the twins get caught up in each other's business, about which they are anything but experts.

programme.title: Detroit 9000
programme.desc: A pair of Detroit policemen investigates a robbery that occurred at a black congressman’s fundraising banquet.

programme.title: The Dirty Seven
programme.desc: Emanuelle is trapped in the middle of a brutal war, as both sides set out to claim her. Unfortunately for them, Emanuelle is not only beautiful but quite intelligent and uses her charms to seduce the soldiers to gain an advantage.

programme.title: Twin Dragons

programme.title: Detroit 9000

programme.title: Most Insane Female Killers Reacting To Life Sentences
programme.desc: These are the most insane courtroom meltdowns ever seen—from women dubbed “Karens” who committed horrifying crimes and then lost control when sentenced to life in prison. From screaming at judges to attacking lawyers and showing zero remorse, their reactions shocked everyone in the room. Each case exposes how extreme entitlement and cruelty collided with justice. Watch until the end to see how far some people will go when the truth catches up with them.

programme.title: Blue Baby
programme.desc: Blue Baby is a film that follows eight incarcerated youth through a prison alternative known as Boys Town. Their story challenges what people have believed about problem behavior for thousands of years.

programme.title: The Basement Talks
programme.desc: The man is captured and the trial descends into a media circus. The facts of the case are quickly abandoned in the public square as pro-choice and pro-life activists jockey for publicity and try to control the narrative. Away from the cameras and under a strict confidentiality agreement, six opposed leaders in the abortion debate meet in a windowless basement to address the hostile environment that fed the violence.

programme.title: Fame Kills
programme.desc: Linda Sobek is a swimsuit model and former LA Raiders cheerleader who goes missing after a desert photo shoot and just before a wardrobe fitting for comedic series Married with Children. Police must uncover a twisted trail of clues that lead to a killer who claimed her death was accidental - though physical evidence suggests something far more sinister.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime
programme.desc: Water is at the centre of the human experience. The source of life on earth, it is also a place of mystery and danger. For criminals, water is the perfect accomplice for the perfect crime: it erases, absorbs, and carries the bodies, conceals weapons and washes away evidence. For detectives, water is a crafty adversary. It never confesses, forcing the investigators to employ extraordinary measures to discover the truth. Dark Waters of Crime does not simply oppose the criminals and the investigators. It brings into play a third party, powerful, mysterious, and tenacious.

programme.title: Miami Shootout 1986: The Robbers That Ravaged Miami Fbi
programme.desc: In the heart of Miami, a sinister and enigmatic showdown materialized - a real-life nightmare that ensnared the city in a web of dread. Two shadowy adversaries, armed to the teeth with weaponry that defied reason, collided in a cataclysmic confrontation. A storm of gunfire erupted, the air pulsating with the bone-chilling symphony of bullets and the seeping stain of violence. As the city's streets transformed into a gruesome battlefield, the unwavering valor of law enforcement clashed head-on with the malevolent force of their adversaries. The Miami Shootout etched an indelible tale of survival, a harrowing and ghostly testament to the darkness lurking within humanity, locked in relentless combat with the unbreakable spirit of those sworn to protect and serve.

programme.title: The Basement Talks
programme.desc: The shooter planned, rehearsed, and fled the scene. The day before the shootings he went to a range for target practice. The day after he cut his hair to avoid recognition. The prosecution seeks the highest penalty. The jury takes two days to come to an agreement. Finally, the verdict is announced. The six abortion activists are left to do what the criminal proceedings could not.

programme.title: Fame Kills
programme.desc: Melissa Haferman is an aspiring country singer on the verge of a recording contract. She goes missing after traveling to Nashville to record a demo and is found strangled to death with her own rodeo belt. Evidence leads to a man who eliminated the rising star to boost his own twisted thirst for fame.

programme.title: The Prosecutors
programme.desc: The Prosecutors explores the complexities of the American criminal justice system through the eyes of the most powerful person in the criminal courts, the prosecuting attorney. This is more than a series about homicide, these are the stories of dedicated men and women who confront human predators to find justice for the victims of tragedy.

programme.title: I Lived With a Killer
programme.desc: Lefty Guns Ruggiero's granddaughter Ramona knows that life isn't like the movies. When her grandfather's life is made into the Hollywood film 'Donnie Brasco', she makes it her mission to set the record straight.

programme.title: California Cops: Real Bodycam Footage Exposed
programme.desc: Dive into the raw, uncut reality of California's streets, where real police bodycam footage exposes the intensity of law enforcement in action. From high-stakes pursuits to life-or-death encounters, witness the unfiltered truth behind real crime and real justice. Every moment is unscripted, every second, unpredictable.

programme.title: Cold Case
programme.desc: Renowned Black Panther actor Florence Kasumba guides the audience through six unsolved cases, supported by CI experts. 360° virtual imaging places the viewer at the scene of the crime, with film noir aesthetics and chilling documentary sections turning history into a thriller. Accompany Florence as she examines evidence and witness statements, separates fact from fiction, and develops new theories about what really happened.

programme.title: Kids In Prison
programme.desc: From inside juvenile prison, teenager Shawn discusses his life as a gay prisoner inside one of America's largest juvenile prisons. Shawn talks about when he decided to come out, what life was like in his old community, and how it is to be a gay teen locked inside a juvenile prison with 400 other teen boys. This episode also features scenes with a juvenile corrections officer and juvenile prison counselor who are called to a unit due to two teen boys fighting over the affections of another teen boy, and how prison staff handle issues of this kind with incarcerated youth.

programme.title: Kids In Prison
programme.desc: 18-year old Bobby is spending time in a maximum-security juvenile prison segregation unit for fighting with other cellmates. Bobby is interviewed through the cuffport of his cell, where he discusses gang affiliation, why he committed the offenses he did, what his family life was like, and what he hopes for his future. We then see juvenile corrections officers performing a cell search of another inmate's cell, and discussing the contraband found during the search. A 2023 update is provided at the end of this episode.

programme.title: Kids In Prison
programme.desc: We meet a teen prisoner who attempted to jump a juvenile prison's razor wire fence when he became despondent about his life and incarceration. During an interview with the teen from his cell, he discusses a tragic childhood filled with child welfare placements, institutionalization in a mental hospital, and suicidal tendencies. A 2023 update is provided at the end of the episode.

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces Of The Underworld
programme.desc: Villains, gangsters or 'faces' are the men who have made headlines over the past 50 years for all the wrong reasons. Some are household names, some you will not recognise, but the mere mention of these people has struck fear into entire communities. British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld gives a unique insider's insight into these men.

programme.title: Fatal Crimes
programme.desc: Beloved congregation member Rhonda Smith is found shot to death at church. As rumors of affairs begin to swirl, the handsome new pastor and a threatening stranger are just the starting point of an investigation that leads police into the mouth of madness.

programme.title: Cruise Ship Killers
programme.desc: A honeymoon cruise goes awry when the bride Ashley is allegedly blown off a balcony in the middle of the night. But when the weather report comes in for the evening showing no wind, a murder investigation begins.

programme.title: Beyond Reasonable Doubt
programme.desc: Examining real cases and critical events where truth, consequence, and human decisions collide.

programme.title: InJustice
programme.desc: A child serial killer terrorizes the city of Saskatoon; a high school student is tortured to death over the course of a weekend by a gang. The killer, a man who was pronounced clinically dead in an ambulance and later revived, embarked on a string of serial murders six months later.

programme.desc: Today the two remaining South West chefs cook their entire menus again for the judges Prue Leith, Oliver Peyton and Matthew Fort. Joining the judges is Radhika Bynon, a member of the Forest Gate, Womens Institute, a modern urban group of women.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Today representing Wales Stephen Gomes, Adam Bannister and Phil Carmichael are challenged to plate up perfect starter courses for this weeks veteran judge.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Today the three Welsh chefs - Stephen Gomes, Adam Bannister and Phil Carmichael fight it out for the fish course. Experimental chef Stephen is determined to prove himself with a fish course honouring the WIs tradition of preserving.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Its a battle for the main course with the Welsh chefs - Stephen Gomes, Adam Bannister and Phil Carmichael are going head to head. With all 3 chefs paying homage to Welsh lamb; the pressure is on to deliver a main worthy of their veterans approval.

programme.title: Million Dollar Dream Home

programme.title: Million Dollar Dream Home

programme.title: Million Dollar Dream Home

programme.title: Million Dollar Dream Home

programme.title: Million Dollar Dream Home

programme.title: Million Dollar Dream Home

programme.desc: Talia and Ricarda tour Westwood and Century City, uncovering luxurious condos and prestigious estates in pursuit of their million-dollar dream residence.

programme.title: Million Dollar Dream Home

programme.title: Million Dollar Dream Home
programme.desc: Caitlin and Chris are recently engaged and searching for their perfect luxury home in around Santa Monica, California.

programme.title: Million Dollar Dream Home

programme.title: Million Dollar Dream Home

programme.title: Million Dollar Dream Home

programme.title: Million Dollar Dream Home

programme.title: Million Dollar Dream Home
programme.desc: Kristi and Beth are a mother-daughter duo from Anaheim who are on the hunt for an amazing waterfront property. Will Kristi and Beth find the beachfront property of their dreams, or will they go pound sand?

programme.title: Million Dollar Dream Home
programme.desc: Cyndi and David are East Coast millionaires looking to taste the West Coast lifestyle. They will see three fabulous homes in Yorba Linda in Orange County. One of them is a 6-bedroom home with a 100-foot waterslide!

programme.title: Million Dollar Dream Home

programme.desc: We meet Alysia, an attorney looking to escape the cold wet weather of Seattle for the desert sunshine of Palm Springs. She’s about to see three luxury properties in La Quinta, California.

programme.title: Million Dollar Dream Home
programme.desc: We meet Ziba, a stay-at-home enterpriser. She is looking for the perfect home for her and her husband. They see a beautiful modern home in Luxury Bel Air with stunning views and all the bells and whistles.

programme.title: Million Dollar Dream Home
programme.desc: We meet million-dollar house hunters Erika & Sonny. They just moved from Chicago and are looking for the perfect Orange County home for their family. Will these Chicago transplants find the perfect West Coast home?
