programme.desc: After a harrowing event that nearly kills Claudia, she and her husband try their best to move on. Claudia and Marcus then hire a new mid-wife to assist as they prepare for their new child. But they don’t know that Erica is lurking in the shadows, and she wants that baby.

programme.title: Mama's Hands
programme.desc: A woman, who was abused as a child by her mentally ill mother, sets out on a journey to find healing through forgiveness. She discovers that she may be too late.

programme.title: Magic
programme.desc: The story of a young man growing up in Englewood Chicago through poverty, violence, and adversity. Only to climb up and out of it all to become a success in film and music.

programme.title: My New BFF
programme.desc: Jasmine becomes friends with Lisa, her new neighbor and current law student. Their relationship turns toxic when Lisa develops an obsession with Jasmine, putting her life, her friends, and family in danger.

programme.title: In Transit
programme.desc: In New York City, friends Leon and Rollo, live a fast life of drugs and women. From an unexpected mistake in their past, they owe a debt to a well-known drug kingpin. They soon find out the fast money is more than they bargained for, but leaving it behind, will prove to be even more challenging.

programme.title: Hidden Secrets
programme.desc: In this captivating drama anthology, secrets unravel within eight unique stories. In a diverse world, characters from various walks of life confront hidden truths, connections, and sparking unexpected consequences. With each tale offering a glimpse into private lives, viewers are left questioning motives, trust, and morality.

programme.title: Gutter
programme.desc: Raised in poverty, Gutter realizes thriving in this world, means embracing the streets that made him.

programme.title: Gold Digga
programme.desc: Maxine is a thriving maneater that lives a lavish life based on the gifts and material things her string of wealthy men gift to her. When she finds her next sugar daddy, she encounters a big problem; his wife.

programme.title: Conflict of Interest
programme.desc: Gabrielle Winters is a successful Deputy Attorney, married to an adoring husband and mother to a beautiful college age daughter (Asia). Yet, underneath this picture perfect life, Gabrielle is haunted by a ghost of her past. Her life unravels when she prosecutes Donte, a man who could possibly be the son she gave up for adoption when she was 17. Matters only get more complicated once Donte sets his eyes on Gabrielle’s daughter. Can Gabrielle maintain this heavy secret and protect her family?

programme.title: Bad For You
programme.desc: Paris McMillan works as an undercover FBI agent taking down known crime rings in the city. When she meets Liam after a one-night stand, she discovers that he is her next target. Now she has to make the difficult decision about loyalty or love.

programme.title: Bloodline Secrets
programme.desc: Thirty-three-year-old Keisha is engaged to be married to the man of her dreams, Joseph. Joseph believes he’s ready for marriage with the love of his life but his best friend, John, has his doubts about Keisha’s faithfulness. When family secrets come out of the shadows, it puts their marriage and lives in jeopardy.

programme.title: Trap A Fool
programme.desc: After two years of what he thought was a perfect relationship, Jeremiah uncovers his beloved Shay-Shay's "black book" of men. He is forced to realize that her gentle nature was a facade, a calculated move in her "game of fools." Shay-Shay's only loves are herself, sex, and money, and their dangerous game is about to end.

programme.title: Murder on the Blade
programme.desc: Tobin, a young man with a troubled childhood is currently working through his trauma with a professional counselor. Meanwhile, there is a serial killer on the loose targeting sex workers, and several clues are pointing to both him and his troubled relationship with his mother.

programme.title: Murder Gardens
programme.desc: Murder Gardens is the story of Chase Washington, a 19-year-old young man whose world has been turned upside down after he leaves a comfortable home provided by his foster father for a life of crime and corruption that he's introduced to by his older brother Rell Washington. Chase ends up in the middle of a war between a notorious crew of drug dealers, corrupt politicians and local law enforcement. Determined to survive and prove that the brain is mightier than the gun, Chase finds a way to outsmart his new found enemies and keep him and his brother Rell out of prison and a graveyard.

programme.title: Super Bowl Champions - 2006 Indianapolis Colts
programme.desc: The Indianapolis Colts (16-4) defeated the Chicago Bears (15-4), 29-17.

programme.title: Super Bowl Champions - 2022 Kansas City Chiefs
programme.desc: The KC Chiefs became Super Bowl champions for the second time in 4 years.

programme.title: Super Bowl Champions - 2003 New England Patriots
programme.desc: The Carolina Panthers almost won their 1st Super Bowl but were defeated by the NE.

programme.title: Super Bowl Champions - 1986 New York Giants
programme.desc: Phil Simms earns MVP honors and sets a Super Bowl record with ten consecutive completions.

programme.title: Super Bowl Champions - 1987 Washington Redskins
programme.desc: The Washington Redskins erupt in the 2nd quarter, scoring 35 points, & defeat the Denver Broncos 42-10.

programme.title: Super Bowl Champions - 1989 San Francisco 49ers
programme.desc: The San Francisco 49ers become the 2nd team in history to win 4 Super Bowls, tying the Pittsburgh Steelers.

programme.title: Super Bowl Champions - 1997 Denver Broncos
programme.desc: After four attempts, the Denver Broncos win a Super Bowl, defeating the Green Bay Packers 31-24.

programme.title: Super Bowl Champions - 1995 Dallas Cowboys
programme.desc: The Dallas Cowboys capture their third Super Bowl title of the 90s.

programme.title: Super Bowl Champions - 2000 Baltimore Ravens
programme.desc: The Ravens become the third wild card team to win the Super Bowl and the second in 4 years.

programme.title: Super Bowl Champions - 2002 Tampa Bay Buccaneers
programme.desc: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers win their first Super Bowl in dramatic fashion by defeating the Oakland Raiders.

programme.title: Super Bowl Champions - 1994 San Francisco 49ers
programme.desc: MVP Steve Young throws a Super Bowl record 6 td passes in SF 49's win over the San Diego Chargers 49-26.

programme.title: Super Bowl Champions - 1993 Dallas Cowboys
programme.desc: The Dallas Cowboys join the SF 49ers and the Pittsburgh Steelers as the only franchises to win 4 Super Bowls.

programme.title: Super Bowl Champions - 2006 Indianapolis Colts
programme.desc: The Indianapolis Colts (16-4) defeated the Chicago Bears (15-4), 29-17.

programme.title: Super Bowl Champions - 2015 Denver Broncos
programme.desc: The Denver Broncos ride defense's big play to SB 50 victory.

programme.title: Super Bowl Champions - 2005 Pittsburgh Steelers
programme.desc: The Steelers defeated the Seahawks, 21–10.

programme.title: Super Bowl Champions - 1996 Green Bay Packers
programme.desc: The Green Bay Packers win their third Super Bowl

programme.title: Super Bowl Champions - 2018 New England Patriots
programme.desc: The New England Patriots beat the Los Angeles Rams 13-3 in the lowest scoring Super Bowl ever.

programme.title: Super Bowl Champions - 2009 New Orleans Saints
programme.desc: The NO Saints take down the Colts with a 31-17 win in SB XLIV.

programme.title: Super Bowl Champions - 2007 New York Giants
programme.desc: The NY Giants & the NE Patriots decide the NFL champion for the 2007 season.

programme.title: Super Bowl Champions - 2021 Los Angeles Rams
programme.desc: The LA Rams beat the Cincinnati Bengals 23-20.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: One newcomer stares down seven veterans, will their induction into the arena be successful, or will their inexperience find them in the pit? One robot will have a second chance to qualify in the Redemption Round.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: More behind the scenes of the hit series Robot Wars. Philippa gets into the nitty gritty of why competitors choose to compete.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The undercover secrets and un-muzzled action of Robot Wars, see how competitors prepare their robots for victory, or defeat.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: See what happens when little kids become big kids, and toy trains are replaced by chainsaws. Watch the teams as they lock themselves in their workshops, creating killing machines.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Delving behind the trenches of Robot Wars, digging for dirt in the competitors own video diaries.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: A unique, undercover look at Robot Wars Series 2. Featuring exclusive footage from the teams and highlights from the battles.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: An extensive and informative dive behind-the-scenes on the House Robots. Get inside information from designer Chris Reynolds, on what goes into creating these killing machines.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Follow Team Chaos's journey. From humble beginnings to how they ended up building one of the most feared Robots ever to compete.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The first heat of the second Revival Series begins. Robots return from previous series to take on the daring newcomers and each other. Competitors get bullied and thrown around the ring as they desperately try to scrape a place in the finals.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: A tentative start to the second heat ends in carnage as the house robots and competitors go all out to qualify. Shunt delivers the final blow for one contestant.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The third heat shows devastating weapons put into action, being on the receiving end of these could mean elimination for an unlucky competitor. The house robots take on cleaning duties as they remove immobilised robots from the arena floor.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: One competitor draws first blood only seconds into the first round. After suffering severe damage at the hands of another competitor, one robots chance at the finals may be lost.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The last chance for combatants to fight for a place in the Grand Final. With the newcomers outnumbering the veterans, will the first timers make up for their lack of experience?

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: This episode, a new Robot Wars champion will emerge! Sparks and scraps are sure to fly in this explosive series finale. Winners will have to make it through the four-way melees and head-to-head battles to be able to prove themselves in the final.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Newcomers, veterans and a recent President enter the fray in this first Heat of the series. Competitors are eliminated left, right and centre and only the strongest will survive to compete in the finals.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: A veteran only heat features the current reigning Champions, Carbide. Will Carbide’s streak be brought to an end by the other robots, more experienced and eager than ever?

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Even the judges aren’t safe as two robots collide, sending shrapnel through the bullet-resistant shields around the arena. Two very different styles of robot meet in the finals.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: One newcomer stares down seven veterans, will their induction into the arena be successful, or will their inexperience find them in the pit? One robot will have a second chance to qualify in the Redemption Round.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The final heat features only veterans, here for an opportunity to make up for their mistakes in the previous tournaments. Only one competitor will make it into the Grand Finals, and the others must suffer defeat, again.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: After lengthy repairs and inspirational pep talks, the qualifiers prepare to fight for the title. A 10-way Robot Rumble will give the victor a spot in the Grand Finals, alongside the heat winners.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Let the battle for the Third Wars crown commence. With the trials being replaced with all out combat, this series is set to be the most brutal yet.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Teams from across the UK enter the arena in hopes of besting the house robots and making it to the Grand Final. The knockouts keep on coming as eight more competitors think they have what it takes to survive the Robot Wars.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Eight fresh competitors ready to prove their mettle in the arena. Featuring a special event, Middleweight Melee, a single exhibition battle between five robots weighing under 45.4kg.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: As the knockouts continue to streamline the competition, this week’s special has separate competitors trying to knock-down objects and hit targets to score the most points in Pinball Warriors.

programme.title: All My Children
programme.desc: Cecily begins rebuilding her life by opening up about new hopes and possibilities. Jack encourages her progress, while Brooke reflects on motherhood. At the hospital, concern for Erica continues to weigh on friends and family.

programme.title: All My Children
programme.desc: Dimitri stays close to Erica as her doctors offer cautious updates. Maria and Edmund manage work and home demands while Julia supports Noah through a difficult moment. Loved ones await signs of improvement.

programme.title: All My Children
programme.desc: Noah withdraws emotionally, leaving Julia frustrated as they navigate growing pressure. Trevor keeps a careful eye on Janet’s past actions, unsure what may surface next. Hope and worry run side by side in Pine Valley.

programme.title: All My Children
programme.desc: Erica pushes against the limits of her recovery while Dimitri and Julia provide steady support. Hayley and Alec’s engagement draws attention, and questions about Janet’s identity continue to unsettle those around her.

programme.title: All My Children
programme.desc: Adam and Stuart share a quiet moment reflecting on family challenges and past mistakes. Hayley faces uncertainty about her future, while concern spreads as hints surface that Janet may still be hiding nearby.

programme.title: All My Children
programme.desc: Wedding plans continue for Trevor and Laurel while Hayley struggles with stress tied to her mother. Alec hides growing worry. At the shelter, talk of Janet resurfaces, leaving everyone uneasy about what might come next.

programme.title: All My Children
programme.desc: Hayley disappears before the ceremony, leading to a frantic search as loved ones try to piece together what happened. Alec fears she’s overwhelmed, and tension rises as time passes without answers.

programme.title: All My Children
programme.desc: Hayley returns shaken but determined to move forward. Alec reassures her, though uncertainty lingers. Quiet fear spreads as signs suggest Janet may still be watching from a distance, unwilling to let go.

programme.title: All My Children
programme.desc: Maria comforts a patient who is struggling with confidence while she and Edmund strengthen their own bond. Mateo checks in on Hayley as the family works to steady themselves after recent turmoil.

programme.title: Le Samouraï
programme.desc: A professional killer, Jeff Costello, executes a nightclub owner on orders from the mob. He is caught in a police dragnet and arrested, but witnesses fail to identify him. Costello is released by the police, but remains their prime suspect. The mob, hearing of his arrest, fear being involved and order him silenced before he can talk. Using information supplied by his girlfriend, he kills the hit man sent after him. Ultimately, the police corner him in a crowed nightclub where he is killed in a bloody gun battle.

programme.title: Creative Crochet Corner presented by CraftsyTV
programme.desc: Creative Crochet Corner is an online video streaming service all about learning how to crochet! Whether you're a new to crochet just learning the basics or an experienced crocheter looking for a challenge, Creative Crochet Corner is here to help. We offer a vast library of video tutorials taught by talented crochet experts who guide you through each technique step-by-step, sharing their best tips and tricks.

programme.title: Fresh Quilting
programme.desc: Celebrate the creatures of the land and sea. Whimsical quilt artist Samarra Khaja combines colorful shapes to create cute fish faces. Karen Womack shares tips on leading a local quilt guild. Blogger and designer Violet Craft sews a regal lion using English paper piecing.

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: Machine quilting isn't always as easy as it looks, but anyone can do these three free-motion quilting designs (promise)! Learn how wavy lines, starburst designs, and simple cursive words can turn your quilt into a work of art.

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: Angela shares her tips for choosing quick and impactful quilting designs for your pieced creations.

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: In this season finale, Angela does a little flower arranging (quilter's style!) to create Monique Jacobs' beautiful Bouquet quilt.

programme.title: Beads, Baubles & Jewels
programme.desc: India has its own original look, or we should say multiple looks! Whether bold jewel tones, musical metals and bells, or a more mystical element, this is a style easily recognized. Kate Richbourg demonstrates Bollywood bracelets. Then Kim O'Neill introduces us to prayer beads or malas - a traditional tool used to count the number of times a mantra is recited, or breaths while meditating.

programme.title: Scrapbook Soup
programme.desc: It's fun to take and share selfie photos. Amy Tan gets selfies out of the camera and onto artful pages. Ashley Horton uses fancy frames to capture a bit of herself in her designs.Amy Tan has a tip for adding stitches to patterned paper. Julie Fei-Fan Balzer creates a fun photo series from every day activities.

programme.title: Make It Artsy
programme.desc: Just step outside to find artsy inspiration in nature. Calligrapher Janet Takahashi adds floral accents to plain lettering. Metalsmith Mary Hettmansperger adds patinas to copper. Art entrepreneur Jenn Mason captures nature's beauty in mono-stenciling. Julie Fei Fan Balzer has a tip for printing designs with items from nature.

programme.title: National Sewing Circle presented by CraftsyTV
programme.desc: Learn to sew, step-by-step with National Sewing Circle experts on CraftsyTV.

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: WARNING: The following content depicts excessive charm square usage and may be too exciting for most quilters. In other words, Angela's ready to take on 200+ precuts, and the accompanying placement decisions.

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: The Walters household is eating healthy this week, but that doesn't mean Angela's quilts have to be. Today she is whipping up the Milky Way Quilt by Monique Dillard featuring Lily & Loom fabric.

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: The thing about quilting is there's always room to grow, even for the midnight quilter! This episode's all about reflecting on personal growth. Well, that and how to put a modern spin on a traditional block we all know and love.

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: Angela shows you how to make half-square triangles two at a time for a dazzling quilt that's beaming with color.

programme.title: Craft Hacks
programme.desc: Time-saving quick tips to feed your crafting craving.

programme.title: Butter Book
programme.desc: Learn to bake and cook with CraftsyTV.

programme.title: Knit-Along: Socks
programme.desc: Learn to knit, step-by-step with The Knitting Circle experts on CraftsyTV.

programme.title: Woodworkers Guild of America presented by CraftsyTV
programme.desc: First, Dave Munkittrick demonstrates a handy tip for creating easy-to-use sanding pads. Then, George Vondriska and Matt Newborg discuss how to achieve a high-gloss finish on your woodworking projects. Learn to prevent over-sanding and troubleshoot imperfections in your wood surface with their expert tips.

programme.title: Woodworkers Guild of America presented by CraftsyTV
programme.desc: Spike Carlsen joins George Vondriska in the workshop to show you how to make your own timeless, craftsman style table, inspired by Spike's uncle Bob. Spike shares a little bit about the inspiration behind his side table before demonstrating the cuts and assembly needed to bring this simple yet elegant project to life.

programme.title: It's Sew Easy
programme.desc: Technology moved fast during the 1960's and everything from hemlines to rocket ships went up. Angela Wolf turns modern art into wearable art as she makes a color-block mini-dress. Peggy Sagers shows how to design and make the comfortable and flattering wrap dress, a staple in every working woman's wardrobe.

programme.title: Off Our Needles
programme.desc: Cozy is calling! Join the ladies in an ode to warm projects, winter stews and all things bulky.

programme.title: Off Our Needles
programme.desc: The Grocery Girls will show you how to join the sides of your Novel-T. Jodi demonstrates how to pick up and knit the provisional stitches then shows you how to start the lace panel pattern.

programme.title: Hands On Crafts for Kids
programme.desc: It's important to have fun and today's projects are fun to make and to use. Katie creates a fuzzy mustache board will tickle you. Franz and his son, Axel play with paints, pencils, crayons, colors and techniques to find new ways of expression. Jenny and Katie let their imaginations go to create colorful pencil toppers. From the Family Craft Box, add empty paper rolls and colored paper to create a reversible playscape mat.

programme.title: Hands On Crafts for Kids
programme.desc: Today's show is all about texture -- texture is the feel or shape of a surface or thing. It's the smoothness or roughness, or maybe how soft or hard. We will learn about texture with a Paleolithic cave painting, a fun pony corral, and a friendly but prickly hedgehog. Learn how to add texture to your drawings with ordinary things from around the house in the Art Journal segment. Last, make a furry friend with giant chenille stems.

programme.title: Beads, Baubles & Jewels
programme.desc: Stacking bracelets are today's hottest style statement. Jewelry designer Meredith Roddy creates three distinct styles of stacking bracelets to combine or to wear alone. Candie Cooper designs trendy earrings for teens and tweens in Katie's Beading Lesson.

programme.title: Beads, Baubles & Jewels
programme.desc: Change up your techniques and create new styles. Jewelry artist and inventor Jill MacKay changes up her style with interchangeable components embellished with crystals. Katie Hacker combines memory wire and leather bolo cord to create innovative designs in Katie's Beading Lesson.

programme.title: Scrapbook Soup
programme.desc: Every occasion no matter how big or small deserves a card – and today we've got designs for everyday occasions. Today's soup includes lacy pop up cards with a graphic design, some tasty treat cards featuring a lemonade stand with Sara Naumann, and translating a layout into a card with Nancy Nally. Lots of cards and ingredients in one Scrapbook Soup.

programme.title: Make It Artsy
programme.desc: Certain artists are known for pushing the envelope -- they are the innovators or mavericks of the art world. We begin today with Jackson Pollock, an abstract impressionist known for his drip painting which we'll give a try. Then Joe Rotella our own maverick creates coral from film -- a pretty interesting technique. Then Cheryl Sleboda is up next with art as wearables and paldrons created for cosplay. We finish up with Candie Cooper as she cuts up cookie tins to make earrings.

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: This week the Midnight Quilter is busy assembling Easter baskets, and a quilt, of course. See Angela demonstrate how to do a mitered border, plus how to quilt using rulers!

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: CAUTION: Baby quilts are a total gateway drug! Just ask Angela: she's working this cute little number up for her newborn nephew. (Think you can stop at one? Don't say we didn't warn you!)

programme.title: Surfer's Point
programme.desc: What do you do when your daughter picks out a quilt that's way harder than you're used to? Well if you're like Angela, you make an episode about it! This one's all about building up the confidence to take a bite out of something new. (You can do it too!)

programme.desc: Rainbows come out after dark when Angela whips up a rainbow lone star quilt!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The SCL Germany event takes place in an ancient castle called Die Burg in the heart of Germany. Its here where 5 world record attempts take place across 5 different events with 10 athletes. They will go to the max! See this and much more in the SCL Germany 2020.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: With 12 of the world's best athletes arriving in Cape Town, South Africa, all fighting for the crown and final ranking points ahead of the World Finals in Turkey. Rayno Nel still needs to qualify along with Brian Kichton also battling for a seat in the World Finals.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: SCL Norway is normally all about snow, wind, and cold weather. Our brave athletes are used to compete under conditions few other athletes have competed in, but after COVID delays the competition has been moved from winter to summer bringing in a whole new range of challenges. With an impressive athlete list who will be the winner across 5 cruel events?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Were in sunny Finland for the next stage of a double-bill of SCL action, but this time its a team event. A truly fantastic event with 6000 spectators. Even during COVID times this was exceptional! 8 Strong Teams where fighting for the title over a crazy 9 events.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Day 2 of the famous Team World championship here in Finland, done over 9 cruel events. In this episode the last and final 5 events take place. 8 Strong Teams are fighting for the title.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The next set of challenges are set in sunny Esposende in Portugal. With stars such as Travis Ortmayer, Kelvin de Ruiter from Holland, and Ervin Toots from Estonia. While Fabio Silva will defend the honour in his own country.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We are back in Germany, with the world record breakers. We promise you this is going to be amazing. Do not move from that seat, because we are going to see some records smashed today. Over 6 cruel events, you will see who gets crowned of the King Of The Castle!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: With the next episode of Strongman Champions League Germany. Its the world record breakers, and in the last show we set two new records. Can more be records be broken before the king of the castle is crowned?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Welcome to Kokkola in Finland. This city will be the setting for the Lightweight World championship. Out of 24 athletes, only 16 will make it through to the final day, but who will champion each event and who is going to be eliminated?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Its the second day, and the top 16 athletes have made it through to the final round. With another 4 events to go who will get the crown of world champion?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Welcome to Ukraine and the wonderful capital city of Kyiv. Were here for the second time for the iconic truck pull World Championships! The reigning World champion Kelvin de Ruiter from Holland will defend his title.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: In this episode, a final chance for our athletes to get vital world series ranking points on board to give them the best possible chance of success and an initial advantage at the finals. It's the last show before the world finals and the top 10 places are up for grabs, but who will they be?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We are in Alanya, on Turkeys south-coast for the final stop at the end of a mammoth season. Here in the sunshine, well finally crown our world champion and what a place Alanya is - you could not ask for a better setting. Aivars Smaukstellis, the reigning world champion is defending his title, and two-time world champion Dainis Zageris is also here, but with a though competition, who will win?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: What a day ahead of us here in Alanya, just a handful of events to go before we find out who will be the winner of Strongman Champions League in 2021. These are the world finals, and all the big names are in the house. With just 3 events to go - who will take the crown of World Champion 2021 and be the STRONGEST?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We are back, after a short break it feels like we never even left. We’re here in Vaasa - Finland kicking off 2022 new world series. If you are watching at home, just like these people, you’re in the right place. Because this is a special edition world record breaker. The only question left today, is to see how many new world records will be set so stay tuned.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We are here in Doetinchem – Holland, for Stage 2 and 3 in the hottest day of the year. 40-degree heat, these boys have to work harder than they ever have. The sun is going to be beating down, they’re going to be sweating, hydration is going to be key today. I also reckon they’re all going to be wearing their sunglasses. Let’s see which shady looking character wins.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: So there you have it. The next day, 3 more events in 40 Degrees heat. We’ve got Gavin coming into day 2 leading the pack. Kelvin De Ruiter our world champion struggling a little bit at the moment, but Yoke Race, Conan’s Wheel and then Stones to finish. There is a lot to be played for here, so stay tuned to see if Gavin can take the lead and beat Kelvin overall.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We’re in the Serbian city of Novi kozarci, for the next stage in the world series. And what a fantastic line up we have for you again. But it is going to be one of the hottest stages yet. A Strongman competition in 44-degree heat. It will be a real challenge for these athletes to finish this event. From all over the world the strongmen came here for the title! Welcome to the heat hell in Serbia.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Welcome to day 2 in Serbia, and its another baking hot one. We are in Kikinda today! We’ve got three more gruelling events for our athletes. Sami Ahola is leading the pack, so can he be the first Finnish athlete to take an SCL title. Stay tuned to find out.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: In this competition, we have our athletes paired up. They’re going to have to take on each event together, having to factor in each other’s strengths and possibly weaknesses. Can the men who normally work alone, share their powers as a duo? Let’s find out!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Day 2 of the famous Team World championship here in Finland- Joensuu. Welcome to the final day of the world’s strongest team event. The race to be the best team in the world is coming to its crowing point. All is still wide open for any of these to take the title. Who is going to win? Will team Latvia keep their World Title or maybe Finland can attach them? Keep watching and we’ll find out.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Welcome back to Strongman Champions League for another stage of the 2022 world tour. We’re in Esposende - Portugal in this beautiful setting next to the beach in front of a packed crowd with some of the strongest men the world has to offer. With a real Porsche deadlift and many other crazy stuff. So, lets get this show started.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Hello and welcome in Gloucester, UK. The world tour hasn’t been here for what feels like forever. And now for the first time in the Mekka of Strongman, the SCL World series will crown a great Champion with the SCL Title. It will be full with special wooden events, and a great winner! So ladies and gentleman, boys and girls, brace yourselves because I present to you strongman champions league UK.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We are in Sopot, Poland the home of Legends Mariusz Pudzianowkski and Krzystof Radzikowski. Who will grab the title here in holiday resort Sopot, on the great Balrtic Sea with 6 events and 12 athlets in the mix!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We are in Sopot, Poland, after 3 events the Polish Strongman Oskar Ziolkowski is Leading. Kelvin, Travis and Aivars are coming up and will try to beat him, but will Oskar take his first title ever?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: it’s been a long time since the world series held a championship here in Sarajevo. Let’s see what test of strength this destination holds for our athletes. And what fantastic athletes are here again in Stage 12 of the SCL World Series. The strongman champions league Bosnia is another iconic Strongman event with the return of Rongo Keen from Australia and Portugal winner 2022 George Sulaiman.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Welcome to Sibiu in Romania. It’s an important day for some of these athletes, because four of them have a real chance of getting into our all-exclusive world finals. There’s only one more stage after this to get those all-important extra points. So, there’s going to be some fireworks, who will take the title here and who will qualify for the World Finals?

programme.title: World Pickleball League (WPBL)
programme.desc: The high-stakes action continues on Day 9 with the Second Semi-Final of the World Pickleball League (WPBL), featuring Pune United against Mumbai Pickle Power. The air is thick with anticipation, especially with the major news that Mumbai's star player, Brandon Lane, may not be available for the matchup.

programme.title: National Collegiate Pickleball Association (NCPA)
programme.desc: Live from Virginia Beach, this Round of 16 matchup from the NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 features Penn State battling Liberty University for a spot in the quarterfinals. With a bid to the National Championship on the line, the stakes are incredibly high in this win-or-go-home match.The contest goes the distance, pushing both teams to their limits. After splitting the initial six games 3-3, the match culminates in a dramatic Sudden Death Dreambreaker (Game 7). Watch standout performances from Liberty's John McCutcheon and Anneliese Brielle, who fight to keep their team alive, and Penn State's Caitlin Hartman and Theodore De Sousa, who deliver clutch plays under pressure.

Expect fierce play, fun commentary, and standout moments from both sides.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2025
programme.desc: Watch a Mixed Pro Age pickleball match between the team of Shelby Bates and a partner against the team of Rob Contratto and Renee Chang. This video highlights a matchup of athletes with diverse athletic backgrounds. The caption file reveals that Rob Contratto was a professional ice hockey player and Renee Chang played rugby and soccer in college. Catch all the dinks, volleys, and strategic plays as these two teams battle it out.

programme.title: World Pickleball League (WPBL)
programme.desc: The road to the championship reaches a fever pitch at Mumbai's Jio World Garden for the second semifinal of the World Pickleball League Season 2. In this high-stakes "penultimate tie," the defending champion Bengaluru Jawans face off against a hungry Delhi Dilwale squad led by coach Wesley Gabrielsson. Witness a clash of styles as the dominant Katerina Stewart, who has lost only one match all season, battles the passionate Alejandra Lopez in a critical women's singles opener. Tactical brilliance is on full display as Max Mantor and Trang Huynh attempt to dismantle the Jawans' defense in a high-scoring mixed doubles "exhibition". With every strategic "Pickle Play" and intense baseline rally potentially deciding who advances to the grand finale, the atmosphere is electric and the margins for error are razor-thin.

programme.title: Pickleball England
programme.desc: In this Men’s Doubles Open Group C clash, Tom Turney and Sam Chajul take on Jamie Basford and Peter Hitchman. Watch as smart defense, aggressive drives, and well-timed net play define this intense showdown at the 2023 English Nationals. A standout match that reflects the growing depth of talent in British pickleball.

programme.title: National Collegiate Pickleball Association (NCPA)
programme.desc: The grand finale of the 2025 NCPA Utah Regional Championship, the second of six regionals for the season. The rivalry matchup features the top teams from Utah Valley University and Utah Tech.This broadcast highlights the intense Men's Doubles game, where Utah Tech's star player Liam Duffin—hailed as one of the top collegiate players nationwide—teams up with Clayton Boydston to face Utah Valley's duo of Bryce Larson and Charles Case.The stakes are high: teams are competing for $5,000 in scholarship money and a coveted bid to the National Championship in St. Louis, Missouri, where $30,000 is on the line. Ultimately, Utah Tech's first team prevails, taking home the national bid and the Utah Regional title.

programme.title: DUPR Collegiate National Championship
programme.desc: Witness a high-stakes semifinal showdown at the 2025 DUPR Collegiate National Championships as the Texas Longhorns take on the Grand Canyon University Antelopes. Despite predictive analytics giving them a 0% win probability, the GCU "Antelopes" display elite "Skills" early on, jumping to a dominant 11-1 lead against the professional-level talent of the Longhorns. The "Racing" tempo of the match is fueled by a relentless GCU crowd that puts immense pressure on Texas stars like Zoya Khan and Natalie Loo. With the defending champions already sidelined, both teams showcase "Freestyle" grit and creativity in a battle to crown a brand-new national champion.

programme.desc: Fish: the Surfboard Documentary, covers the impact the fish surfboard made on surf culture. A deep look at the origin and impact of the Fish Surfboard design and how it would influence surf culture 30 years later. - A look at what happens when a creative San Diego surfer invents a board with a brand-new shape, and the whole surfing world hops aboard for the ride. THE FISH SURFBOARD DESIGN was created by Steve Lis in the San Diego Cliffs area in 1967, and became HUGELY popular in the 1990's.

programme.title: Angler's Workshop | The Perfect Hair Jig Rod
programme.desc: Jim shows you how to build a hair jig rod, with detailed instruction from one of his Signature Series rod kits.

programme.title: Angling Buzz - Summer Midwest Fishing
programme.desc: It's late June and right now it's primetime for hot river fishing across the Upper Midwest for a variety of different reasons. Number one would be the low stable flows of the rivers, most of the rivers are also running fairly clear. Number two is it puts fish in fairly identifiable areas in the river thanks to the current. Today's guests is Captain Ben Wolfe of Sport Fish Michigan who targets a wide variety of fish throughout the river systems of Michigan.

programme.title: FishON | Biscotasing Lake
programme.desc: Fall fishing on Biscotasing Lake with some of our old buddies.

programme.title: FishON | More Lake Huron Walleye
programme.desc: More of Lake Huron Walleye Fishing

programme.title: Stoked on Fishing — The Ultimate Alaskan Fishing Charter
programme.desc: If you have never been to Alaska before, these next three episodes are an absolute must-see. The crew heads to Glacier Bay National Park, Alaska, to meet up with Alaskan Anglers Inn for an epic week of fishing. This fishing destination is unique in more ways than one. Not only does Shea McIntee and the rest of the crew get a chance to fish for the famous and bucket list fish, wild Alaskan Halibut, due to the glorious summer weather, they also get to see stunning wildlife in and out of the water.

programme.title: Catching Bass | Tiny Topwater Fun
programme.desc: Dustin fishes a finesse topwater bait for bass in Early Summer

programme.title: FishON! | Experience Fishing at Ole's Adventure Lodge
programme.desc: Join us as we travel to Ole's Adventure Lodge on the picturesque Whitefish Lake, just west of Thunder Bay, Ontario. In this special episode, we shine a spotlight on the Experience Fishing program, dedicated to introducing the joys of angling to children, new Canadians, and women. Witness the excitement of first-time fishing adventures in a breathtaking setting that inspires connection with nature and community.

programme.title: Larry Smith Outdoors
programme.desc: This week, Larry hits the Mississippi with Adam Christianson from Adrenaline Angling, looking for some monster Perch.

programme.title: Wired2Fish | Baits and Gear For the Biggest Catch
programme.desc: The team from Wired2Fish delivers the goods on how to catch the biggest fish—wherever or whenever you're casting lines.

programme.title: Angler's Workshop | Building a Bladed Jig Rod
programme.desc: Jim reviews how to build your own bladed jig rod.

programme.title: Jarrett Edwards Outdoors — Spinney Trout
programme.desc: Tightline Outdoors fishing guide Will Dykstra joins Jarrett for an unforgettable day of trophy trout fishing at Spinney Mountain Reservoir

programme.title: Stoked on Fishing | 2.5-Day Party Boat Fishing Trip on the El Dorado
programme.desc: In today’s episode of Stoked on Fishing, we're aboard the 85ft El Dorado, experiencing the unpredictability of summertime fishing off the West Coast

programme.title: Hook n' Look — Chickamauga Chunks
programme.desc: Tennessee River fishing guide and bass tournament record holder, Rogne Brown joins host, Kim Stricker to share grass fishing tips and his developed sense of awareness while on the water. Strike King’s Sexy Dawg walking bait is the featured presentation.

programme.title: Hank Parker Fishing
programme.desc: Fishing legend Hank Parker take viewers to the most secluded locations for the biggest fish.

programme.title: Catching Bass | Salty Summer
programme.desc: Dustin fishes brackish water for bass amd stipers

programme.title: Stoked on Fishing | A Fisherman's Paradise: Stoked on Puerto Rico
programme.desc: Join Stoked On Fishing as we embark on a thrilling 6-day fishing expedition to the enchanted Island of Puerto Rico. Nestled along the west coast, we'll be based in the charming fishing town of La Pargueta and fishing along the west coast locations of Cabo Rojo and Rincon. Get ready for an unforgettable adventure filled with wide-open offshore and inshore fishing. Stoked On Puerto Rico

programme.title: Larry Smith Outdoors | Detroit River Trolling
programme.desc: We're heading over to the Detroit river this week to hook up with our good friend Jason Julien from Church Tackle. We'll be teaching the in's and out's of using his excellent boards to catch some walleye!

programme.title: Angling Buzz - All About Swimbaits
programme.desc: This episode is all about Swimbaits, perhaps the most versatile tool in the tackle box for catching just about everything that swims.

programme.title: Angling Buzz - Easy Fishing Tactics
programme.desc: Fishing can be very high-tech, but on the other end of the spectrum, it can actually be very simple. Today we're going to show you some presentations and tactics to put fish in the boat....easily!

programme.title: Pro vs Joe - Perry's Pond
programme.desc: Brent Chapman delivers top tips on how to catch the biggest fish in the best spots.

programme.title: Pro Vs Joe - South Florida Canals1
programme.desc: Brent Chapman’s Pro Vs Joe South Florida Canals1

programme.title: Stoked on Fishing - Cedros Island Adventure
programme.desc: The next few episodes are special because the crew heads down to the famous Cedros Island fishing for giant Yellowtail, Dorado, and Calico Bass. This trip is nothing new to us; Shea McIntee and the crew have been fishing at Cedros Island for more than a decade and always stay at Cedros Outdoor Adventurers because of their excellent staff, beautiful resort, and fantastic fishing boats and captains.

programme.title: Stoked on Fishing - Epic Five Day Fishing Charter on the Top One 80, Part Two
programme.desc: Stoked On Fishing jumps on board the Top Gun 80 out of San Diego, California, for Stan Vanderburg's annual five-day Rod & Reel Radio charter. We go offshore and have an absolute blast. In part two, we run right into a Yellowfin Tuna school, and the boat goes bonkers.

programme.title: Spring Fishing Tips and Tricks
programme.desc: Learn the best gear and strategies to target the biggest fish in the pre-spawn spring angling season.

programme.title: Lindner's Angling Edge | Primetime Summer Largemouth Bass
programme.desc: Al and James Lindner target Summer Peak largemouth bass.

programme.title: Hobie Fishing - Panama, Part 1
programme.desc: Hobie Outdoor Adventures flies down to the southernmost country of Central America, the Republic of Panama, and heads to a secluded coast with a lush rainforest coastline, where the only way to fish is from a kayak.

programme.title: Hobie Fishing — Austin, Texas Bass Fishing & the Hobie Pro Angler
programme.desc: Hobie Outdoor Adventures goes to Austin, Texas for some bass fishing and then to the BassMaster Classic for insight into the Hobie product line. And finally, we spend some time on the water with the Hobie Pro Angler.

programme.title: Hobie Fishing — Baja Mexico
programme.desc: Hobie Outdoor Adventures heads to Mexico's Baja peninsula looking for giant rooster fish.

programme.title: Hobie Outdoor Adventure - Stripers and More
programme.desc: Hobie Outdoor Adventures heads to the Boston area for some striper fishing before going to ICAST for a new product feature from Hobie Kayaks. Finally, you'll learn more about what's ahead in our adventures.

programme.title: Jimmy Houston Outdoors | Lake Ivie
programme.desc: Cane Pole fishing for crappie and bass.

programme.title: Jimmy Houston Outdoors | Trapped Refish
programme.desc: Jimmy is fishing in Rockport Texas with Baseball Buddies, Trapped redfish in low tide.

programme.title: Jimmy Houston Outdoors | Upstate smallmouth
programme.desc: Jimmy is fishing for smallmouth in the St Lawrence River.

programme.title: Jimmy Houston Outdoors | Bass Pros
programme.desc: Jimmy is fishing with Professional angler Edwin Evers in Oklahoma.

programme.title: Jimmy Houston Outdoors | Windy and hot
programme.desc: Fishing Caney Lake in Louisiana.

programme.title: Jimmy Houston Outdoors | Fishing with chuck
programme.desc: Pro Angler Chuck Stratton is fishing with Jimmy.

programme.title: Remote Lakes, Big Fish, Epic Days
programme.desc: Paul and Perry kick off an adventurous journey down the Ivanhoe River, heading toward a lake that’s known to deliver steady walleye action. But this time, the fish had other plans. With walleye proving tough to track down, the duo turns to the river’s reliable residents—Northern Pike—to keep the rods bending and the spirits high. Surrounded by stunning scenery, flowing rapids, and beautiful waterfalls, this river run becomes more than just a fishing trip—it’s a reminder that the North’s wild beauty always makes the day worthwhile, no matter what’s biting.

programme.title: FishON! | "Trophy Walleye Adventure on Pierre Lake"
programme.desc: Join us as we kick off Season 7 with an unforgettable adventure north of Cochrane, Ontario, on the pristine waters of Pierre Lake. We team up with Mark Froud from Dunn Right Outfitters, an expert in Northern Ontario fishing, to target trophy walleye. Experience the thrill of reeling in massive catches while surrounded by breathtaking wilderness, and gain valuable tips and insights from Mark to enhance your own fishing techniques. This episode sets the tone for a season filled with excitement, exploration, and exceptional angling.

programme.title: Lindner's Angling Edge | Finding Transitional Smallmouth
programme.desc: Al Lindner and Jeff Klozinski spend the day tracking down postspawn smallmouth.

programme.title: Angling Buzz
programme.desc: The Lindner team takes viewers to the best locations for the biggest fish.

programme.title: Spring Fishing Tips and Tricks
programme.desc: Learn the best gear and strategies to target the biggest fish in the pre-spawn spring angling season.

programme.title: Jim Crowley Outdoors - Open Water Crappie
programme.desc: Jim and Kirk show you how to catch big spring crappies relating to bait fish in open water.

programme.title: Wired2Fish | Baits and Gear For the Biggest Catch
programme.desc: The team from Wired2Fish delivers the goods on how to catch the biggest fish—wherever or whenever you're casting lines.

programme.title: Slickfish Radio | Andrew Nordbye
programme.desc: Jim Talks faith and fishing with MLF Pro Andrew Nordbye.

programme.title: One More Cast — Wintertime Tarpon
programme.desc: On a near-freezing Florida day, Shaw catches trout, redfish, and ... serious trophy tarpon.

programme.title: One More Cast — Okeechobee Buzzin'
programme.desc: Florida's weedy Lake Okeechobee boasts topwater buzzbait bassin' at its best.

programme.title: Fifth Gear

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: It's Fifth Gear's tenth anniversary, and we're celebrating by remembering some of our most famous moments.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki races in an event that's the first step to becoming a rally champion.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason is behind the wheel of the the Ferrari 458 Italia. Tiff talks to F1 World Champion Lewis Hamilton.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jonny is at the biggest American car show in the world and judges the prestigious best in show competition.

programme.title: The Son of Zorro
programme.desc: In imperial Mexico, Don Ricardo Villaverde leads a double life as the masked Son of Zorro, defending the oppressed from the cruel Governor Leblanche. When rebels ambush a weapons convoy and kill Don Herrera, his daughter Conchita is saved by Zorro, sparking a daring fight against tyranny.

programme.title: Beyond Hatred
programme.desc: After a childhood massacre, a girl is captured by Indians and grows up among them. Years later, during renewed hostilities, she recognizes a wounded captive as her long-lost brother, forcing both sides into a brutal conflict while past and present collide on the frontier.

programme.title: Patience Has a Limit, We Don't
programme.desc: During the Civil War, Corporal MacDonald hides a large gold shipment meant for the Union. Before he can retrieve it, he's killed—taking the secret location with him. Now, a Union lieutenant and MacDonald's two sons compete to uncover the buried treasure in a tense hunt filled with danger and deception.

programme.title: Troublemakers
programme.desc: Two brothers who hate each other are going to spend Christmas with their mother. She tries to get them together.

programme.title: Twenty Paces to Death
programme.desc: A young half-breed is saved from death and raised as a son by his rescuer. Years later, love and betrayal tear the family apart when he falls for his adoptive sister, while a vengeful woman plots the downfall of the man who once saved them both.

programme.title: His Name was King
programme.desc: A relentless bounty hunter pursues a brutal gang of gunrunners deep into Mexico. As he crosses the lawless borderlands, he’s drawn into a deadly chase where justice and vengeance blur in the desert heat.

programme.title: Pistol for a Hundred Coffins
programme.desc: A Civil War veteran swears revenge when he returns home to find his family killed by a local gang.

programme.title: Cry Blood Apache
programme.desc: Gang of sadistic cowboys let nothing stand in their way in their search for gold.

programme.title: And God Said to Cain
programme.desc: After ten years in prison for a crime he didn’t commit, ex-Confederate officer Gary Hamilton returns to seek revenge on Acombar, the man who framed him and stole both his gold and his lover. Surrounded by enemies, Hamilton uses the town’s secret tunnels to strike back in a stormy, haunting showdown.

programme.title: Murieta!
programme.desc: The story of Joaquin Murrieta, a real life Mexican bandit who terrorized California with his gang of raiders and cutthroats during the first half of the 19th century. Some saw him as a murderous outlaw, others as the Mexican Robin Hood.

programme.title: There's a Noose Waiting for You Trinity!
programme.desc: Trinity is an ex-gunslinger desperately wanting to be forgiven and accepted by his family that he abandoned years earlier. Unfortunately for him, a ruthless bounty hunter is on his trail.

programme.title: You're Jinxed, Friend You've Met Sacramento
programme.desc: This fast-moving tale revolves around the kidnaping of a boxer's daughter. The boxer pays the ransom money but the girl is still not released. Her boyfriend decides to get her back his own way, killing her ruthless captor in a fierce duel.

programme.title: Two Crosses at Danger Pass
programme.desc: Judy and Alex are the only two survivors of a punitive mission ordered by the rich and ruthless Moran.... The girl becomes his maid and the boy is adopted by a Quaker family. Alex, despite the philosophy of forgiveness he has been taught, plans to take revenge.

programme.title: One Dollar Too Many
programme.desc: Suave gambler Clay Watson, cocky sharpshooter Moses Lang, and wily thespian Edwin Kean are a trio of criminals in the Old West.

programme.title: Savage Pampas
programme.desc: In the late 1800's, an army captain tries to tame the open plains of Argentina which are dominated by Indians and bandits. To help do this, the captain brings in a party of women to keep his soldiers happy.

programme.title: Nevermind
programme.desc: Five people are turned upside down by puzzling and paradoxical happenings. A lawyer with a deplorable habit; a baby sitter struggling with a disturbing new job; an old childhood friend with a murky present; a cook with an unmentionable desire; and a psychologist haunted by a tow truck. Five stories that will lead the protagonists to extreme and unpredictable choices.

programme.title: Wild Boys
programme.desc: Five delinquent youths escape a reformatory and embark on a violent, lawless spree across the country.

programme.title: Naples... The Camorra Challenges, the City Hits Back
programme.desc: Mario Merola stands tall against the Camorra in this gritty Neapolitan crime classic.

programme.title: One Man Against the Organization
programme.desc: A clerk steals a drug haul and flees to Barcelona with ruthless traffickers hot on his trail.

programme.title: Dead Uncle
programme.desc: Cristian, who has no job and no desire to find one, has only one way out: to retrieve the urine of a jaguar in the remote Apulian countryside to carry out a very dangerous mission.

programme.title: Miami Supercops
programme.desc: An ex-con returns to Miami after completing a seven-year sentence for thieving $20,000,000 and is murdered. Two FBI agents are then shipped to Miami to investigate the case under the guise of cops.

programme.title: Getaway of Love
programme.desc: Giuliana leads a normal life; she has been married for 10 years to Martino, a less-than-passionate husband more devoted to his employment than to her. One day two thugs break into the supermarket where she works. A handsome policeman, Leonardo, comes to stop the robbery. A boundless attraction arises between the two, which will lead them to extreme choices in order to stay together.

programme.title: Blood Brothers
programme.desc: Nicola Bellizzi returns to Naples, after spending six years in a juvenile detention centre, determined to get out of his outcast status and become a lawyer. In the neighbourhood, Gaetano, known as Core e' Fierro, is the absolute boss of the guapperia. A clash takes place between the two young men; but the behaviour of Nicola, who defends Gaetano from the commissioner Ajossa who has caught them duelling, gives rise to a deep friendship between the two. After many denials, driven by necessity, Nicola agrees to become a guappo in turn during an initiation at the secret court to which he is introduced by Core e' Fierro. Lucia, Gaetano's woman, feels attracted to Nicola, but the two repress their desire. Ajossa wants to get his hands on Gaetano and sets a trap for Lucia, inducing her to yield to him in order to save her lover, so that the latter, in order to avenge the offence, will make a mistake.

programme.title: The Hyena
programme.desc: An ex-model’s life spirals into lust, murder, and betrayal after a gunman shows up at her door.

programme.title: The supervips
programme.desc: Two brothers with superpowers face challenges of fame, responsibility, and heroism.

programme.title: Dead Uncle
programme.desc: Cristian, who has no job and no desire to find one, has only one way out: to retrieve the urine of a jaguar in the remote Apulian countryside to carry out a very dangerous mission.

programme.title: Miami Supercops
programme.desc: An ex-con returns to Miami after completing a seven-year sentence for thieving $20,000,000 and is murdered. Two FBI agents are then shipped to Miami to investigate the case under the guise of cops.

One day two thugs break into the supermarket where she works. A handsome policeman, Leonardo, comes to stop the robbery. A boundless attraction arises between the two, which will lead them to extreme choices in order to stay together.

programme.desc: Lata runs away from home in order to avoid an arranged marriage fixed by her father. She chances upon and falls in love with a truck driver named Vishwa but she is left devastated when he gets arrested for murdering a man.

programme.title: Ishqiya
programme.desc: Khalujaan and Babban, two thugs, are on the run from their boss. They seek refuge at an old friend’s house but meet Krishna, his widow, instead. Both of them fall for her, oblivious to the fact that Krishna is manipulating them for her own gain.

programme.title: Ishqiya
programme.desc: Khalujaan and Babban, two thugs, are on the run from their boss. They seek refuge at an old friend’s house but meet Krishna, his widow, instead. Both of them fall for her, oblivious to the fact that Krishna is manipulating them for her own gain.

programme.title: Ishqiya
programme.desc: Khalujaan and Babban, two thugs, are on the run from their boss. They seek refuge at an old friend’s house but meet Krishna, his widow, instead. Both of them fall for her, oblivious to the fact that Krishna is manipulating them for her own gain.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: BMW offers the X2 as a compact hipster SUV for young people. The DS 7 Crossback, on the other hand, wants to convey the French lifestyle. And Jaguar's E-Pace enters the market as a smaller version of the F-Pace.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: With the compact SUV Velar, Range Rover attempts to reach a broader audience. Jeep relies on the tried and tested: the design of the Wrangler has remained almost the same for more than 60 years. Also: the Volvo XC60 and the Ford Edge.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: The Mercedes Sprinter still is one of the most popular commercial vehicles. For its third generation, the brand chose to have it manufactured in Poland. Before, this iconic van shared its production line with Volkswagen's Crafter.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: Porsche quits the diesel business. Hybrids such as the Cayenne E-Hybrid are expected to become their focus of attention. Also: taking the BMW X4 on tour around Spartanburg, USA. And: mountain climbing with the Volkswagen Touareg in Austria.

programme.title: Mitsubishi Lancer Evo 10
programme.desc: The ice course on Lungauring, the Mitsubishi Lancer Evo 10 in winter training. Twelve participants in six Evos were taught the art of drifting with a four-wheel drive car. We accompanied a student on his first drifting experience.

programme.title: Joseph Stalin's ZIS 110
programme.desc: James Bond still didn't have a license to kill, when this representative Russian vehicle called ZIS 110 rolled off the production line in 1949. The 110 was developed by reverse engineering a 1942 Packard Super Eight.

programme.title: Put your car on TV
programme.desc: The search for the fastest, best looking and best sounding car continues. Once more car lovers from the Middle East bring their tuned vehicles to the Sofitel Dubai Jumeirah Beach and have it judged by Saif Hattawi. The winner receives a special treat for two people from the luxurious Sofitel Dubai Jumeirah Beach. A Ford Mustang and a limited edition Chevrolet Corvette try to win the competition.

programme.title: Put your car on TV
programme.desc: Put Your Car on TV gives every car owner the chance to bring their tuned machines to the Sofitel Hotel Dubai Jumeirah beach. There, Saif Hattawi will assess each car based on speed, style and sound. The person with the most amazing car wins a one night stay at the Sofitel Hotel Dubai Jumeirah Beach for two people. A BMW X6M, a massive Ford F250 and a special Nissan Patrol try to win this prize.

programme.title: Put your car on TV
programme.desc: The Walk' at JBR, the most prestigious location in Dubai, sets the background for the fastest customized cars in the Middle East. Put Your Car on TV invites car owners to present their cars and have it judged. The owner of the fastest, most beautiful and best sounding car wins a special treat from Sofitel Dubai Jumeirah Beach. Among the competitors are a Lamborghini Aventador and a GMC Chevrolet.

programme.title: Put your car on TV
programme.desc: Once more, Mylene Gomera and Saif Hattawi are on the hunst for the most amazing cars in the world and ask car owners to bring their customized vehicles to Dubai, where it will be awarded points based on speed, style and sound. The car with the points wins a stay at the Sofitel Hotel Dubai Jumeirah Beach for two people. Among the presented cars are a limited edition Mercedes SLS and an Audi R8.

programme.title: Put your car on TV
programme.desc: On Put Your Car on TV people from the Middle East present their tuned vehicles. They are rewarded with points based on its styling, the highest (possible) speed ever driven und naturally also its sound. Whoever receives the most points, wins a luxurious treat from the Sofitel Hotel Dubai Jumeirah Beach. This time, a Lexus GSF, a Ford Mustang and a McLaren MP4-12C are put on the spotlight.

programme.title: Mercedes-AMG GT S Performmaster
programme.desc: Not far from Stuttgart is the home of the tuner Performmaster who specialize in the performance optimization of Mercedes-AMG models. They turned the already more-than-potent GT S sports car into a beast.

programme.title: Beradino
programme.desc: A „bella macchina“, a beautiful car - but not designed by masters like Bertone or Pininfarina. Johannes Paulussen from Neuss in Germany built the Beradino by hand.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Hybrid cars with lots of power. The McLaren Artura combines revolutionary hybrid technology with racing DNA. Ferrari also counts on the combined power of electricity and petrol in the 296 GTB. Also: Mercedes S 580e and Cupra Leon Sportstourer.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: What is crucial in a sports car? Performance? Precision? Or the unrivalled feeling of dominating the road - such as in the McLaren 600 LT, the Aston Martin Vantage or the Alfa Romeo Giulia GTAm?

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Power sports station wagons are family cars with sports car DNA. The Audi RS6 has evolved over decades from an inconspicuous family car to a technological masterpiece. But the competition is not to be underestimated.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: On the road or offroad – this car is supposed to master all driving situations. The Porsche 911 Dakar is one of the most extreme series 911 models of all times. We tested this extraordinary 911 on rough terrain and explain how this special concept came to life.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: From racing legends to sporty luxury road cruisers: No one bridges the gap between driving pleasure and comfort as well as BMW. We put the racetrack icon M4 CSL to the test. And: Is the BMW M760e more of a driver's or a chauffeur's car?

programme.title: Volkswagen Golf GTI and Golf R
programme.desc: The 7th Generation of the Volkswagen Golf GTI and R is made to give people affordable driving fun.

programme.title: Aston Martin DB4 GT Zagato
programme.desc: In 1960 the British sports car manufacturer wanted to give the DB4 GT a new look and hired Italian designer Zagato. Today, this Aston Martin is one of the best and most beautiful sports car of all time.

programme.title: Dreamcars
programme.desc: Italian super sports cars like the Ferrari La Ferrari, the Lamborghini Aventador or the Pagani Huayra are the most beautiful and fastest cars in the world, created by the best designers. Italian super sports cars are dreams made reality.

programme.title: Dreamcars
programme.desc: British super sports cars like the Aston Martin Vanquish, the Bentley Continental GT Speed or McLaren's P1 are among the most spectacular and beautiful sports cars in the world. It's not just about power but also grace and style.

programme.title: Dreamcars
programme.desc: Whether it is the Porsche 918 Spyder, the Audi R8, the Mercedes AMG GT or the BMW i8 - German super sports cars are the fastest and most coveted in the world, with their breathtaking top speeds and incredible engine power.

programme.title: Dreamcars
programme.desc: The super sports cars by Ferrari, Lamborghini, McLaren, Pagani and Porsche are like Formula One racing cars for the streets, the fastest and most exciting cars in the world, whose power and performance seem to defy the laws of physics.

programme.title: Dreamcars
programme.desc: Ferrari 250 GTO, Porsche 911, Aston Martin DB 5 or Lamborghini Aventador and Ferrari LaFerrari - every era produces fabulous dream cars, born from the fascination for breathtaking design and the dream for outstanding speed.

programme.title: Porsche Cayman GT4
programme.desc: The Porsche Cayman GT4. Lighter, more powerful and faster than ever. Porsche shows what is possible with this vehicle, when fast lap times are in the focus of attention.

programme.title: Porsche Techart Grand GT
programme.desc: The Techart Grand GT may look like Darth Vader's private ride, but it's in fact a souped-up version of the Porsche Panamera.

programme.title: Streetwise
programme.desc: We took the Ferrari 458 Italia for a spring ride around Lake Starnberg. Also: a test drive of BMW's 6 series convertible at the Table Mountain in South Africa. And: the Chevrolet Orlando family van.

programme.title: Streetwise
programme.desc: Audi built only 333 units of its GT model. We tested the everyday use compatibility of the R8 GT. In addition: the Mazda MX5, the most popular roadster in the world. And: the Mercedes-AMG GT3.

programme.title: Streetwise
programme.desc: More efficiency, less weight and more sportiness is what Audi promotes in order to win the race against BMW and Mercedes with their A6 2.0 TDI. Also: Patrick Dempsey and his racing team at the Grand Am Rolex Sportscar GT series.

programme.title: Streetwise
programme.desc: We put the Wiesmann MF5 at the racetrack in Spa-Francochamps in the Belgian Ardennes to the test. Also: Audi A1 vs. Mini Cooper RS. And: the GT Academy 2011 qualifying rounds.

programme.title: Streetwise
programme.desc: The Nurburgring 24 Hours is considered the most difficult long distance race in motor sports. Volkswagen set themselves this challenge with a car built especially for this occasion, their Golf 24.

programme.title: Streetwise
programme.desc: The Mercedes-Benz SL 65 AMG is the ultimate German muscle car in a tailor-made suit. Also: the Mercedes-Benz SLS AMG, the Formula 1 safety car. And: BMW's 6 series models.

programme.title: Jaguar D-Type
programme.desc: The high-achiever at the 24 hours of Le Mans. The Jaguar D-Type won the toughest endurance race in the world three times in a row.

programme.title: Ignition GT
programme.desc: Ernest gets behind the wheel of the Alfa Romeo Junior. Toyota gives us an insight into what 2026 has in store for the auto sector and we find out more about the Lepas brand.

programme.title: Buyer's Guide
programme.desc: We assess how long a high-mileage Hyundai Tucson can last, help a pensioner choose a newer SUV to replace her Rav4, and weigh up Citroen alternatives against a Renault Kiger.

programme.title: IGNITION Goes to SEMA
programme.desc: In the second instalment, Vic feasts his eyes on an early Volkswagen Beetle that's been pimped to the nines; a restored and enhanced 1970s Toyota Corolla; and a two-door Ford Sierra featuring modern-day mechanicals.

programme.title: Petrolheads
programme.desc: This week Vic gives us a look at some of his favourite rides from the VDub Camp Fest. Sbu chats to Morongoa Mahope, a biker making headlines although she only started racing at age 30. And Streamline Media presents a sexy M3.

programme.title: Chevrolet Corvette C2 Stingray
programme.desc: In 1963 the most exciting sports car of all time for many was launched. The Chevrolet Corvette Stingray. Chevrolet, the American mass producer wanted to compete with established sports car manufacturers like Jaguar and Maserati. The new Corvette was based on the then popular sports car body shape: A long hood and a crisp hatch back

programme.title: Lancia Delta S4
programme.desc: Beauty is in the eye of the beholder, or so the saying goes. Technically the Delta S4 is the most lavishly designed race car. The S4 developed by Aurelio Lampredi and Claudio Lombardi is entered in 1986 as a successor to the Lancia Rally 037 in the Group B.

programme.title: New Zealand Rally Championship
programme.desc: Rally Coromandel sends the New Zealand Rally Championship onto spectacular coastal gravel roads, where speed, precision and consistency are vital. With the title fight heating up, every stage and every second matter in this tense mid-season showdown.

programme.title: New Zealand Rally Championship
programme.desc: Rally Bay of Plenty serves up intense New Zealand Rally Championship action, with the leading crews chasing points on demanding gravel stages. Expect high-speed drama, technical challenges and momentum swings as the season builds toward its climax.

programme.title: New Zealand Rally Championship
programme.desc: The International Rally of Whangarei brings the 2025 New Zealand Rally Championship to a thrilling conclusion. On world-class gravel roads, the leading crews battle for rally victory and the chance to secure the top prize in a dramatic season finale.

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing pros are carried out of the bend, we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of high-powered sheet metal bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed.

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing pros are carried out of the bend, we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of high-powered sheet metal bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed.

programme.title: Porsche Panamera Sport Turismo
programme.desc: We take out the Porsche Panamera Sport Turismo for a couple of rounds

programme.title: Pikes Peak International Hillclimb
programme.desc: High winds force a shortened course as drivers tackle the mountain. GT4 Trophy by Yokohama and Time Attack One classes push for top times in a demanding run where changing conditions and altitude make every second count.

programme.title: Pikes Peak International Hillclimb
programme.desc: Exhibition and Open Wheel classes tackle a shortened course due to high winds, featuring Honda’s hydrogen-powered CR-V debut and Fred Veach’s emotional farewell run on the mountain.

programme.title: Pikes Peak International Hillclimb
programme.desc: The Open Division tackles a shortened course due to high winds, featuring rookie runs, Lonni Unser’s charge, J.R. Hildebrand’s NASCAR stock car, a Michèle Mouton tribute, and Ford’s radical electric Mustang Mach-E.

programme.title: Pikes Peak International Hillclimb
programme.desc: The Unlimited Division features exotic prototypes, rookie standouts, Robin Shute in a brutal Camaro, and a fierce Nova Proto showdown between Diego De Gasperi and Simone Faggioli.

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing pros are carried out of the bend, we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of high-powered sheet metal bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed.

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing pros are carried out of the bend, we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of high-powered sheet metal bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: We took the Mercedes AMG SLS GT to an airfield and the Porsche 911 Turbo S to the racetrack in order to see these sporty driving machines in action and test their performance. In addition: the Audi R8 4.0 TFSI's innovative lighting technology.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Jaguar found their way back to the world of sports cars. The F-Type doesn't just look good, it's got what it takes, and the car is able to take on the competition like the BMW Z4. We also took a closer look at two other competitors, the Porsche Boxster S and Nissan's 370 Z.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: For more than 60 years the Corvette has been the embodiment of the American sports car. Also: the Ford Mustang GT, an iconic model with a V8 engine at the price of a Volkswagen Passat. And: the Chevrolet Camaro, another classic from the land where cylinder capacity is still valued a lot.
