programme.title: Charlie and Lola
programme.desc: Lola gets upset when she witnesses Charlie and Marv 'play fighting' and thinks they are not best friends anymore. How can Lola and Lotta get Marv and Charlie back together again?

programme.title: Charlie and Lola
programme.desc: Playing Piggy in the Middle with fuzzy pig in a fuzzy felt jungle is good, but you definitely need two people; Charlie is going out, and Lotta has a cold. So Lola has no one to play with....

programme.title: Charlie and Lola
programme.desc: Lola promises to play beads on Friday with her friend from school, but then Marv invites her to his special space party on the very same day! What is Lola going to do?!

programme.title: Charlie and Lola
programme.desc: Charlie, Lola, Lotta and Marv have been growing a pumpkin all through summer for the Halloween party at school... and it's enormous.

programme.title: Charlie and Lola
programme.desc: Everyone is hooley hooping - Charlie, Marv, Lotta... in fact the whole school is hooley hooping, and Lola has had enough.

programme.title: Charlie and Lola
programme.desc: It's Save An Animal week at school and Lola and Lotta are horrified to learn that all sorts of lovely animals are in danger! Which one should they save?

programme.title: Charlie and Lola
programme.desc: Having begged Granny and Grandpa for a scooter, Lola suddenly decides that she now wants a pair of real, actual ice skates.

programme.title: Charlie and Lola
programme.desc: Lola is a very fussy eater. She won't eat mushrooms or peas or fishfingers and she will never ever eat a tomato!

programme.title: Charlie and Lola
programme.desc: Today, Lola wants to do everything that's anything all on her own. In the park, Charlie and his friend, Marv, persuade her that a see saw won't "see" or "saw" with only one person.

programme.title: Charlie and Lola
programme.desc: Will Lola ever be sleepy enough to go to bed, Charlie wonders?

programme.title: Charlie and Lola
programme.desc: You have to be quiet when you're in a library. But that's very hard for Lola when she can't find her absolutely most favourite book - "Beetles Bugs and Butterflies."

programme.title: Charlie and Lola
programme.desc: It's the school play and Lola is determined to be The Sun.

programme.title: Charlie and Lola
programme.desc: Lola and her friend, Lotta, know everything there is to know about dogs. So they're really pleased when Marv lets them look after his dog, Sizzles, in the park.

programme.title: Charlie and Lola
programme.desc: Lola simply has to win all of the time. She can run faster than a cheetah, she can bounce higher than a kangaroo and she can stand on one leg for longer than a flamingo!

programme.title: Charlie and Lola
programme.desc: It's that time when Charlie and Lola have to get their haircut. But something's bothering Lola and she doesn't want to tell us what it is...

programme.title: Charlie and Lola
programme.desc: Charlie has promised Marv that he'll play football with him but poor Lola has a very nasty cold and is stuck in bed.

programme.title: Charlie and Lola
programme.desc: Charlie wants Lola to hurry or they'll be late for school. But there are so many exciting things to do on the way that Lola keeps getting distracted.

programme.title: Charlie and Lola
programme.desc: It's ever so easy for Charlie to make Lola jump. But what Lola wants more than anything is to make Charlie jump.

programme.title: Charlie and Lola
programme.desc: You can't have a picnic without swirly tennis and boildy eggs and of course sunshine. Lola, Lotta, Charlie and Marv are really excited because they have all of those things!

programme.title: Charlie and Lola
programme.desc: Charlie wins first prize at school for his fantastic homemade rocket which he made from 10 yoghurt pots and some extra wide tin foil.

programme.title: Charlie and Lola
programme.desc: Lola has to keep Charlie's birthday surprise a big secret. And it's really, really hard to keep secrets!

programme.title: Charlie and Lola
programme.desc: Granny and Grandpa's house is by the sea where there are pony rides, lovely things to eat, a dressing up box and Caspar the Cat but Lola is worried that Soren Lorenson might miss her while she's away!

programme.title: Charlie and Lola
programme.desc: Lola is horrified because she has her first ever wobbly tooth and she does not ever, never want her wobbly tooth to fall out.

programme.title: Charlie and Lola
programme.desc: To please Mum, Lola is determined to stay clean and tidy for her very first school photograph. And Lola's not very good at staying clean and tidy!

programme.title: Charlie and Lola
programme.desc: Lola likes all sorts of creepy crawlies, she's just not keen on spiders. Charlie tries to show Lola that spiders aren't bad at all, in fact they're really quite clever.

programme.title: Charlie and Lola
programme.desc: Snow is on the way and Lola is bursting with excitement. Lola loves snow. After she finally gets to sleep, she wakes up the next morning to find that everything has gone completely, extremely white!

programme.title: Charlie and Lola
programme.desc: It's Lotta's birthday and of course, Lola wants to buy her friend the very best present in the whole wide world. She is over the moon when she finds the very thing... a Doctor's kit!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: There's a new employee at the pound: it's a robot with all the latest gadgets and it's job to make all the pets stick to the straight and narrow!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Tis the holiday season for Garfield and the whole gang. Jon has invited not only his parents and Doc Boy, but Liz's family as well, and so Garfield must be on his best behaviour.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Jon's Christmas plans take a turn for the unexpected, prompting Garfield to learn that there's more to Christmas than opening presents and eating!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: How can Garfield make the cutest cat in the country look ugly? It won't be easy but our orange friend is VERY motivated...

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Ah! A pizza dinner in a countryside cottage, doesn't that sound nice? Yep, except when the house is haunted.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: How can Garfield get rid of Aunt Ivy, who hates animals? Garfield has an idea.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: When the owner of an outer space fast food chain plans to turn all the inhabitants of Earth into chickens, Garfield becomes our unlikely hero.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: A retelling of the history of the cat throughout time, as told by Garfield. But is it really a retelling of history, or a rewriting?

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield, from now on, you're on a diet! Don't argue, it's for your own good!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Gravity-free cooking, have you ever heard of such a thing? According to Garfield, it's delicious...

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Yahooooo! Jon has won the lottery!!! But... but where is his ticket?

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Bad news: Jon's nieces are coming over! The ones who love to dress Garfield up? You got it.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Jon has become allergic to Garfield. But what if the only solution is to get rid of him?

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield has always said he would go to the ends of the earth to eat lasagna. And that's exactly what he's going to do!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: In your opinion, who should you call to rid a house of mice? An exterminator, or Garfield?

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Odie is accidentally sold to Mr. Allwork, an awful lawyer who wants to sue Jon, and Garfield must find a way to get him back or never be fed again!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Jon, Odie and especially Garfield have to put up with an unexpected houseguest with big demands and an even bigger appetite.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: It would be fantastic to get tomorrow's newspaper today, wouldn't it? Jon could play all the winning numbers in the lottery and then Garfield could eat tons of pizza, unless...

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: So Garfield's been working the fields like nobody else? Has he been hypnotised or what?! Well... anything's possible...

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: What starts out as a romantic night at Vito's for Jon and Liz could end up in a marriage with children, all thanks to Garfield stomach.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield will stop at nothing to get his hands on Chef Squisito's lasagna, which his wistful student claims is the 'best lasagna in the world."

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield is the unwilling guinea pig for his young neighbour's newest invention: a size altering ray.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: When Nermal's revenge on Garfield goes wrong, Garfield finds himself roaming the streets with no memory of who he is.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield has to survive a day filled with nothing but bad luck after crossing paths with Jonah, a sad black cat.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Odie and the people he has licked are somehow making everyone act like dogs: it's a canine contagion! No one will be spared without the help of Garfield, who for some reason is immune.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield must save a lost baby bluebird from finding a new home: Harry's stomach!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: What's eating Eddie Gourmand? That's what Garfield is about to find out thanks to a new invention that allows him to get inside his brain.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: When Jon, Odie and Garfield are duped by items they've bought on the All-Buying-Stuff Channel, Garfield discovers it's going to take more than a polite request to get their money back.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Jon's new super computer program, Millie, has taken over all the appliances in the house and will not stop until it has taken over the world!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: An emergency fumigation prompts Aunt Ivy to impose herself on Jon, Odie and Garfield, leaving Jon with the responsibility of yet another cumbersome character.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: What if every person in the world were just waiting for their call to be taken, their life always on hold? Garfield is about to find out.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield has always stayed away from cat food, opting instead for people food. After seeing his stray cat friends being fed some, he remembers how that came to be.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: When the leader of the lasagna planet, Parma, sends in a spy in the form of a cuter version of Nermal to gain information on Garfield's weakness, his mission to invade the planet may be compromised...

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield and Odie have their own undersea adventure when a giant squid takes Odie and starts wreaking havoc in the city sewers.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: It's the tale of Penny Henny, revisited, as Jon tells the story of the chicken who believed the sky was falling all because of one orange cat.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: When Jon unleashes a trickster genie in a bottle, he gets the tables turned on him and must grant the genie his three wishes lest he be turned into a frog.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Shrimpy the Elephant is being mistreated by Dr. Whipple. When he escapes, it's up to Garfield to help him stay hidden.

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat Knows a Lot About That!
programme.desc: Sally and Nick are making paper airplanes but have run out of paper! Then, Nick and Sally lose Teddy outside.

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat Knows a Lot About That!
programme.desc: Sally and Nick are trying to walk across a beam in their backyard but are having trouble staying on it! Then, the kids are playing with glass marbles until one of them rolls away!

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat Knows a Lot About That!
programme.desc: Sally and Nickgo to Savannah Saloo to meet Os the Ostrich. Then, Nick and Sally are trying to make some music but they need drums.

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat Knows a Lot About That!
programme.desc: Nick and Sally are playing super heroes when Nick cuts his finger. Then, it's off to the ocean to meet this cleaner fish!

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat Knows a Lot About That!
programme.desc: When Nick and Sally's boat sinks, they need to build another boat, but don't know how. Then, in Spansylvania, they meet a dragon who chases after them!

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat Knows a Lot About That!
programme.desc: The Cat takes Sally and Nick to meet Sara of Serendip, an inventor who helps them understand that you can make new discoveries through your mistakes. Then, the Cat takes them to the Soundy Sea.

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat Knows a Lot About That!
programme.desc: The kids want to get a trunk up into the treehouse and go to the Machine-a-Ma-Zoo, where they're introduced to simple machines. Then, Sally loses her "slidiness"!

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat Knows a Lot About That!
programme.desc: Nick and Sally are having a sleepover in the treehouse and Nick is startled by a shadow. Then, Nick unintentionally loses Sally's bouncy ball.

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat Knows a Lot About That!
programme.desc: Nick and Sally need a strong piece of string to pull their train but it breaks and they don't have anything stronger. Later, they notice a bird flying back and forth into the tree branches.

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat Knows a Lot About That!
programme.desc: The Cat takes Nick and Sally to the Magnetic Fields where they learn how magnets work. Later, Nick tries to learn how to ride his bike.

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat Knows a Lot About That!
programme.desc: Sally wants to fly her kite but can't seem to work out the timing to get the wind right. Later, Cat takes Nick and Sally to Gravity Drop.

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat Knows a Lot About That!
programme.desc: The Cat takes Nick and Sally on a journey but has to make an emergency landing on Lagoona-Maroon. Later, Nick and Sally go to a water park and learn that water always seeks the lowest level.

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat Knows a Lot About That!
programme.desc: Sally is trying to make a vase for her mother but each one she tries falls over. Later, the Cat takes Nick and Sally to Arcade Island where they discover what will and won't be attracted to a magnet.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: There is a space invasion under Jon Arbuckle's roof, and the aliens are looking very much like Garfield's favourite meal: lasagnas.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Squeak and his mice family have taken up residence in Garfield's house, to Jon's despair, who will deprive Garfield of lasagnas if he doesn't turn things back to normal.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield's favourite restaurant, Vito's Pizzeria, is in jeopardy. The evil Mama Meany wants to buy it to expand his own restaurant, with the PizzaGrand 7000 capable of making ten pizzas a minute.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: A mother bluebird is locked in a neighbourhood garage, so who will care for her eggs? That's a job for Garfield, who is sometimes quite a mother hen.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Odie is found by Al the Dogcatcher with no license on his collar so he puts him in the city pound with other stray dogs. Garfield will do everything to get his friend back.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Odie falls in love with a brush. Garfield becomes a little bit jealous about that and decides to make the brush disappear.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Jon finds an old accordion. It's unbearable for Garfield who totally dislikes this music. He will do everything to get rid of it.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Jon has won a live turkey in a raffle and wants to prepare it for dinner, but he can't make up his mind to eat it. Neither can Garfield!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield and Odie are watching a horror movie... They're scared. Jon, who has forgotten his key, is knocking at the door. The two pets won't let him in until he's proven his identity.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield is angry. A fake, secret agent is trying to steal the show and his popularity among his friends.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: It's Halloween! Garfield goes trick or treating and disguises himself as a scary Catzilla. But the real Catzilla has just escaped from the city zoo and will spread panic in Garfield's neighbourhood.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Odie has been thrown out of the house by Garfield and spends all night outside on his own. An alien crashes his UFO in the garden and loses a key part necessary to get back home!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Nermal's owner has gone away on vacation and Jon has offered to look after Nermal while he's gone. Watch out, everybody! The cutest kitten in the world (he says so himself) is coming over for a week!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Who has stolen Pooky? After a night drying on the clothes line, Pooky has disappeared, and Garfield can't sleep without him.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: It's night-time and the full moon and the alignment of the planets are having a strange effect on Odie.

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends
programme.desc: Things get even more epic in Season 3 as Talking Tom and Friends try new ways to make their dreams come true, making more friends (and enemies) along the way!

programme.title: Monster Town
programme.desc: Meet the Monster Trucks, a gang of colossal, hard-working cars who team up to help their friends and community in Monster City.

programme.title: Ollie! The Boy Who Became What He Ate
programme.desc: Ollie is a 6-year-old with a massive imagination, often lost in his own world - flipping, sliding, climbing and rocket-blasting through the house, practicing at being the master of all things. But even masters need to stop and refuel. When meals or snack time interrupt Ollie’s play, he finds himself confronted with the real challenge of childhood; trying new food. To escape his predicament, Ollie uses his magic spoon to transport himself, along with his sister Poppy, and her stuffy Nummy, to a food planet filled with adventure and the very food Ollie stuck his spoon into.

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There’s just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: Gummy Bear and Friends
programme.desc: Gummy lives in an apartment with his friend Harry the Chameleon, while his other friend Kala the Cat hangs out in a ninja dojo on the roof. Together they go on wild and wacky adventures in their building and hometown. Enjoy the fun and crazy adventures...

programme.title: Grojband
programme.desc: The story about 12 year old Corey that emotionally torments his sister so that she will write the ultimate lyrics for his garage band.

programme.title: Box Yourself
programme.desc: Great Projects From Ordinary Cardboard!

programme.title: Ebb and Flo
programme.desc: The world of Ebb and Flo is seen through Ebb’s eyes and Ebb reveals all the emotions grown-ups try to hide. Flo doesn’t think of Ebb as a dog, and Ebb doesn’t think of Flo as a small human, they just are the best of friends. Until Bird arrives to lovingly disrupt Ebb’s world. Ebb and Flo’s home is an old boat moored by the beach. Things Couldn’t Be Better!

programme.title: RoboFuse
programme.desc: Zitron stole Edna’s precious Candy Machine. Robo merges with Jerry; now that he's got awesome SuperWheels he's ready to defeat Zitron!

programme.title: RoboFuse
programme.desc: Zitron joins a game of football between Booster and Rodeo and of course, cheats! Robo and Marley fuse to defeat him.

programme.title: RoboFuse
programme.desc: Zitron's broken the Ferris wheel, and now it's spinning wildly. Robo merges with Baby Rocket to save the day.

programme.title: RoboFuse
programme.desc: Zitron makes an oily mess in the city; Robo merges with Carrie to stop him and clean up the mess.

programme.title: RoboFuse
programme.desc: Zitron uses his reactors to cheat during a race, but they're very powerful and dangerous. Robo intervenes to stop Zitron.

programme.title: VIP Pets
programme.desc: We are the VIP Pets! The coolest pets with a passion for hair! We are best friends and together we will discover lots of beautiful hairstyles and go on exciting adventures!

programme.title: Om Nom Stories
programme.desc: Sweet tooth Om Nom is wandering Around the world, eats a lot of candies and tries to find his Dream job. Watch his adventures and solve different puzzles on the way!

programme.title: Chefclub Kids
programme.desc: With Chefclub Kids, the little ones get their hands dirty all while having fun in the kitchen. Whether they're learning to prepare dinner, bake goodies, or explore new flavors, Chefclub Kids is a way for children to gain confidence through cooking!

programme.title: Ryan Defrates
programme.desc: The Adventures of Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent is about a young spy with a whole lot to learn, who is paired with a very unlikely partner… his mom!

programme.title: Tom's Car Wash
programme.desc: Tom loves caring for his friends; they can always count on Tom to tow them back to his car wash, where they're guaranteed to leave sparking!

programme.title: Everybody Loves a Moose
programme.desc: An oddball buddy series between an over ambitious boy, Jack and his pal Moose, a melodramatic self-confessed expert in everything. Except he isn't! Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he want, you can't help being sucked in by Moose's relentless optimism and zest for life!

programme.title: Grojband
programme.desc: The story about 12 year old Corey that emotionally torments his sister so that she will write the ultimate lyrics for his garage band.

programme.title: Eliot Kid
programme.desc: When a tooth falling out turns into a hunt for the “giant mouse”, when the city’s sewers transform into Indiana Jones’ white rapids or when a trip to the toilets becomes an expedition to a haunted house, well then you’ve entered the wonderful world of Eliot Kid!

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other's company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: Box Yourself
programme.desc: Great Projects From Ordinary Cardboard!

programme.title: Angry Birds Toons
programme.desc: Check out Angry Birds Toons compilations! Each compilation has several episodes from your favorite shows including Angry Birds, Piggy Tales, and Stella!

programme.title: Pumpkin Reports
programme.desc: Max Green’s new brother and sister are aliens sent to Earth as the advance party for an invasion - and he’s the only one who can stop them turning humans into unwilling slave-gardeners.

programme.title: Gods Gang
programme.desc: God’s Gang faces insane challenges - from stopping a mad scientist to battling aliens and saving blue whales.

programme.title: Gods Gang
programme.desc: A day at the amusement park goes sour when mad scientists turn rides into deadly traps using a mind-bending Reanimator Gun! 🎡🍭 Now it’s up to God’s Gang to stop the chaos and crack the sticky-sweet conspiracy before it’s too late.

programme.title: Gods Gang
programme.desc: God's Gang embarks on an underwater mission to rescue blue whales, only to encounter an alien ambush. The team faces unexpected challenges while trying to infiltrate a clandestine blue whale party. Suspense builds as they attempt a daring rescue operation.

programme.title: Troy the Train
programme.desc: Oh no, there's a traffic jam, and Lilly's stuck on the level crossing! Troy has the perfect plan to help.

programme.title: Troy the Train
programme.desc: Tyler's up to his usual speedster tricks and must be stopped! Troy enlists Matt's help to stop him from endangering other drivers.

programme.title: Troy the Train
programme.desc: Troy helps Tyler and Jerry race by bringing in a third contender. Now let's see who wins the race!

programme.title: Troy the Train
programme.desc: Troy spots a fire in Car City and wastes no time getting Frank to the building to put the fire out!

programme.title: Troy the Train
programme.desc: There's trash all over Car City! Troy selects the perfect truck to take care of it: Gary the Garbage Truck!

programme.title: Troy the Train
programme.desc: Some trees fell and are blocking the bridge! Troy selects the perfect truck to clear it: Charlie the Crane!

programme.title: Rookie Robot
programme.desc: What could be better than a meadow of flowers on a beautiful day? Rookie is enjoying the sun and the beautiful blue sky, watching the clouds pass by - but wait! What‘s that? One of the clouds turns, and suddenly its shape reminds him of one of his friends! And who is that again? What a fun game to play! Rookie continues to search for clouds that remind him of his friends and their adventures together.

programme.title: Rookie Robot
programme.desc: Rookie finds a large box full of building blocks. He starts building towers, but they keep collapsing whenever he looks away. He discovers a hole in the ground with nothing inside, but curious as ever, he presses a button to inflate himself and blows into one of the holes, causing the troublemaker, a friendly mole, to pop out. Rookie catches his new friend , and together they set up an amazing building.

programme.title: Rookie Robot
programme.desc: In the final episode of the second season, Rookie hears suspicious noises and begins to investigate. But he can‘t find the source! When he finally opens a door, he is greeted by a confetti cannon - a surprise birthday party! All his friends are gathered around a cake with two candles, and at the little turtle’s count, they all join in singing ‘Happy Birthday’ together!

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends
programme.desc: Things get even more epic in Season 3 as Talking Tom and Friends try new ways to make their dreams come true, making more friends (and enemies) along the way!

programme.title: Box Yourself
programme.desc: Great Projects From Ordinary Cardboard!

programme.title: RoboFuse
programme.desc: Zitron stole Edna’s precious Candy Machine. Robo merges with Jerry; now that he's got awesome SuperWheels he's ready to defeat Zitron!

programme.title: RoboFuse
programme.desc: Zitron joins a game of football between Booster and Rodeo and of course, cheats! Robo and Marley fuse to defeat him.

programme.title: RoboFuse
programme.desc: Zitron's broken the Ferris wheel, and now it's spinning wildly. Robo merges with Baby Rocket to save the day.

programme.title: RoboFuse
programme.desc: Zitron makes an oily mess in the city; Robo merges with Carrie to stop him and clean up the mess.

programme.title: RoboFuse
programme.desc: Zitron uses his reactors to cheat during a race, but they're very powerful and dangerous. Robo intervenes to stop Zitron.

programme.title: Chefclub Kids
programme.desc: With Chefclub Kids, the little ones get their hands dirty all while having fun in the kitchen. Whether they're learning to prepare dinner, bake goodies, or explore new flavors, Chefclub Kids is a way for children to gain confidence through cooking!

programme.title: VIP Pets
programme.desc: We are the VIP Pets! The coolest pets with a passion for hair! We are best friends and together we will discover lots of beautiful hairstyles and go on exciting adventures!

programme.title: Om Nom Stories
programme.desc: Sweet tooth Om Nom is wandering Around the world, eats a lot of candies and tries to find his Dream job. Watch his adventures and solve different puzzles on the way!

programme.title: Ryan Defrates
programme.desc: The Adventures of Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent is about a young spy with a whole lot to learn, who is paired with a very unlikely partner… his mom!

programme.title: Grojband
programme.desc: The story about 12 year old Corey that emotionally torments his sister so that she will write the ultimate lyrics for his garage band.

programme.title: Everybody Loves a Moose
programme.desc: An oddball buddy series between an over ambitious boy, Jack and his pal Moose, a melodramatic self-confessed expert in everything. Except he isn't! Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he want, you can't help being sucked in by Moose's relentless optimism and zest for life!

programme.title: Tom's Car Wash
programme.desc: Tom loves caring for his friends; they can always count on Tom to tow them back to his car wash, where they're guaranteed to leave sparking!

programme.title: Eliot Kid
programme.desc: When a tooth falling out turns into a hunt for the “giant mouse”, when the city’s sewers transform into Indiana Jones’ white rapids or when a trip to the toilets becomes an expedition to a haunted house, well then you’ve entered the wonderful world of Eliot Kid!

programme.title: Pumpkin Reports
programme.desc: Max Green’s new brother and sister are aliens sent to Earth as the advance party for an invasion - and he’s the only one who can stop them turning humans into unwilling slave-gardeners.

programme.title: Angry Birds Toons
programme.desc: Check out Angry Birds Toons compilations! Each compilation has several episodes from your favorite shows including Angry Birds, Piggy Tales, and Stella!

programme.title: Ebb and Flo
programme.desc: The world of Ebb and Flo is seen through Ebb’s eyes and Ebb reveals all the emotions grown-ups try to hide. Flo doesn’t think of Ebb as a dog, and Ebb doesn’t think of Flo as a small human, they just are the best of friends. Until Bird arrives to lovingly disrupt Ebb’s world. Ebb and Flo’s home is an old boat moored by the beach. Things Couldn’t Be Better!

programme.title: Cyboars
programme.desc: Part Machine, Part Boar, All Hero!

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other's company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: The Boat Show – Episode 173
programme.desc: Explore the luxury of the Prestige F5.7 and the distinctive craftsmanship of the Sauvage 34 by Antonio Ranieri in this episode, blending elegance with innovative design for the ultimate boating experience.

programme.title: The Boat Show – Episode 179
programme.desc: Experience the elegance of the Riva 82 Diva and the innovative design of the MJM 4 in this episode, showcasing luxury and performance in modern yachting.

programme.title: The Boat Show – Episode 181
programme.desc: This episode showcases two Italian icons: the exhilarating Pershing GTX70 Sport Yacht, a 35-knot performance cruiser with a stunning fold-out beach club, and the ultimate luxury sailing escape aboard a Sailuxe Spartivento crewed catamaran, featuring five-star service and gourmet cuisine.

programme.title: The Boat Show – Episode 184
programme.desc: The episode covers: the Pardo E72, a luxury Endurance yacht with fold-down terraces and a tender garage for long-range, efficient cruising; the Quick MC² Stabilizer, an air-cooled gyroscope that significantly reduces boat roll; and the Sea Pro 292 Offshore, a versatile, yacht-certified center console built for serious fishing and performance.

programme.title: The Boat Show – Episode 188
programme.desc: The segment showcased four key boats: the Prestige M7 luxury power catamaran, the long-range, efficient Grand Banks 62 motor yacht, the versatile Regal 43 SAV sport vessel with fold-down terraces, and the rugged offshore fishing center console Boston Whaler 280 Outrage.

programme.title: The Boat Show – Episode 192
programme.desc: This episode is dedicated to performance and versatility, highlighting the 50-knot Italian maxi-RIB Mar.co E44 with its luxury cabin. It also covers three premier US fishing boats: the wide-beamed Southport 38 FE (PBIBS 2025), the serious offshore Bertram 39 CC (PBIBS 2025), and the versatile hybrid bay boat Blackfin 262 HB (MIBS 2025).

programme.title: The Boat Show – Episode 168
programme.desc: Discover the elegance of the Riva El-Iseo, gain unique insights from a women’s perspective at the Absolute Shipyard, and take an in-depth walkthrough of the Tesoro Yacht T50 Speciale in this episode, blending luxury, innovation, and fresh perspectives.

programme.title: The Boat Show – Episode 172
programme.desc: Discover the stunning Pershing GTX116, the iconic Donzi XLV at PIBS, the rugged Tidewater 3100 Carolina Bay, and the luxurious Nordhavn N 51 Awanui in this episode, showcasing performance, adventure, and unparalleled craftsmanship.

programme.desc: The episode covers: the Pardo E72, a luxury Endurance yacht with fold-down terraces and a tender garage for long-range, efficient cruising; the Quick MC² Stabilizer, an air-cooled gyroscope that significantly reduces boat roll; and the Sea Pro 292 Offshore, a versatile, yacht-certified center console built for serious fishing and performance.

programme.title: The Boat Show – Episode 188
programme.desc: The segment showcased four key boats: the Prestige M7 luxury power catamaran, the long-range, efficient Grand Banks 62 motor yacht, the versatile Regal 43 SAV sport vessel with fold-down terraces, and the rugged offshore fishing center console Boston Whaler 280 Outrage.

programme.title: The Boat Show – Episode 192
programme.desc: This episode is dedicated to performance and versatility, highlighting the 50-knot Italian maxi-RIB Mar.co E44 with its luxury cabin. It also covers three premier US fishing boats: the wide-beamed Southport 38 FE (PBIBS 2025), the serious offshore Bertram 39 CC (PBIBS 2025), and the versatile hybrid bay boat Blackfin 262 HB (MIBS 2025).

programme.title: World’s Greatest Motivators
programme.desc: Blaine Bartlett, with cameo appearances by David Meltzer, Cynthia Kersey, John Assaraf and emcee, Paisley Demby.

programme.title: BREAD. AN EVERYDAY MIRACLE
programme.desc: Bread is a branded product with an endless number of varieties and providers. But do we actually know what we eat every day? We meet small craft bakers who stand up for their quality and we meet CEOs who work on bread as an industrial mass product which becomes increasingly artificial. How can traditional bakery skills survive? And how will the future of bread look like?

programme.title: The Highest Pass
programme.desc: Part heart-pounding adventure, part spiritual quest, THE HIGHEST PASS, a feature length documentary, premiered in Los Angeles to sold out audiences. The award-winning film shares the journey of seven seekers, including one who has never ridden a motorcycle, who follow a guru with a Vedic death prophecy on a moto journey up to the highest pass of the Indian Himalayas. Over 21 days and up to an elevation of 18,000 feet along a winding road, they never let low oxygen, altitude sickness, river-flooded roads, icy edges, snow and loaded trucks dampen their spirits or, ultimately, their deeper selves.

programme.title: VERY SENIOR - ATTITUDE IS EVERYTHING
programme.desc: In Sun City, the retirement community in Arizona, the residents show us how to make the best of life when death casts its shadow in old age – with attitude!

programme.title: The Highest Pass
programme.desc: Part heart-pounding adventure, part spiritual quest, THE HIGHEST PASS, a feature length documentary, premiered in Los Angeles to sold out audiences. The award-winning film shares the journey of seven seekers, including one who has never ridden a motorcycle, who follow a guru with a Vedic death prophecy on a moto journey up to the highest pass of the Indian Himalayas. Over 21 days and up to an elevation of 18,000 feet along a winding road, they never let low oxygen, altitude sickness, river-flooded roads, icy edges, snow and loaded trucks dampen their spirits or, ultimately, their deeper selves.

programme.title: Sex Talk
programme.desc: Want to know the secrets of great kissers? And we’ll show you what exercise seniors can do to improve their sex lives. Plus dealing with the emotions during a divorce.

programme.title: The Aware Show
programme.desc: How can we remain calm and centered during stressful times? Today Lisa talks about meditation with Sister Dr. Jenna, an acclaimed spiritual mentor committed to bridging divides in societies and building relationships between global influencers. Info: meditationmuseum.org.

programme.title: The Aware Show
programme.desc: Today Lisa speaks with Udo Erasmus, best-selling author of “Fats that Heal, Fats that Kill.” As an expert in health and healing, he talks about “good fats,” healthy eating, and ways to reconnect to the self and live a life of thriving! Info: Udoschoice.com.

programme.title: The Aware Show
programme.desc: Lisa Garr talks with Dr. Harley Rotbart, a nationally renowned pediatrician, who speaks about his book “No Regrets Living” which outlines keys to living a life of wonder & contentment including self-forgiveness, opening to miracles, & discovery.

programme.title: The Aware Show
programme.desc: Lisa Garr talks with Fast Company Senior writer Nicole LaPorte. She researched the divide between the haves & have-nots including examining the vicious competitiveness of college admissions, bribes & lack of ethics within certain departments.

programme.title: Hope Is Here
programme.desc: A diagnosis of childhood cancer came as a shock to the Shoeneck family who found out about their daughter Kenedi's malignant tumor after an unexpected fall. This episode of Hope is Here proves the power of love and creativity as The Sing Me a Story Foundation pairs Kenedi and well-known songwriter Kat Perkins to create a happy and memorable tune that delivers hope, strength, and laughter to a family who needs a reason to smile.

programme.title: Hope Is Here
programme.desc: Our youth and all the experiences that makeup one's childhood, good and bad, can affect the person we ultimately become. Yet we often have a choice in that destiny. Ana Viamonte Ros is a woman who confirms that although insurmountable challenges and negative experiences from the past can shape our future, hard work and a determined, healthy mindset can pave the way toward a gratifying life. Today Dr. Viamonte dedicates her life to helping patients strengthen their mental health and conquer childhood traumas while serving as living proof that perseverance and hope make dreams attainable.

programme.title: Hope Is Here
programme.desc: The way to healing can take on different forms. Little 7-year-old Leonor, was suffering from a very rare cancer, and it was decided she needed an uplifting project to give her hope. What better medicine than an endearing song that was created from Lenore and her sister Dot's imagination and a ridiculously cute and famous dog named Doug the Pug? This episode of Hope is Here is about how a famous dog, creativity, and a group of caring individuals came together to give a little girl a world of hope to carry on. The path to healing can manifest in various ways. Meet Leonor, a resilient 7-year-old girl battling a highly uncommon form of cancer. Recognizing her need for inspiration and optimism, a heartwarming project was conceived. What could be more uplifting than a captivating melody born from the vivid imaginations of Leonor and her sister Dot, accompanied by the adorable and renowned Doug the Pug? In this episode of Hope is Here we witness the extraordinary convergence of a beloved canine, boundless creativity, and a compassionate community, all united to bestow upon a young girl a profound sense of hope for the future.

programme.title: Hope Is Here
programme.desc: Parents raise their children to ultimately achieve their independence. Yet removing barriers to attain the goal of independence is filled with great challenges for parents of children with special needs. Hope is Here focuses on a family, a very special foundation, and a Florida hospital system that is going to great lengths to empower individuals with intellectual disabilities with strength, confidence, and a sense of self-worth.

programme.title: Hope Is Here
programme.desc: Imagine being a child fighting cancer. Treatments, medications, and uncertainty fill your day. A boy named Oliver decided to face his disease and pain with fierce determination. Once strong again, he was filled with gratitude because of the love and support he received during his treatment. Yet it was a symbolic jacket that he wore during the days of his cancer treatments that inspired him to start his organization designed to cheer up other children dealing with cancer around the United States. Hope is Here covers the selfless story of Oliver's Patch Project.

programme.title: Hope Is Here
programme.desc: Ventilator-dependent children are limited in their ability to participate in sports and recreation. Enjoying childhood to its fullest is often not possible. Every year VACC Camp affords children on ventilators the chance to enjoy a stress-free day at the beach as they are supported by camp volunteers and the Miami Beach Fire and Rescue. This episode of Hope is Here interviews a participating doctor at Nicklaus Children's Hospital as well as a family that enjoys this unique opportunity to see their child enjoy the beach for the first time.

programme.title: Hope Is Here
programme.desc: Finding inspiration to fight cancer calls upon the courage and an immense determination to soldier through the most challenging days. This arduous journey also requires support and love from friends and family. Michael Cramer was gifted with all these necessary ingredients to forge ahead, not only from a family who loves him but especially from a mother whose encouragement strengthened her son through his darkest moments. Here is Michael's remarkable story about a mother's love, his undying resilience, and the crucial lessons he learned about giving back the gift of survival.

programme.title: Millionaire Maker
programme.desc: Shawn Meaike's Millionaire Maker is a new series that shows you what you're really worth. Shawn is confident he could pluck anyone - no matter their background or experience - and turn them into a 7-figure earner...IF, they have the right attitude and drive. This series is about Shawn selecting who he will mentor and teach to reach a level of success they never thought possible. Welcome to the toughest job interview of your life. In this episode, Shawn meets the contestants and immediately finds out who's actually willing to fight for the life they want.

programme.title: Millionaire Maker
programme.desc: Shawn only wants folks who are willing to be honest about their struggles because it shows you can be fearless. Everyone deserves a happy life...but he can only help you if you're ready to take a chance on yourself. In this episode, the candidates have to sell themselves. They have to tell Shawn their story because he wants to know how you got stuck...but more importantly, they have to convince him they won’t give up...no matter how hard it is to hang on, or take a leap of faith.

programme.title: Millionaire Maker
programme.desc: If you had a chance to close Shawn, could you get it done? Today's the day we see who has the goods. Each team has one goal. Get the contract signed. Shawn is not going to make it easy, but often your audience isn't the hardest part. Sometimes getting out of your own way is the biggest challenge. Prepare to witness a pitch fest for the ages. You'll see that it doesn't matter what you're selling - a Yacht, a Ferrari, a Private Jet...or a Potato - if you don't connect with Shawn, you have no chance.

programme.title: Millionaire Maker
programme.desc: This is it. A winner will be chosen. The decision is FINAL...But we still have a crowd of candidates that each think they will be the one. Now comes a test of mental toughness. It's all come down to these final moments. Who can convince Shawn that they won't give up when things get...painful. What would you endure for a chance at greatness?...Watch the season finale of Shawn Meaike's Millionaire Maker.

programme.title: A Return To Wholeness
programme.desc: As humans, we need interconnection: We rely on others to survive, especially as children. Yet, we also strive for authenticity. This creates an inherent tension. In this lesson, Dr. Maté discusses what is true human nature — and how the modern world has warped our understanding of our needs.

programme.title: A Return To Wholeness
programme.desc: Trauma is a wound that you sustain; it's not what happened to you. In this lesson, Dr. Maté explains why traumatic wounds get triggered and how to understand triggers in your process of transformation and healing.

programme.title: A Return To Wholeness
programme.desc: There is a strong link between childhood trauma and health challenges. Dr. Maté demonstrates how to untangle and understand this connection with self-compassion.

programme.title: VERY SENIOR - ATTITUDE IS EVERYTHING
programme.desc: In Sun City, the retirement community in Arizona, the residents show us how to make the best of life when death casts its shadow in old age – with attitude!

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends
programme.desc: Talking Hank and Talking Ginger are pretending to be a crime-fighting superhero duo. But Talking Ben has work to do and Talking Tom and Talking Angela are on a date, so the three of them try to keep Hank and Ginger from annoying them by given them sup...

programme.title: Rabbids Invasion
programme.desc: One stormy evening, while tinkering on a TV remote control, Mad Rabbid discovers that while useless on his TV, it works on the other rabbids: he can put them on fast-forward, rewind, pause, or slow-motion...! Unfortunately, like all Inventions Destine...

programme.title: Learn and Play with Cowboy Jack
programme.desc: Who's ready to exercise our brains with Cowboy Jack in this episode where we learn about Neurofeedback for Kids? Neurofeedback is a way to improve the way our brains function and how they process certain types of information and stimulus from the envi...

programme.title: Angelina Ballerina
programme.desc: The day for Angelina to meet her new ballet teacher, Ms. Mimi, has finally arrived and Angelina is thrilled! Angelina is unsettled when she learns that Ms. Mimi's teaching style is very different than that of her former teacher and mentor, Miss Lilly....

programme.title: Angry Birds
programme.desc: King Pig rescues a mistreated egg. After all, these things aren't exactly a dime-a-dozen! Are they?

programme.title: The Adventures of Teddy Ruxpin
programme.desc: Teddy and Grubby meet scientist Newton Gimmick. The three friends search for the treasure of Grundo.

programme.title: Bluey: The Videogame by Abdallah Smash
programme.desc: This is Season 1, Part 3 of Bluey: The Video game on Nintendo Switch. Help Bluey find the hidden treasure!

programme.title: Rabbids Invasion
programme.desc: The Rabbids explore the beach. They have a ball, but the human beachgoers aren't so lucky.

programme.title: Elemon
programme.desc: Today in the lab, Neon and her friend have made a horrible (and hilarious) mistake! They’ve created a MONSTER RAY that will turn anything GIGANTIC!

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: Tom Thomas is not excited at all when he receives the book "Treasure Island" as a gift from his grandmother. He thinks reading is boring. But Simka slowly manages to get Tom Thomas and Nolik wrapped up in the story, and soon they can't get enough.

programme.title: Game Toons
programme.desc: Tralalero Tralala must protect two young sharks, Roro and Trala, from the skies raining chaos above.

programme.title: Akedo: Ultimate Arcade Warriors
programme.desc: Jet can't get his head in the game and keeps making silly mistakes. Bria and Cub remind him that Akedo is all about having fun with friends.Can Jet find his focus and get back to playing at his best level?Join the battle. Become a legend. READY, F...

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: Bitzer tries to rule the farm with an iron fist.

programme.title: Dude Perfect Stereotypes
programme.desc: Golf Stereotypes - You've seen all these and maybe you're one of them. Well as long as you're not slow I guess it's ok.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pup Tales
programme.desc: After Chickaletta accidentally takes flight on a remote-controlled toy airplane, then crash-lands on Seal Island, it's up to the Paw Patrol to rescue her before she tumbles off the lighthouse.

programme.desc: I love honey. I just started an apiary and want to tell you my favorite things about honey AND bees!

programme.desc: Say hello to tomato and spring onion, and begin to introduce counting! How many fruit and veggie friends can you count? How many times did they jump or spin? Can you count fruit and veggies at home? Have a go, or maybe just enjoy the music!

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pup Tales
programme.desc: When the Cheetah snatches half of Chase’s Meteor Crystal, she sets out to prove she’s the fastest thing in Adventure Bay!

programme.title: LMN's
programme.desc: Accidentalmente, Chip y sus amigos caen a un lago donde son recogidos por la nave espacial de un átomo de sodio, que los lleva a Sodia, una ciudad submarina. Allí, los átomos de sodio y cloro viven un largo conflicto. El cloro quiere unirse al sodio para formar moléculas de cloruro de sodio, mientras que los átomos de sodio prefieren permanecer juntos. La patrulla de antimateria entra en contacto con el cloro y les propone proporcionarles rifles para dominar al sodio y así obligarlos a molecularizarse, pero Chip se burla de la antimateria y logra que el cloro y el sodio dejen de ser enemigos, restableciendo la paz en el mundo submarino.

programme.title: LMN's
programme.desc: Dentro de un viejo molino de viento, en medio de una fuerte tormenta, Chip y sus amigos esperan que pase y continúan su camino. Afuera, bajo el viento tempestuoso, la patrulla de antimateria le comunica al Dr. No que ya han encontrado al niño. El malvado científico confía en que esta vez no fallarán. Pero cuando el viento amaina, Chip idea una estrategia y deja a la antimateria encerrada en el molino, mientras él y los átomos siguen adelante.

programme.desc: Who says you can't be glam in a hospital gown? We're bringing the ultimate beauty battle to the most unexpected place: the hospital! Watch as we test the most luxurious, expensive beauty products against ingenious, cheap DIY hacks, all from a hospital bed. From 5-star skincare to crafts you can make from the patient menu, these tricks will change your self-care game.

programme.title: Rich Girl’s First Day at a Poor School: Poor, Rich and Giga Rich Students!
programme.desc: When a rich girl steps into a poor school for the first time, her glamorous lifestyle shocks everyone! From luxury gadgets to creative DIY crafts, watch how rich, poor, and giga-rich students face hilarious challenges and surprising twists. Who will win the ultimate school showdown? Find out in this fun and entertaining story full of secrets, style, and school drama!

programme.title: Art Supplies: Rich and Poor! The Ultimate Creative Showdown
programme.desc: What happens when luxury meets resourcefulness in an art battle? We're pitting the most expensive, high-end art supplies against clever, everyday cheap crafts! Watch the ultimate creative showdown as we try to make masterpieces from two completely different worlds. Will the pricey professional tools win, or will the ingenious budget-friendly hacks take the crown? Prepare for stunning results, shocking surprises, and a whole lot of creative fun

programme.title: If Food Were People! The Ultimate Cooking Showdown
programme.desc: What if your food had a personality? In our craziest challenge yet, we're bringing meals to life! Watch the ultimate cooking showdown between Me, my Grandma, and a Professional Chef. But there's a twist! Every dish we create has a wild, personified story. Who will create the most hilarious food character? Get ready for epic recipes, crazy characters, and a battle of creativity you won't forget!

programme.title: Geometric Food: No Hands, One Hand and Two Hands Cooking Showdown
programme.desc: It’s time for a crazy food challenge! Watch as we tackle the Geometric Food Challenge, creating perfectly shaped dishes, and then dive into a wild cooking battle: No Hands vs One Hand vs Two Hands! Who will cook the best meal with the least amount of hands? And which geometric creations will taste the best? It's a hilarious and tasty adventure of skill, creativity, and chaos!

programme.title: Giant, Medium or Tiny Food? Gold and Silver Color Showdown!
programme.desc: Get ready for the ultimate food challenge! We’re creating Giant, Medium and Tiny versions of your favorite foods while battling it out with dazzling gold and silver ingredients! From massive burgers to shimmering silver pizzas, it’s a fun, epic showdown of size and color. Who will win the tastiest, most creative creation? Watch to find out!

programme.title: Ultimate Food Challenge! Bite, Lick, Nothing and One-Color ASMR
programme.desc: Get ready for the most sensory and suspenseful food challenge yet! We're combining two epic games into one. First, the tense "Bite, Lick, or Nothing" challenge will have us on the edge of our seats! Then, we dive into a mesmerizing One-Color Food ASMR battle—will it be a vibrant green feast or a pretty in pink paradise?

programme.title: Extreme Eating Challenges! No Hands and Plate Size Showdown
programme.desc: Get ready for the most hilarious and messy eating challenges ever! We're putting our skills to the test in two crazy battles. First, can we even eat with no hands? Then, we're messing with our minds in a Big Plate and Small Plate illusion challenge! It's a full-on showdown of strategy, silliness, and serious spills. Who will master the one-hand technique? Who will be fooled by the plate size? Watch to find out and get ready to laugh!

programme.title: 3D Pen and Pancake Art Challenge! Best Art Wins $1,000!
programme.desc: Get ready for the ultimate art showdown! Watch as we go head-to-head in a 3D Pen vs Pancake Art Challenge, where creativity meets deliciousness! Who will create the most mind-blowing masterpiece to win a $1,000 prize? Plus, stick around for some amazing TikTok hacks, viral art tips, and parenting secrets to level up your life!

programme.title: Secret Candy Missions! How to Sneak Candy Everywhere
programme.desc: Got a sweet tooth but stuck in class? We've got you covered!This is your ultimate guide to becoming a candy ninja! Discover the most brilliant and sneaky life hacks to sneak your favorite treats anywhere—especially into school. Learn clever hiding spots, genius disguises, and pro-level strategies to enjoy your candy without getting caught. Master the art of the sweet sneak! Just don't blame us if you get caught...

programme.title: 24 Hours Eating Only One Color Food! Pink World, Bubble Gum Battle and Last-to-stop Color Challenge
programme.desc: Who will survive the longest? Who picks the tastiest meals? And who totally fails? Grab a snack (maybe in YOUR favorite color!) and enjoy the fun!

programme.title: Poor and Rich Art Challenge! Who Is Better? Cool Drawing Hacks And Diy Ideas
programme.desc: Ready for the ultimate creativity showdown? In this video, we're diving into the world of Rich vs. Broke challenges! We'll show you amazing art hacks using expensive supplies versus super cool tricks you can do with everyday stuff you have at home.

programme.title: Crazy Food Challenges! One-color Meal and No-hands Eating!
programme.desc: Get ready for the most hilarious and messy food challenges ever! In this video, we're taking on two epic food battles that will have you laughing out loud!

programme.title: Popular Barbie or Dark Barbie? Rich and Poor Doll Makeover
programme.desc: Welcome to the ultimate Barbie makeover and school craft showdown! In this fun mash-up, we’re blending Popular Barbie vs Dark Barbie school crafts with the dramatic and creative transformations of Rich vs Poor Barbie dolls!

programme.title: Brilliant Polymer Clay, Nanotape and Cardboard Crafts! Easy DIY Ideas
programme.desc: Get ready to unleash your creativity with the best polymer clay, nanotape, and cardboard crafts! Whether you’re looking for fun DIY projects, cool room decorations, or clever handmade gifts, this video has it all.

programme.title: High School You and Child You! Types Of Students, School Hacks and Funny Relatable Moments
programme.desc: Get ready for the funniest school mash-up ever! In this mega-compilation, we’re diving into High School You or Child You, exploring all the Types of Students in Class, and testing out some unbelievable DIY school hacks every parent and student will love!

programme.title: Parenting Hacks for School! Crafty Parents’ Ultimate Art and School Guide
programme.desc: Welcome to the ultimate guide for creative, crafty, and clever parents! This mega mash-up brings together the best school parenting hacks and the ultimate art-parenting guide to make school life easier, smarter, and way more fun.

programme.title: How to Sneak Candy Into Class! Sneaking Food from Parents and Teachers
programme.desc: Get ready for the funniest and most creative food sneaking hacks ever! This mega mash-up combines the best tricks from How to Sneak Candy Into Class and Sneaking Food from Parents & Teachers — all packed with clever ideas, hilarious fails, and unexpected surprises.

programme.title: Unicorn Magic! Makeover Kit Glow-Up and How to Romanticize School
programme.desc: Transform your school days with a burst of magic, color, and aesthetic vibes! This mash-up combines the magical makeover journey of Sprunki Blue and Pinky turning into Unicorn-style icons with a guide on how to romanticize school and make every day feel special.

programme.title: DIY Stress-Relieving Fidget Toys for School! Easy Paper Crafts and Classroom Fun
programme.desc: Get ready to craft your way to a calmer, more creative school day! This mash-up combines the coolest DIY stress-relieving fidget toys with super easy paper crafts anyone can make. Perfect for school, home, or whenever you need a little creative break!

programme.title: Fun and Easy School Hacks for Every Student
programme.desc: Struggling with school? These fun and easy life hacks will change your student life! Learn how to organize your backpack in seconds, create a study schedule that actually works, and make boring supplies exciting. We show you simple DIY solutions for better note-taking and memory tricks for acing your tests. Save time, reduce stress, and make school more enjoyable with these genius tips. Perfect for students of all ages looking to work smarter, not harder.

programme.title: Easy School Hacks And Rainbow Art Ideas: Fun DIY Crafts!
programme.desc: Discover the coolest school hacks and colorful rainbow crafts in this fun creative compilation! Perfect for students looking for organization tips and artistic inspiration.

programme.title: Magical Doll Makeover: Hello Kitty, Kuromi And Barbie Transformations!
programme.desc: Watch your favorite dolls get amazing makeovers! Hello Kitty and Kuromi get stylish new looks, and Barbie becomes a magical mermaid in this fun DIY transformation story. Perfect for doll lovers and craft fans of all ages!

programme.title: Grandma And Me: Kitchen Gadgets and Parenting Hacks
programme.desc: Get ready for the ultimate generational cooking showdown! Watch as Grandma's classic, time-tested techniques go head-to-head with modern kitchen gadgets and clever parenting hacks. Who will win? The wisdom of tradition or the speed of innovation?

programme.title: Viral DIY Fidget Toys: Cheap And Expensive Creations!
programme.desc: Dive into the world of satisfying DIY fidget toys! Watch as we create stunning epoxy resin and nano tape creations, comparing budget-friendly vs premium results. Learn to make your own trendy accessories while enjoying fun stories behind each design. Perfect for stress relief and creative fun!

programme.title: Rich and Poor Parenting Hacks: Must-Have Gadgets and DIY Tips!
programme.desc: Who says you need to spend big to be a great parent? Watch as we compare rich vs poor parenting hacks, from high-end gadgets to clever DIY solutions that save money and time! Whether you’re splurging or saving, you’ll find tons of tips to make your life easier and your kids happier!

programme.title: Epic Food Challenge Showdown! Funny Eating And ASMR Battles
programme.desc: Get ready for the ultimate food challenge fun! Watch as we take on crazy eating challenges — from No Hands vs One Hand vs Two Hands to Blue vs Pink ASMR battles! It’s boys vs girls, creativity vs chaos, and laughter all the way! Who will win the ultimate food showdown?

programme.title: 3-Way Cooking Showdown: Me, Grandma and Pro
programme.desc: Get ready for the most EPIC and hilarious cooking battle ever! Who will be crowned the kitchen champion? In this wild 3-way showdown, we're pitting three completely different chefs against each other!

programme.title: Me and Grandma 100 Layers Food Challenge! Broke and Rich Cooking Battle
programme.desc: Get ready for the ultimate kitchen showdown! Watch as I take on Grandma in the 100 Layers Food Challenge — who will make the tastiest tower of deliciousness? From broke vs rich food hacks to crazy cooking ideas you must try, this fun and epic challenge is packed with laughs, creativity, and mouthwatering moments!

programme.title: Mystery Magic and Drink Roulette! Lucky and Unlucky
programme.desc: Get ready for a challenge where magic and mystery collide!In this epic game, we're mixing mind-blowing magic tricks with a risky mystery drink roulette! Will you get a delicious lucky sip or a gross unlucky one? The magic boxes hold the secret. Watch as we perform incredible illusions and then face the consequences of choosing the wrong box! It's a battle of skill, luck, and survival!

programme.title: Hospital Glam: Rich and Poor Beauty Hacks!
programme.desc: Who says you can't be glam in a hospital gown? We're bringing the ultimate beauty battle to the most unexpected place: the hospital! Watch as we test the most luxurious, expensive beauty products against ingenious, cheap DIY hacks, all from a hospital bed. From 5-star skincare to crafts you can make from the patient menu, these tricks will change your self-care game.

programme.title: Rich Girl’s First Day at a Poor School: Poor, Rich and Giga Rich Students!
programme.desc: When a rich girl steps into a poor school for the first time, her glamorous lifestyle shocks everyone! From luxury gadgets to creative DIY crafts, watch how rich, poor, and giga-rich students face hilarious challenges and surprising twists. Who will win the ultimate school showdown? Find out in this fun and entertaining story full of secrets, style, and school drama!

programme.title: Roswell Conspiracies: Aliens, Myths and Legends
programme.desc: In his relentless search to find out what truly happened to his biological father, Logan uncovers something he didn’t bargain for – an assassin android that marches right up to the Alliance’s front door looking for its preprogrammed target – Nick Logan!

programme.title: Roswell Conspiracies: Aliens, Myths and Legends
programme.desc: When a team of allied intelligence agents learns that extraterrestrial beings have been living among humans for years, they vow to protect earth.

programme.title: Roswell Conspiracies: Aliens, Myths and Legends
programme.desc: Ruck, the werewolves pack leader, escapes from the Alliance and tracks down the EMP bomb which the Yeti race has been hiding. The doomsday device is accidentally activated while it’s being stolen, and Logan must discover its location before time runs out.

programme.title: Roswell Conspiracies: Aliens, Myths and Legends
programme.desc: An alien satellite that has been “watching” us for fifty years collides with a NASA shuttle. Rinaker doesn’t want its secrets exposed, so he sends Logan, Blaze, Trueblood and Ti-Yet on a stolen Lycanthrope ship to retrieve the data before anyone else. Logan hopes the information might reveal information about his father.

programme.title: Roswell Conspiracies: Aliens, Myths and Legends
programme.desc: Cattle mutilation draws Logan to a small town and saddles him with a new partner, Dr. Petrovic. They discover science has spawned more trouble – hybrid, mutant, alien fire ants. Now they must rescue the townsfolk and the Detail Team before Rinaker calls an air strike on the town.

programme.title: Roswell Conspiracies: Aliens, Myths and Legends
programme.desc: Mab, Queen of the Banshees, dispatches two bullheaded Minotauri bounty hunters and a cerberus parahound after the same prize – the head of Sh’lainn Blaze.

programme.title: Roswell Conspiracies: Aliens, Myths and Legends
programme.desc: A vampire that once worked for INTRAcom has mutated and is now staging attacks on his former boss’s holdings in an effort to protect the Brazilian rain forest. The creature rescues Logan, but Rinaker calls for an air strike on a lost Vampire city rather than risk its discovery by INTRAcom.

programme.title: Roswell Conspiracies: Aliens, Myths and Legends
programme.desc: Sh’lainn’s death vision predicts everyone at the Alliance base will die in twelve hours. What she doesn’t realize is that she will be the cause. After coming into contact with a recovered alien probe, she reverts to her wildest Banshee state and begins mutating the technology around her. Magical “earth stones” from the Banshee clan may be her only hope.

programme.title: Roswell Conspiracies: Aliens, Myths and Legends
programme.desc: Logan and Fitz are missing and presumed dead while on a mission to locate a downed alien ship in Haiti. They have been captured by a race of slug-like beings that can only inhabit the bodies of dead humans, which transforms them into zombies. Logan and Fitz are next and time is running out.

programme.title: Dork Hunters and The Pirates of Tortuga Island
programme.desc: The Dork Hunters visit tropical Tortuga Island on their summer vacation, unaware that the Dork Commander and his second-in-command are at the same resort in search of a buried treasure chest full of micro-galaxies

programme.title: Highlander: The Animated Series
programme.desc: A flashback shows the death of Connor MacLeod at Kortan's hand during the Jettator ceremony.

programme.title: Roswell Conspiracies: Aliens, Myths and Legends
programme.desc: When an Alliance raid on a Banshee clan permits the escape of Banshee renegade, Sh’lainn Blaze, the Alliance turns to professional bounty hunter Nick Logan for help. Logan’s investigation turns up questions about his own past life – even as the vengeful Banshee try to eliminate both Logan and his quarry.

programme.title: Roswell Conspiracies: Aliens, Myths and Legends
programme.desc: Rinaker wants Nick and Sh’lainn eliminated because he’s afraid they know too much about the Alliance. The renegade bounty hunter and Banshee track an Alliance airship to its secret Roswell base. Logan is ready to turn himself in to get some answers, but the Banshee grab Sh’lainn and Logan must turn to the Alliance for help with her rescue.

programme.title: Roswell Conspiracies: Aliens, Myths and Legends
programme.desc: On their first Alliance assignment, Nick and Sh’lainn are sent by Rinaker to the Himalayas to find a missing team of mountain climbers. They find the alien refugees – the Yeti – who are guarding a stolen Lycanthrope weapon powerful enough to destroy the planet. All are in danger, as the werewolves will stop at nothing to get the weapon back in their possession.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! Follows the adventures of high school student Yugi, who has a magical secret that comes to life when he plays his favorite card game: 'Duel Monsters.'

programme.title: Roblox DOORS with Thinknoodles!
programme.desc: Thinknoodles plays Roblox Doors horror game in ROBLOX!

programme.title: Super Mario RPG
programme.desc: Enter a world of whimsy with Mario on a quest to repair Star Road and defeat the troublemaking Smithy Gang, who has crashed into their world and scattered the 7 Star Pieces of Star Road. Abdallah plays as Mario and teams up with a party of unlikely allies, like the monstrous Bowser and a mysterious doll named Geno, in Super Mario RPG on Nintendo Switch with family-friendly commentary.

programme.title: Sonic X
programme.desc: A slight malfunction causes Chaos Control, and sends Sonic the Hedgehog to Earth. While there, Sonic meets Chris Thorndyke, who helps in collecting the Chaos Emeralds, so Sonic and friends can go home.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros. Wonder
programme.desc: Mario and friends are invited to the Flower Kingdom by its ruler, Prince Florian, when Bowser suddenly appears, along with Kamek and Bowser Jr.! Bowser then takes hold of the Wonder Flower, merging himself, his Koopa Clown Car, and Prince Florian's castle to become a flying fortress, wreaking havoc across the land and trapping the Poplins in their homes. Abdallah plays as Mario and friends and sets off on a journey to defeat Bowser and save the Flower Kingdom in Super Mario Bros. Wonder on Nintendo Switch with family-friendly commentary.

programme.title: Sonic Superstars
programme.desc: Adventure through the mystical Northstar Islands and harness all-new Emerald powers to move and attack in dynamic new ways.
